name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: this week’s special
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | Team,

On the plate this week is community here in Jersey!

Having diverse communities that come together makes our state better. That’s why I will always stand up for LGBTQ+ rights, reproductive freedom, and our Jersey Values.

Investing in our community means investing in future generations. That is the root of everything I do. From making life in Jersey more affordable, to getting cleaner air, to fighting for commonsense gun safety, to ensuring safer communities, I will always fight to protect those growing up in our communities.

As Governor, I’ll be ready to fight for Jersey Values, and to lower taxes and lower costs so that our communities can continue to thrive. **But I need your help to get there.[Chip in $10 or anything you can to support our campaign!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98497292/516845397/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20241210_FR_DinerMenu_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmQ2YzgzYi01M2I3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uzndS0Egud8_Pguy0aqE76FL1_-QQgtJSUbETYW_KAw=&emci=b0d6c83b-53b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=cbd6c83b-53b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=37438246)** | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98497293/516845398/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20241210_FR_DinerMenu_0_3MO_Josh_NA_NA_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmQ2YzgzYi01M2I3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uzndS0Egud8_Pguy0aqE76FL1_-QQgtJSUbETYW_KAw=&emci=b0d6c83b-53b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=cbd6c83b-53b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=37438246)

clean_body: | | Team, On the plate this week is community here in Jersey! Having diverse communities that come together makes our state better. That’s why I will always stand up for LGBTQ+ rights, reproductive freedom, and our Jersey Values. Investing in our community means investing in future generations. That is the root of everything I do. From making life in Jersey more affordable, to getting cleaner air, to fighting for commonsense gun safety, to ensuring safer communities, I will always fight to protect those growing up in our communities. As Governor, I’ll be ready to fight for Jersey Values, and to lower taxes and lower costs so that our communities can continue to thrive. But I need your help to get there. | | | | | | | Thank you, Josh | Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign , or to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 United States

With a second Trump term and Republican majorities at the federal level looming, we need to double down on our efforts.
President Obama called on us to own a piece of the fight for a better future in places like your community – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and take action _now_.
By renewing your 2025 DLCC membership _today_ , you can help pave a path for Democratic wins in upcoming special elections and beyond.

Hi Peter,

With the year coming to an end, now’s the perfect time to make sure you’re taking advantage of the Oregon Political Tax Credit! Here in Oregon, anyone making under $75,000 ($150,000 if filing jointly) can get a $50 credit ($100 if filing jointly). This means a $50 donation to my campaign is entirely refunded to you as a credit on your state taxes.

This tax credit is a unique opportunity to support our campaign at no extra cost to you, and it goes a long way in helping us build a campaign structure to fight for what we believe will win and recover from this year’s losses. When you use your credit you’re helping us build a stronger coalition to move Oregon forward, stand up to MAGA extremism, and keep our communities informed and empowered.

| | From the Desk of

# **[Kari Lake](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9963b7fe5f0d42b8b8c49465f70c8ff2&_e=4cody3EGUHtcugNOkWWOJcNLZ9Ma-D25NW1OGxpA-D_GC9BTcJSSVxrZ1ggU-P1Rqqp_5wjaBsNtkHEkLCUNTFmm_adTVjBumGVmFTOOCgDqqhakbkCfvHUh5MV58wkEzIxYLrOHo-dzVlCashBtBiFk9GhBF_MvW618SLMAItp7XVxn5UEqPrIBi2eR3XcWBUO7-npyvQkeeCgNNYkf046dGc186ovNpF2bCEYQ1GPsrJ8Z1PGkJeTXnHnXLmFHPeDFHrT378-_ujP-CE7zgX3sgzuxc8o6GJg0_PKIW1NxcPDYeMhLUtKHJcUYvA3DqMrYLT4JXVjLqZ0Nn8vqgQ7fXycFzz93PLx1dKF85VGAvlLxB7NH7MCKOxDfx3zuQ5lL72L3xk3bcfZ68_cUyr69JWaWHRaEikMKuVlJfr8%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9963b7fe5f0d42b8b8c49465f70c8ff2&_e=4cody3EGUHtcugNOkWWOJcNLZ9Ma-D25NW1OGxpA-D_GC9BTcJSSVxrZ1ggU-P1Rqqp_5wjaBsNtkHEkLCUNTFmm_adTVjBumGVmFTOOCgDqqhakbkCfvHUh5MV58wkEzIxYLrOHo-dzVlCashBtBiFk9GhBF_MvW618SLMAItp7XVxn5UEqPrIBi2eR3XcWBUO7-npyvQkeeCgNNYkf046dGc186ovNpF2bCEYQ1GPsrJ8Z1PGkJeTXnHnXLmFHY2tDWrTDthiLYpfaQiyp0LCDcAmEnXL9MFu6OtVjYsDZXxqa9L3uC9ka6pWN2ckzl24Dm_XXzzQ4ZqNBE-3mkXSrlhepKY08OLUhbdtvm1JcB4x6ioIQStCR3GAAZXDBpKJG_2mFRLN4DYFklTEP0qPChVWXYkKOs1JoPG9lprs%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Peter, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9963b7fe5f0d42b8b8c49465f70c8ff2&_e=4cody3EGUHtcugNOkWWOJcNLZ9Ma-D25NW1OGxpA-D_GC9BTcJSSVxrZ1ggU-P1Rqqp_5wjaBsNtkHEkLCUNTFmm_adTVjBumGVmFTOOCgDqqhakbkCfvHUh5MV58wkEzIxYLrOHo-dzVlCashBtBiFk9GhBF_MvW618SLMAItp7XVxn5UEqPrIBi2eR3XcWBUO7-npyvQkeeCgNNYkf046dGc186ovNpF2bCEYQ1GPsrJ8Z1PGkJeTXnHnXLmFHuPiKDXjn8OvyqAAQb8kVe4-wndD0A57G06Dt_yoXYtHj9g-ou0Uvy2vuE-7ni_mhoibVXtDtTosHSR_K8G8AH6c2MCpKfjrAiBUJD4NZoS2Abw3NArF5ViUJbgO1YbbDoe0i5G3m82PQx1vY9lF6z4REK0DuyRAco--cwfqPPLs%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Hello,

Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you watched _MSNBC_ after a steep drop in ratings caused Comcast to put the network up for sale.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond.** Our data for your state is incomplete without your responses.

So we’re re-opening our poll and giving you a second chance to complete them. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22620%2E4449941%2EifJ45D)** | **[COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22620%2E4449941%2EifJ45D)**
---
We’ve attached the original poll below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: NO! NO! NO! [FFR]
Subject: _MSNBC_ \+ Elon Musk = TERRIBLE
To: Top Democrat
**BAD NEWS:** _MSNBC’s_ sharp drop in recent ratings has led to Comcast deciding to sell the network.
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=22620%2E4449941%2EifJ45D)
**WORSE NEWS:** Far-right billionaire Elon Musk is considering purchasing it!

We’re **stunned** to see that MSNBC is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re conducting an _URGENT_ poll to see our top supporters viewing habits:**
**[_[1-CLICK POLL] Do you watch _MSNBC?__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22620%2E4449941%2EifJ45D)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=11&akid=22620%2E4449941%2EifJ45D) | **[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=12&akid=22620%2E4449941%2EifJ45D)**
---
**[NO, I DON'T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=13&akid=22620%2E4449941%2EifJ45D)**
**** 500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE. ****
Donald Trump and his MAGA army have waged a war against any news channel that doesn’t bow down to him and promote his dangerous rhetoric.

_Now, Trump’s biggest supporter is trying to buy it and RUIN one of the most trusted news sources in America._

We need to know if our supporters are still watching MSNBC or if they’ve abandoned the once beloved network.
**[_So PLEASE: submit your poll response quickly! »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241210_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS&t=14&akid=22620%2E4449941%2EifJ45D)**
**500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM**
Thank you for your commitment to upholding democracy,

-FFR Polling Team
_MSNBC_ is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication.

Friend, When I go to work in Washington and fight for Northern Ohio, I'm fighting for my lifelong home too. I'm fighting for my friends and neighbors, my family members, and the community that raised me. **So when I say that your opinion matters to me, I mean it. Making your voice heard in Congress is the purpose of my work.** Right now, my team and I are making plans for the new Congress, and we need your input to guide our goals. With the most radical members of the GOP in control in Washington, our work is more urgent than ever. _Friend, what are the most important issues you'd like to see us focus on in 2025? Please take our 2025 Priorities Survey to let us know — it will only take two minutes!_ **[TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98497862/516865742/2136380605?ms=241210_mk_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDRiNDFmNS01OGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9dwTxxkdavDa1vMIvggsdr9wpn7eHh46c7knX0vFDKc=&emci=448c2f26-aab6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=4d4b41f5-58b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2814549)** My team and I will read every response, and your opinion will shape our priorities for the year ahead. Thanks for being part of this movement, friend. — Marcy

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The fight in the states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We'll be blunt, Team: We're not expecting any help or action from the federal government. A MAGA Department of Justice along with a Congress controlled by opponents of voting rights and a Supreme Court that's tearing down the Voting Rights Act one clause at a time all add up to a gigantic roadblock there.
But we can still fight -- state by state and legislature by legislature -- for voting rights at the state level. From state versions of the Voting Rights Act to pro-voting judicial nominees to fights against suppressive bills, our focus for the next two years will be at the state level.
That kind of fight is painstaking, which is why we're already asking for your help. RUSH $25 or whatever you can right now to help us protect and expand the right to vote across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121024_2&amount=25]
NPR: With the Voting Rights Act facing more threats, advocates renew a push for state laws [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121024_2&amount=25]
Team, you don't need us to remind you about all the assaults on the Voting Rights Act. From Supreme Court cases to state laws and the recent 8th circuit ruling that citizens don't have a right to sue for their right to vote, the last decade-plus has been one attack after another.
That's why we've so quickly turned our focus to the state legislative sessions that kick off next month. Several states have enacted state-level voting rights acts over the past two decades, and Michigan is working hard to be next.
2025 is going to be a huge battleground for our right to vote. With attacks likely at the federal level in all three branches of government, our opportunities to go on offense will be in the states. We have to pass state laws wherever we can to defend and expand our right to vote while fighting suppressive legislation in states like Florida, Georgia, Texas, and more.
We're already hard at work and have a goal of raising $50,000 from grassroots donors to help mobilize and defend voting rights before state legislative sessions start in just a few weeks.
Team: Will you fuel our work and chip in $25 or more to help reach our important fundraising goal before December 31? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121024_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=121024_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=121024_2&amount=25]

GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=121024_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121024_2&amount=35]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121024_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121024_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121024_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121024_2&amount=25]

United States

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parade on Blues Clues?
body:
Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=531f806df6ce4a5cbb45e6edeefa919e&_e=GViaUDoIE0En1xdep9aFnJs1bpZRjghrIenL4vBBBfSdb53a7JdVdSHgcbC7Y_H1iz35ux_fVLXNf_K5pSW3h4A1ESyJbTeST6m34lvfskrR_mZBdgo_RsKnxjJhossmAoSt6N3jUlnecL7K3f8CEKvzyd6g7jH_ovpQMoUV3qpz5jZ9D4hFYc8V4S8nDVKlhFsoGNIOhGt3LLBvnBKLLLn_bzCUiPHy8w-TyCHLE1L0LQp6nUn-mfF9RSYAi1uOCe0ssJ9D6QWN2kueDXffkE8odj4AnGc3fxClRjflVX3MlFxNKHDqYV4V6IeqXaFbiUlR9RT3ogR20GXHO5C3pAu7K88w2ZoauAM22FQ_iH_qJDMN4R4ahpNVlKSxjNbte5er3P3FijLfFz3tiLSpbg%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=531f806df6ce4a5cbb45e6edeefa919e&_e=GViaUDoIE0En1xdep9aFnJs1bpZRjghrIenL4vBBBfSdb53a7JdVdSHgcbC7Y_H1iz35ux_fVLXNf_K5pSW3h4A1ESyJbTeST6m34lvfskrR_mZBdgo_RsKnxjJhossmAoSt6N3jUlnecL7K3f8CEKvzyd6g7jH_ovpQMoUV3qpz5jZ9D4hFYc8V4S8nDVKlhFsoGNIOhGt3LLBvnBKLLLn_bzCUiPHy8w-TyCHLE1K7CX8uERmo95O1FCPizncov1UO83FTpg9QaGgwSoic5plbvwRTAA_OZONwOIEARhxxRDr6pM-Nyg2refID4bI5SUROW575JPxBGkXBtJn-Tx__ecByfNhnEvbVujziwnBTFjPX7rVDC_mCoE86h7qAXSfrapft6ByU0zTuOF0XGA%3D%3D)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=531f806df6ce4a5cbb45e6edeefa919e&_e=GViaUDoIE0En1xdep9aFnJs1bpZRjghrIenL4vBBBfSdb53a7JdVdSHgcbC7Y_H1iz35ux_fVLXNf_K5pSW3h4A1ESyJbTeST6m34lvfskrR_mZBdgo_RsKnxjJhossmAoSt6N3jUlnecL7K3f8CEKvzyd6g7jH_ovpQMoUV3qpz5jZ9D4hFYc8V4S8nDVKlhFsoGNIOhGt3LLBvnBKLLLn_bzCUiPHy8w-TyCHLE1JYH80mQ367bNO2394mkr_BI9rFYcHnS3-PdiRvgdKzA_qMUrRbnps-ri3p5pY1RghZrXiBzfG90kUe0R9kzf36-KEu02S_q3-Tkd53_grZhvPf1P5wT3rZzsZB3BgyJzd4KnFQTFHALToCEETU3-Ta2OgekhwVZJ51AN2ZMPvYnA%3D%3D) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=531f806df6ce4a5cbb45e6edeefa919e&_e=GViaUDoIE0En1xdep9aFnJs1bpZRjghrIenL4vBBBfSdb53a7JdVdSHgcbC7Y_H1iz35ux_fVLXNf_K5pSW3h4A1ESyJbTeST6m34lvfskrR_mZBdgo_RsKnxjJhossmAoSt6N3jUlnecL7K3f8CEKvzyd6g7jH_ovpQMoUV3qpz5jZ9D4hFYc8V4S8nDVKlhFsoGNIOhGt3LLBvnBKLLLn_bzCUiPHy8w-TyCHLE1IsLVybmQt0Zs7rZUTOizsBimigbxzlP8P0ASXpRsAYrmHPONDioeUc2UJaUmp0mTYkrbPJy6vo4Y_MhbQ8p8kKBddOrWTPbtGTVh852Nk0qPNZp8kJH9Z-69M0SM8dagma0_dJQHsaDy8Zws2UTvhcUilEWCdvQ2nNc1bXoGRaoQ%3D%3D)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=531f806df6ce4a5cbb45e6edeefa919e&_e=GViaUDoIE0En1xdep9aFnJs1bpZRjghrIenL4vBBBfSdb53a7JdVdSHgcbC7Y_H1iz35ux_fVLXNf_K5pSW3h4A1ESyJbTeST6m34lvfskrR_mZBdgo_RsKnxjJhossmAoSt6N3jUlnecL7K3f8CEKvzyd6g7jH_ovpQMoUV3qpz5jZ9D4hFYc8V4S8nDVKlhFsoGNIOhGt3LLBvnBKLLLn_bzCUiPHy8w-TyCHLE1JbZ6p8ilH5cpvZtWVwrL4Vbt36X88gpqqFUwXoDmOOfADys-GP8BBy7XqMEatEg3-jzGVBMojzPbjrzoCx-1UMru2n7NMlvsHWZSDB-VitqKXTP7KUb8tSK8VRAudoV480bsRMPCJJhw8p_Z5WFwWRxUfR7dalbNUrU2kRSdU_6w%3D%3D)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=531f806df6ce4a5cbb45e6edeefa919e&_e=GViaUDoIE0En1xdep9aFnJs1bpZRjghrIenL4vBBBfSdb53a7JdVdSHgcbC7Y_H1iz35ux_fVLXNf_K5pSW3h4A1ESyJbTeST6m34lvfskrR_mZBdgo_RsKnxjJhossmAoSt6N3jUlnecL7K3f8CEKvzyd6g7jH_ovpQMoUV3qpz5jZ9D4hFYc8V4S8nDVKlhFsoGNIOhGt3LLBvnBKLLLn_bzCUiPHy8w-TyCHLE1LpERBBAi3ndwVf9ab928gx1snF875aCPEq1aMRg0fN7QTZ06JtZI_gz2rFntgMLCcc2HJbgvRo7B7BCyi9qsEJtbKAV8SYT0BTtCnY6SlQreFo7o5iqLx7CuXQCqhqzDuijkeGsvN1wg0d6R-ot81c4ImbNJqttRKGsFc5-b46Yw%3D%3D)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,

clean_body: Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... | | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best , Marcus Welby , M.D. , and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your Founding Supporter Gift is $50 you will receive: ** All ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ** And a FREE copy of my children's book:Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Official J6 Pardon Petition
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AKb/?__vbtrk=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AKb/?__vbtrk=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AKb/?__vbtrk=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_ This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AKb/?__vbtrk=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AKb/?__vbtrk=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
__Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!

_Yours Sincerely,_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AKb/?__vbtrk=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0NTAxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene
_

---

name: The Forward Party
subject: Looking Back, Moving Forward - Your Exclusive Invite To Our EOY Event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Join Forward and special guests as we prepare for 2025 and reflect on 2024

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event&n=1)
---
Wednesday, December 11, 2024 | Peter -- 2024 was a banner year for the Forward Party. We grew more than ever and ran more than 125 candidates across the country. With hundreds of volunteers and thousands of hours of hard work, we helped propel a host of new forward-thinking officials into office, and we're ready to celebrate them and look to the year ahead. You're invited! Join us for our end of the year _Looking Backward, Moving Forward_ event. We'll hear from our board chair and founders about the successes this year, and we'll even have some surprise guests (stay tuned!). | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event&n=2 "Register Today!") [Register Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event&n=2)
---
**Save the Date:_Looking Backward, Moving Forward_ End-of-Year Appreciation Event!**
Mark your calendars for our End-of-Year Appreciation event on **December 18th at 7:15**! This will be a special opportunity to:
* Celebrate what we’ve achieved together in 2024.
* Share our plans for building momentum in 2025.
* Hear from the leaders of the movement how you can have the biggest impact in 2025.

More details about the event are coming soon, but for now, register and save your spot—we can’t wait to see you there!
**Support us into the next year!**
The election may be behind us, but our work isn't done. We're launching big plans for 2025 at this meeting, and we need your help with all of them. We've got some big news here as well - two donors have committed to a **$20,000 match in December!*** That means every dollar you donate will count double (until we hit $20,000 raised)!

name: Team Californians for Choice
subject: You should be very proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Californians for Choice (www
body:
Californians for Choice [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62802/images/ca4c-edited.png]

Peter,

Now that the dust is starting to settle from last month’s elections, we wanted to reach out to share some information on the impact you’ve had, and to say thank you.

First of all, now that all of the votes have been counted we want to congratulate Adam Gray on not just winning but FLIPPING CA-13 for Democrats!

Of course, we also want to give a special thank you to all of the Californians for Choice volunteers who got involved, made phone calls for his campaign and helped with the recount and ballot-curing efforts.

But Californians for Choice volunteers played an essential role in more than just CA-13. Our volunteers sent more than 2.9 million texts, made tens of thousands of calls to voters, and canvassed to get out the vote in all five of our targeted swing districts!

Peter, together we organized and turned out pro-choice voters to win key races here in California. You should be very proud of the impact this team has had.

But with Trump taking office in January and a GOP majority that wants to come after our reproductive freedom, the truth is that we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us.

But here’s the good news, Peter: Thanks in large part to the hard work of Californians like you, the Republicans’ majority is going to be one of the slimmest ever — meaning Democrats are going to be ready to take ANY opportunity to fight back against right-wing attempts to take away our fundamental freedoms.

Can you sign up to say you’re still in this fight? We can’t let Donald Trump, his GOP allies in Congress, and a right-wing Supreme Court take away our freedom to choose. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2QkdEvrUjkuqXCVhENlhgA2]

SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2QkdEvrUjkuqXCVhENlhgA2]

Thank you for everything you’ve done and will do to protect reproductive freedom here in California and across the country.

- Team Californians for Choice

Paid for by Californians for Choice (www.californiansforchoice.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Governor Glenn Youngkin
subject: Seriously, there could not be a better person!

body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3avf11v2btc7r7v0trt18bjpnep66fn3i49bch0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjg6eor1c1h2bs "Glenn Youngkin")
---
It's Governor Glenn Youngkin and I have an important announcement to share with you.

In 2021, Winsome Earle-Sears and I ran for Virginia's highest offices. We fought to defend parents' rights, back the blue and our military, and get Virginia's economy and jobs moving again. Together, we've worked as a team to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

I'm so proud of the work we have done. _But I 'm writing to you today not because our mission is over but because it's just beginning. _

**Next year, Winsome will lead Republicans to a crucial victory in November and keep Virginia on the path to prosperity!**

**[I'm proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zebv895sdneqh9doflhkk2uk2qf5bplre8oiet5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjg6eor1c1h2bs "I’m proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:")**

Winsome has been a fantastic Lt. Governor, and she will be an even better Governor. She brings the fighting spirit of a Marine to the office every single day.

Seriously, there could not be a better person to continue our success for Virginians for the next four years. That's why I'm giving Winsome my complete endorsement and total support. Today, I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart to please do the same.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1gh77ge3cqens9co01qoa40o7f29vs9skcv2j5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjg6eor1c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4q6em3mnaub6hhq772mcg7mfss8ckep2niu0gf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjg6eor1c5h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv2uakdc5if2gbqrvqid1nu39k2ehro6j8nv9uhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjg6eor1c5h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5dup2jcbcpshu256dfv7stjahml14fv2jt8dodo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjg6eor1c5h2bs)

name: GOP Outreach Team
subject: YOU Can Shape Our Future.
body:
Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

Take the Republican Roadmap Survey

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, The American People sent a resounding, clear message this election: _**they’re done with failed, radical, liberal policies**_. As a result, Republicans now have control of the White House, the Senate, and the House! 🦅🇺🇸 **This victory is YOUR victory – and now it’s time to ensure the government you entrusted is working for YOU.** You made your voice heard at the ballot box, but the fight to protect and strengthen America’s future doesn’t stop there. **What happens next depends on what YOU decide.** [**_We’re inviting you to participate in our “Republican Roadmap Survey” – your chance to tell us exactly what you want Republicans to prioritize now that we have the power to lead our nation. >>>_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4547559074404089912f5e9f6441f869&_e=yU1NdPf453sm1BkApdrS8YPe0Aa0zuXXQ6_8UGGdKJ6nUJy4-T415xWe6zIN5kow3MPXe502P5X3jbohGVA86exT_AtStXDh-0wW5ZZcmLvIf6dTyc7f-FUcBEx-elOezvzd-Buwn_D7tVKGbVfo4RZ3h-37qM94lGuQIKx_P9VrFiKf4AnGRU_DvHXby9cRRYuYhj7GXx42w-eh0Frf4KL4rKULT4WOquZXIN1i7-ZHP-Z2tMwPbbaE6I0aYIqSe4lK8vd2-Agr8YkH1T0XTCh26JR5wl7slXtGcUTOUOM%3D)
---
| | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4547559074404089912f5e9f6441f869&_e=yU1NdPf453sm1BkApdrS8YPe0Aa0zuXXQ6_8UGGdKJ6nUJy4-T415xWe6zIN5kow3MPXe502P5X3jbohGVA86exT_AtStXDh-0wW5ZZcmLvIf6dTyc7f-FUcBEx-elOezvzd-Buwn_D7tVKGbVfo4ZrYyP05Gy5aKzQbX745ZxBtGdWarMPnbjjFD3022MsyBkp-VRdt0xVZblIsGWyb7P7MGEhW2caHeqvLTOewgVGdfYNq5az5h6c2tpBSg1Hp-rpfGw5Lzc8GVIe_XK1HcV6k7r8vFtaf9QBDUAZRS9k%3D)
---
| | | [ TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4547559074404089912f5e9f6441f869&_e=yU1NdPf453sm1BkApdrS8YPe0Aa0zuXXQ6_8UGGdKJ6nUJy4-T415xWe6zIN5kow3MPXe502P5X3jbohGVA86exT_AtStXDh-0wW5ZZcmLvIf6dTyc7f-FUcBEx-elOezvzd-Buwn_D7tVKGbVfo4bu9ZvQ2ThAOTDm-u0dccf5hJpktaMYQbWfbtpKSz-4_2z3dqlycaQb6o_lnQWYmbpT-aBqDHGxX9i1hbYKQ_xawR0xU2xWwVEUU4Hb7q4It6Pfaajoc2tsXbDLGoB7c4q6xL-3XH1aQcyCeK5rOX7g%3D)
---
| | From defending conservative values to securing our borders, strengthening the economy, and building a bright future for our children and grandchildren, **this is your opportunity to make your voice heard****AGAIN****and shape the Republican agenda.** _Why is this survey so important?_ Republicans control all 3 chambers because of YOU. Now it’s time to prioritize the policies we fight for. name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkn5j3nfcb6jc34rtajg2v48fjllg91bd4ahiav0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4chh2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsbngeect6bjubn0p0pllanq15j5gu79l7kkcu88_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7bvhgv3voq95jple6sdt9lq9jlu7ajv9g993le0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4chh2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zovr64a8pseurr24p6jp2alc6in1q01h5vnimr88_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4chh2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zje6rhl8pu7d8ks68hrcv0ntg6nodeehu49vriu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4chh2bs)
---

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9vnpiic3c84f4nt65v51dnmpdgldcji0scle43o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c3h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z45enr970dgsrmsl0f4cvne71r1l5ien2kkcg87g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c3h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zerbdrkvskkbljuub14k8kmi7dm1am7ne4bspts8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c3h2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z70d2c1bmmia0isbtd14gpt4vcm8dg8dqh7b0s10_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c3h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv7ccgdjbdvqjig4cdp585v0dscjkjj5dsv659s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c3h2bs)

name: Tony Johnson
subject: Defend your personal liberties laid out in the Constitution
body:
As a fellow conservative, you likely already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far left.

| | |
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1eb88bn8vsto4cu52cob06bg3l9uf2jv2dac5gg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c5h2bs)
---
| | | Hello, As a fellow conservative, you likely already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world to promise freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance; **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain **[free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zre6ec15jq2p55q7pbiit8rceppbraii8nf5hdn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c5h2bs)** [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5fl141ut2sr5kfeoonr22fbiuonf90ef9o7n2o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c5h2bs) In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives—they want government-controlled health care, higher taxes and redistribution of wealth in the form of socialism, increased regulations, to do away with the Electoral College, and for open borders. It is for this reason that we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, the freedoms promised to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it promises to us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by clicking this link today? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: **[https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z07utc0rf57ca9utqlkopg2un2vhph7js6c4o67o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c5h2bs)** This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the far-Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmbgq24bsneckjocadv29ojoto0i4s9vpmieie6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c5h2bs) Thank you, Tony Johnson Director of Membership
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuavq5g413ui2372u0c1kkqp05n03s8j1o7ih058_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji68oj4c5h2bs)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “Calls for Giuliani to be held in contempt ofcourt”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
“He’s not going to be permitted to speak.”

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdjd35l9jj3l80fkk9ib4u3l2ea1475o6si2n5n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji6co32clh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly **_“hold me in contempt.”_**
---
Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – _yours truly_ – bankrupt and behind bars.
---
During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, __I will not be permitted to speak.__
---
It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech.
---
But I will _never_ _surrender_ this battle, _because**freedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for.**_
---
They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom!
---
**With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you.**
---
_Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can keep fighting for my rights and freedom against the Left’s vicious witch hunt.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z01j8h4pcmqrvd4vjt55dqt7k8beookcms14eooo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji6co32clh2bs)

body:
We can’t believe it’s come to this

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Democrats are trying to stop President Trump's agenda at all costs. **And now, they 've found their latest foothold: Special Elections in Florida. **

They're working hard to fill these two open House seats with radical, Leftist candidates who will _put all of their efforts into halting our MAGA agenda in Congress. _

**Nancy Pelosi and liberal billionaires are scheming as we speak: could funnel COUNTLESS dark money dollars into winning these critical Special Elections to slow down Trump 's agenda. **

If we want to make sure that the Left doesn't stop Trump's legislative priorities, we MUST save these seats. _But the damage isn 't done yet, Friend_! We have enough time to stop Pelosi's scheme before it becomes a dismal reality.

name: Governor Glenn Youngkin
subject: Seriously, there could not be a better person!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6i180gqc4vkuubjrk46oajriimapdfh3l8do8uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji62o73cth2bs "Glenn Youngkin")
---
It's Governor Glenn Youngkin and I have an important announcement to share with you.

In 2021, Winsome Earle-Sears and I ran for Virginia's highest offices. We fought to defend parents' rights, back the blue and our military, and get Virginia's economy and jobs moving again. Together, we've worked as a team to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

I'm so proud of the work we have done. _But I 'm writing to you today not because our mission is over but because it's just beginning. _

**Next year, Winsome will lead Republicans to a crucial victory in November and keep Virginia on the path to prosperity!**

**[I'm proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbfmgf5vgsfg2jktfiei57h1gpn8qppeh2g3hvp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji62o73cth2bs "I’m proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. name: Tony Johnson
subject: Defend the vision of our Founding Fathers
body:
As a fellow conservative, you likely already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far left.

| | |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl1t2t2g4jjqcrdrivmfc84gp40mhqa2tl517fi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji62o77cth2bs)
---
| | | Hello, As a fellow conservative, you likely already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world to promise freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance; **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain **[free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ltbgjttv9iinpbisi902j0eti9dldb524kuoo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji62o77cth2bs)** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu8fl37mve0lo0fb6krbonrf1dcsbrggs8egb8r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji62o77cth2bs) In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives—they want government-controlled health care, higher taxes and redistribution of wealth in the form of socialism, increased regulations, to do away with the Electoral College, and for open borders. It is for this reason that we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, the freedoms promised to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it promises to us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by clicking this link today? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: **[https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk5pognlh4ingfs4dfbvu94bqeqsl4f62jb1bg2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji62o77cth2bs)** This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the far-Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv4mii0ok7ha3q9g3jau6b7jq7liui9vjk0dillo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji62o77cth2bs) Thank you, Tony Johnson Director of Membership
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zng28de0vlts100tr2465a67m9mblqorhuo1aur8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji62o77cth2bs)

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn3f3525m8htstn2ph6q06umneepmd0v9s8ukd70_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu04ma0qmpug1pqpgn3nstgevth98bmb0pbk7tjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zohhcusu9j7uem6qs6mbpkuof3s4ap09edalmhto_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztvse4e2isvgfn4vd0s2ib8ma961bdl000fh4s50_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmrei8mdaio1enen7aic11q299ofm91idifp8gl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj4hp8vsdsj1faeq60v9g0oli15qnbr03e8ltga0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8iplod8c3he2fq4o9lrv5hs2vcdavallu7ip8mg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgrshk9btncjdq2tojjqs26h89gc10spad7arpo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv3jbicrjavv97fbdh3jerspnj6bg3nh6694ure0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znoukj04jn8qr2srbrrogog37lo48vvkd5h03m4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c5h2bs)

Your America

subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zabjrp7774tpgs2v2nseht40tqr492qgucdvnuh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c9h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z37au7g6jvjofvj47jo3obogfur7htnb2nblmf6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c9h2bs) [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zc2jr130ioqho63v08797sd1g4c9i76vj7kcfsb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c9h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm0k0bgue6iouuijk8mttagsloe1k9535jcg2vt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cji66or2c9h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “Calls for Giuliani to be held in contempt ofcourt”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
“He’s not going to be permitted to speak.”

| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaa01g47ek1gae8eqrcg8n7siic28ja1ot4bo550_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjh64o34c5h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly **_“hold me in contempt.”_**
---
Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – _yours truly_ – bankrupt and behind bars.
---
During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, __I will not be permitted to speak.__
---
It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech.
---
But I will _never_ _surrender_ this battle, _because**freedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for.**_
---
They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom!
---
**With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you.**
---
_Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can keep fighting for my rights and freedom against the Left’s vicious witch hunt.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv9df2325bopmu6itl943a7ep49lk9tbs7asd4ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjh64o34c5h2bs)

# **
Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying Realities!**
The purchasing power of the US dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the government's promises of financial stability crumble before your own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and[**take immediate action to protect your wealth**.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zovbde9707mhdjih9ab45bjgk2bpa1ifkar3bbho_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjh64o34c5h2bs) The solution lies in the timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall Street don’t want you to have.

For years, the government has insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but the truth is far from what they would have us believe.
The silent erosion of the dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently devaluing.

It's time to expose the deception and **[take decisive steps toward securing your financial future.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmol59eknoft5bsp5m9k8uoksdfd1rnaq3tl09m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjh64o34c5h2bs)**

**The signs of the dollar's decline are impossible to ignore**. Inflation is soaring and the cost of everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control.

The government's assurances that this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term financial security. **It doesn’t stop there.** Amidst all the lies and chaos, President Biden snuck in Executive Order 14067. The Digital Dollar, poised to roll out soon, is the Fed’s sinister attempt to **[end privacy as you know it by tracking and controlling your every financial move](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4flbc2203b9g8phortsn2dtu69d57biv3fjf6u8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjh64o34c5h2bs)**[.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z737g4e21roi3t4p15ecuaah57mtju9p6dmq00fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjh64o34c5h2bs)

**Imagine a world** where every aspect of your financial transactions is meticulously recorded, scrutinized, and controlled by the government. The Digital Dollar, **[as outlined in the Executive Order](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znnr5vqpadicb0uf59mhff08052brgps15gunc7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjh64o34c5h2bs),** is portrayed under a sinister guise of convenience with instantaneous access to funds via our phones that are ironically under constant full surveillance.

This shift grants unprecedented powers to the central authorities, jeopardizing the very essence of your privacy. **It is a grave threat that you cannot afford to ignore.
**
**Your personal choices will no longer be yours to make.** The consequences are profound. The government can dictate how you spend your money, monitor your purchases, and potentially freeze your assets at will. The very essence of **[your personal freedom is at stake.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zku95ce0rvj4advj5dkun59a0bq0lc0r1luarmqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjh64o34c5h2bs)** **[Act now with urgency](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm9044a2ta0jh604qkn4af7euc5jm9q3t52t96gg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjh64o34c5h2bs)** to embark on a journey toward financial liberation where you not only Preserve, Protect, and maintain your Privacy but reclaim the peace of mind that has been mercilessly stolen from you.
