subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc-O3CAMh5_GuWUEhoXhwKFVOre00mqkHpEDZAYt-SMgW_Xtq6xa7bVH25_82fr9HN1IKaf18Z2WaFtprlRXFid3ar3oA_3u61HeHTKUPceec8e7YKXGIFQXLddCGGZeNOueVs2TkT5GrYmhN8wEpVUMs5FBa0VTl-y5hyPn7CqVMJcXxv0UOGM6XFFRBMkox9LqpT1jifsx5eRpbZGWi9-WLttna3sF8QXwBnhrhfxbWh8Xn5N_q62kPfKTBLzRPDsP4rbNcywuBRADsqsCVOfko-bMSEBVt6P4CGL4tlDKf4F6TCCG17G_v977f2cDKo8ghn3bOTKOkj5pAWIQ4w9u1P2zKUEMoL-2Qmsl39K2nmY9dMWG_VfKOVWlQbLHaf54sf1vCu8W_wQAAP__TyOJNw), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc-O3CAMh5_GuWUEhoXhwKFVOre00mqkHpEDZAYt-SMgW_Xtq6xa7bVH25_82fr9HN1IKaf18Z2WaFtprlRXFid3ar3oA_3u61HeHTKUPceec8e7YKXGIFQXLddCGGZeNOueVs2TkT5GrYmhN8wEpVUMs5FBa0VTl-y5hyPn7CqVMJcXxv0UOGM6XFFRBMkox9LqpT1jifsx5eRpbZGWi9-WLttna3sF8QXwBnhrhfxbWh8Xn5N_q62kPfKTBLzRPDsP4rbNcywuBRADsqsCVOfko-bMSEBVt6P4CGL4tlDKf4F6TCCG17G_v977f2cDKo8ghn3bOTKOkj5pAWIQ4w9u1P2zKUEMoL-2Qmsl39K2nmY9dMWG_VfKOVWlQbLHaf54sf1vCu8W_wQAAP__TyOJNw) [](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc-O3CAMh5_GuWUEhoXhwKFVOre00mqkHpEDZAYt-SMgW_Xtq6xa7bVH25_82fr9HN1IKaf18Z2WaFtprlRXFid3ar3oA_3u61HeHTKUPceec8e7YKXGIFQXLddCGGZeNOueVs2TkT5GrYmhN8wEpVUMs5FBa0VTl-y5hyPn7CqVMJcXxv0UOGM6XFFRBMkox9LqpT1jifsx5eRpbZGWi9-WLttna3sF8QXwBnhrhfxbWh8Xn5N_q62kPfKTBLzRPDsP4rbNcywuBRADsqsCVOfko-bMSEBVt6P4CGL4tlDKf4F6TCCG17G_v977f2cDKo8ghn3bOTKOkj5pAWIQ4w9u1P2zKUEMoL-2Qmsl39K2nmY9dMWG_VfKOVWlQbLHaf54sf1vCu8W_wQAAP__TyOJNw) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc-O3CAMh5_GuWUEhoXhwKFVOre00mqkHpEDZAYt-SMgW_Xtq6xa7bVH25_82fr9HN1IKaf18Z2WaFtprlRXFid3ar3oA_3u61HeHTKUPceec8e7YKXGIFQXLddCGGZeNOueVs2TkT5GrYmhN8wEpVUMs5FBa0VTl-y5hyPn7CqVMJcXxv0UOGM6XFFRBMkox9LqpT1jifsx5eRpbZGWi9-WLttna3sF8QXwBnhrhfxbWh8Xn5N_q62kPfKTBLzRPDsP4rbNcywuBRADsqsCVOfko-bMSEBVt6P4CGL4tlDKf4F6TCCG17G_v977f2cDKo8ghn3bOTKOkj5pAWIQ4w9u1P2zKUEMoL-2Qmsl39K2nmY9dMWG_VfKOVWlQbLHaf54sf1vCu8W_wQAAP__TyOJNw) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc-O3CAMh5_GuWUEhoXhwKFVOre00mqkHpEDZAYt-SMgW_Xtq6xa7bVH25_82fr9HN1IKaf18Z2WaFtprlRXFid3ar3oA_3u61HeHTKUPceec8e7YKXGIFQXLddCGGZeNOueVs2TkT5GrYmhN8wEpVUMs5FBa0VTl-y5hyPn7CqVMJcXxv0UOGM6XFFRBMkox9LqpT1jifsx5eRpbZGWi9-WLttna3sF8QXwBnhrhfxbWh8Xn5N_q62kPfKTBLzRPDsP4rbNcywuBRADsqsCVOfko-bMSEBVt6P4CGL4tlDKf4F6TCCG17G_v977f2cDKo8ghn3bOTKOkj5pAWIQ4w9u1P2zKUEMoL-2Qmsl39K2nmY9dMWG_VfKOVWlQbLHaf54sf1vCu8W_wQAAP__TyOJNw)

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

Charles
Dickens, a very great novelist, had a special gift for revealing
important truths in delightful ways through unforgettable
characters.

To mark
this holiday season, Hillsdale College released an online course
on what is perhaps Dickens' most beloved novel: A Christmas
Carol.

The
course is taught by the excellent Dwight Lindley, an English
professor here at Hillsdale who loves both reading Dickens and
teaching Dickens.

In this
six-lecture course, Dwight will help you understand more fully
the causes of Ebenezer Scrooge's conversion in the novel and what
the story teaches us about leading a happy and complete life.

You can
use the secure link below to begin experiencing the wisdom and
fun of A Christmas Carol today.

family and friends know of this free online course as well. We
hope it will add meaning and joy to your Christmas celebrations.

Best
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2L3DAMhn-NcstgSVllfPChJZ1bWlgKPRrHdmbdzRe2Z8v--5LSstceJb3oeXh_jHZ0aUnb_atbo8mrzcXm1XaHqy23wb235ZHfLCnqWqQW0WITjGjqr9hEgz2zRkalmhcTNQo9TSgkQeOVWXQfeJ5YtOo7dE0y5x8kRKU7UXJ5chIUkoo-CLKeoFM5Ho9pSd5tq_u551TfL1uszWJeaj0K8CegG9CtZudf03a_-CX511JzOiJe_L4C3dw8Ww982-c5ZpsC8EDqKkByXv7MpwCQlP2RfQQevqwuLX8D5TEBD89j-zy2_3yBxBPwcOwHkkLq3EeYgQcev6GW7x_LDniA_nPNbivO17RvJ7gfmmzC8SstSyrSQ6fuJ_j0bup_tv9m6HcAAAD__7CihCI) [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2L3DAMhn-NcstgSVllfPChJZ1bWlgKPRrHdmbdzRe2Z8v--5LSstceJb3oeXh_jHZ0aUnb_atbo8mrzcXm1XaHqy23wb235ZHfLCnqWqQW0WITjGjqr9hEgz2zRkalmhcTNQo9TSgkQeOVWXQfeJ5YtOo7dE0y5x8kRKU7UXJ5chIUkoo-CLKeoFM5Ho9pSd5tq_u551TfL1uszWJeaj0K8CegG9CtZudf03a_-CX511JzOiJe_L4C3dw8Ww982-c5ZpsC8EDqKkByXv7MpwCQlP2RfQQevqwuLX8D5TEBD89j-zy2_3yBxBPwcOwHkkLq3EeYgQcev6GW7x_LDniA_nPNbivO17RvJ7gfmmzC8SstSyrSQ6fuJ_j0bup_tv9m6HcAAAD__7CihCI) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2L3DAMhn-NcstgSVllfPChJZ1bWlgKPRrHdmbdzRe2Z8v--5LSstceJb3oeXh_jHZ0aUnb_atbo8mrzcXm1XaHqy23wb235ZHfLCnqWqQW0WITjGjqr9hEgz2zRkalmhcTNQo9TSgkQeOVWXQfeJ5YtOo7dE0y5x8kRKU7UXJ5chIUkoo-CLKeoFM5Ho9pSd5tq_u551TfL1uszWJeaj0K8CegG9CtZudf03a_-CX511JzOiJe_L4C3dw8Ww982-c5ZpsC8EDqKkByXv7MpwCQlP2RfQQevqwuLX8D5TEBD89j-zy2_3yBxBPwcOwHkkLq3EeYgQcev6GW7x_LDniA_nPNbivO17RvJ7gfmmzC8SstSyrSQ6fuJ_j0bup_tv9m6HcAAAD__7CihCI) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2L3DAMhn-NcstgSVllfPChJZ1bWlgKPRrHdmbdzRe2Z8v--5LSstceJb3oeXh_jHZ0aUnb_atbo8mrzcXm1XaHqy23wb235ZHfLCnqWqQW0WITjGjqr9hEgz2zRkalmhcTNQo9TSgkQeOVWXQfeJ5YtOo7dE0y5x8kRKU7UXJ5chIUkoo-CLKeoFM5Ho9pSd5tq_u551TfL1uszWJeaj0K8CegG9CtZudf03a_-CX511JzOiJe_L4C3dw8Ww982-c5ZpsC8EDqKkByXv7MpwCQlP2RfQQevqwuLX8D5TEBD89j-zy2_3yBxBPwcOwHkkLq3EeYgQcev6GW7x_LDniA_nPNbivO17RvJ7gfmmzC8SstSyrSQ6fuJ_j0bup_tv9m6HcAAAD__7CihCI)

clean_body: When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." Republican Majority PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: We need to talk about healthcare...
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vpcew-nbnszm-kyd76rh8/)
---
# **We need to talk about healthcare...**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vpcew-nbnszn-kyd76rh9/)
---
| | | | folks, The recent death of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson has sent shockwaves through the country. While the media has gone into a frenzy about catching the suspect, an undeniable truth has emerged: the growing dissatisfaction with America’s healthcare system. The online reactions to his death are disturbing, yet they reflect a deep-seated frustration with an industry that has repeatedly failed to provide people with the care they desperately need. Americans, particularly those struggling to access healthcare, have openly expressed their anger towards the very industry Thompson represented. Social media was flooded with cynical comments mocking the tragedy, with some suggesting that Thompson’s demise was justified, given his company’s role in perpetuating an unjust system. This system has led to financial hardship, pain for the working class, and even death when people's cases are denied. These remarks, though dark and unsettling, are symptomatic of a larger problem—**the immense power and unchecked behavior of insurance companies in the U.S.** Take the example of UnitedHealthcare, the company Thompson led. The insurance giant has an alarming 32% denial rate for claims—far above the industry average. These denials disproportionately affect the most vulnerable among us, those who are already facing dire health situations. In a ProPublica investigation, it was revealed that UnitedHealthcare used algorithms to deny mental health care based on arbitrary, cost-driven targets. This isn’t an isolated incident; it’s a pervasive pattern of behavior that has left countless patients without the care they need. And yet, this is the system that is allowed to persist, despite widespread outrage. Time and again, r**eform efforts have been thwarted by powerful industry groups,** including the very insurance companies that profit from the status quo. The political opposition to meaningful healthcare reform, driven by corporate interests, has been a constant force in blocking change for nearly a century. We are constantly told that the system needs to be maintained to keep costs down, but it’s clear that the current approach is neither effective nor humane. Americans are faced with a stark reality: if they don’t have the right insurance plan or aren’t able to navigate the maze of red tape, they simply won’t get the care they need. [**_It’s time for this system to change. The murder of Brian Thompson, while tragic, serves as a reminder of the broken system that thrives on denying care and making a profit off the misfortune of others. We cannot continue to allow insurance companies to prioritize profits over people’s lives. The call for a healthcare system that works for everyone is louder than ever—let’s answer it._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vpcew-nbnszo-kyd76rh0/)
---
| [Chip in $25](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vpcew-nbnszp-kyd76rh1/)
---

Thank you for your help on this pressing matter, -No Dem Left Behind Team

Social media was flooded with cynical comments mocking the tragedy, with some suggesting that Thompson’s demise was justified, given his company’s role in perpetuating an unjust system. This system has led to financial hardship, pain for the working class, and even death when people's cases are denied. These remarks, though dark and unsettling, are symptomatic of a larger problem—the immense power and unchecked behavior of insurance companies in the U.S. Take the example of UnitedHealthcare, the company Thompson led. The insurance giant has an alarming 32% denial rate for claims—far above the industry average. These denials disproportionately affect the most vulnerable among us, those who are already facing dire health situations. In a ProPublica investigation, it was revealed that UnitedHealthcare used algorithms to deny mental health care based on arbitrary, cost-driven targets. This isn’t an isolated incident; it’s a pervasive pattern of behavior that has left countless patients without the care they need. And yet, this is the system that is allowed to persist, despite widespread outrage. Time and again, reform efforts have been thwarted by powerful industry groups, including the very insurance companies that profit from the status quo. The political opposition to meaningful healthcare reform, driven by corporate interests, has been a constant force in blocking change for nearly a century. We are constantly told that the system needs to be maintained to keep costs down, but it’s clear that the current approach is neither effective nor humane. Americans are faced with a stark reality: if they don’t have the right insurance plan or aren’t able to navigate the maze of red tape, they simply won’t get the care they need. | | | | Thank you for your help on this pressing matter, -No Dem Left Behind Team | | | | | ONE donation to No Dem Left Behind supports winning the critical rural votes that decide the outcome in EVERY major battleground. Maximize your impact this cycle → No Dem Left Behind PAC P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003 | You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to modify your or .

It's Governor Glenn Youngkin and I have an important announcement to share with you.

In 2021, Winsome Earle-Sears and I ran for Virginia's highest offices. We fought to defend parents' rights, back the blue and our military, and get Virginia's economy and jobs moving again. Together, we've worked as a team to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

I'm so proud of the work we have done. _But I 'm writing to you today not because our mission is over but because it's just beginning. _

**Next year, Winsome will lead Republicans to a crucial victory in November and keep Virginia on the path to prosperity!**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This email breaks a lot of the rules
body:
Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uEE_VLLqmI8pVwZIVZGgxQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpO_z0P0RiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9nb2xkd2F0ZXItaW5zdGl0dXRlL3BhLWFjdGlvbi1jcnV6P3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIxMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1vZ3RXA3NwY0IKZ1XFbVlned1X71IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vNOuV9GCfgbF3iwrFiBzoA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPAYOP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIxMVcDc3BjQgpnVZtuWWd2HHklUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vNOuV9GCfgbF3iwrFiBzoA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPAYOP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTIxMVcDc3BjQgpnVZtuWWd2HHklUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0ad9d82656640b0b086f47f23f855a5&_e=8ZwKPk2E4CaOSuSSHTCvt3lqm7ez6e4tMPF5k3PQQcTzAZwHsYt0x-QBfCKCLlozZXz7BPu1myad71ObFiWrF-R7j_sEIOLB26mCAwKZwn1y98QbdUdWYGe7DdCifLjW2UxES044sY4iD6GzsRz7vgWWYKiciY7LL2VRFebmsD6wPhQUmuDytJRPPQXJwJ-fmBr2NmnaWaAF3AC5q5K55qUwZGFOdalxB0TO0moXAJ4P2K4qYptw_rRb_EpwvoRrTJyoIJiQBs87vvVErSNxUZ_Awgf4IzO6EFFgC3NdRT4%3D)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
**Defending Parental Rights** While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0ad9d82656640b0b086f47f23f855a5&_e=8ZwKPk2E4CaOSuSSHTCvt3lqm7ez6e4tMPF5k3PQQcTzAZwHsYt0x-QBfCKCLlozZXz7BPu1myad71ObFiWrF-R7j_sEIOLB26mCAwKZwn1y98QbdUdWYGe7DdCifLjW2UxES044sY4iD6GzsRz7vssPEYajj-X05tOoYrDRRVG2cMDQkxgrJtXcjwpVG9WNx7CpllUAW9FKYCgsiGV8nrcx3rLWH1XCvN8Th8HpAi7FtKbKuf5dlC_-apsd5_uTKCrJ7irSms-SRFXNvRxVjOjEXf2_kQptS_oMYS55ILE%3D)

**School Choice** Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

clean_body: Please forgive me for sending you a long email. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute’s exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It’s so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute’s latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn’t have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don’t have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. | | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74b46371ed4c4bfeb5a72f21953bcc78&_e=9xPzUfv-MXy7C-ekY8fhrNlsN-OG8L_U9GPLlY_ZDp6GAjxANRxo5leRleHY3k2F1J76VsTSOgjoiSptiHAJqUQDV4PEVZXeJD4hUlWC16al2tKIfQSSnD4fhAzH7VTWWZu2QV3p5lIlgAISn20Pb1WV-ScXyqSuoRkgMGPv-u2Qpt5SE5bybE2DTZDB3yWMjqVLMohVq6-V4v3tD7A5r8GAwT38YgJvYh9tqvg6sLubhImRBrTdZd6kiGzH4XhdLGxcur9BB-2MmAOdgKW2QCHk52DNvlJQlLhvBzoTzuBJ8leltUil5J0u8dp5UdwFIHVl3jDKvh5Au9QPq9hKfwaV9UIE5_YCe9Mk7qh6LSQpyf-t_Lev3tgy23mmnH-q)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74b46371ed4c4bfeb5a72f21953bcc78&_e=9xPzUfv-MXy7C-ekY8fhrNlsN-OG8L_U9GPLlY_ZDp6GAjxANRxo5leRleHY3k2F1J76VsTSOgjoiSptiHAJqUQDV4PEVZXeJD4hUlWC16al2tKIfQSSnD4fhAzH7VTWWZu2QV3p5lIlgAISn20Pb1WV-ScXyqSuoRkgMGPv-u2Qpt5SE5bybE2DTZDB3yWMjqVLMohVq6-V4v3tD7A5r8GAwT38YgJvYh9tqvg6sLvkTk_bVR5XXbhZ7kkTmzy9nhOMn4oajAjmY2GtU1XdHAR8it9n4Whs3b_4Q5RsnO2dlmOonTTKKabCk68bjkIGIIf6xfpA16bqkSmiqfHdgY23609loRVi0auf6CTVPWb5c8vJe1IZu54hlL2KtgNW)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

body:
A two-year Department of Public Safety (DPS) investigation unraveled an organized retail theft ring involving at least 10 people operating across four states. So far, two suspects—Brian Keith Fleming, 33, and Ladarion Dontre Anderson, 33, both of Lancaster—have been arrested.

# Wednesday, December 11, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1839, diplomat [James Treat](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FyrCAUANCvgU6He2VBCorX2O1rUzooFyVB2QFm3f37TNLnB87M-bjPdxdTPLf_7iDbXiHPKFB2gB3A7F1M71lybxfhDXCyoIfBgFIS-G5VQJI-aEliJaVXCONKaHTwCkVYDI_2BwMEAECDqh-NhNugg18cCDfemBTkY8ulbzs1erka0js_qfRrPniye2uPyoZ_DCeG03Vdfau7y2eKJ_W5bAyn3Z1-yfmL4URnK5Eqw6kVcq37dAdVXqx_XDGlWJVmUmyHi-mXb39-nxa_AwAA__-aJljb) arrived in Mexico City to negotiate for official recognition of the Republic of Texas. Today's edition highlights several tech-focused stories, including [autonomous robots](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_u3CAQhJ8Gd1gsxv8KijTuLm1KC5vlvBJnTrAxd28fOf2vm5FGo0_fn8f6cBTpfP52L7T8CWnVShsJWgKs3lH8rqbxdlN-hgYtjF03wzAYaA47wWxGE3AfJ1R92HunNt9NqlfzaPYNGrL3GWgAAD3roZ1mA303Br85UG7qhVHoiVNu-UDGjyshftOFud3Tq4n2YH4X0f0SehF6qbW2IX3MibXcA6GXOwq9FIxB-kwXnU-Z05a4yIOY7-pTPTnVU3oXoyuycEbkIv9umCU6LtJjpAszYWmy9e9KMVIZRmHU8-Uo_mfhH-VcVv8LAAD__7o9adQ), a real estate company's use of AI, and a world-record drone show. Check out our coverage below, then reply to let us know if you think technology is taking over our lives! We're sponsored today by [American Hartford Gold](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kT1v2zAQhn8Ntckg72R9DBqCukI7OFPRjsJZd5QJkKJBUU7y7wslTtGh5fjw5fHBe7_O45mcd8v8TEH6_GrjCBqq0kBpzMjk_NtYFdxfNHemkN40iJ2p68oU154ZNU7U1B1WCB22nW6hrY8XIcTJdIXr92EGjDEGOqgPbVeZIzaWL2Q0tUdVaWGXYzrkq2R5pdX6t3iXdJhiKHx_zfm2KnxSMCgYorWS1gMFSW6i5Uop25h4jp73vIJBAjn_mVQw2CRSzptjUTBwydF7SuUluWndR-LghXiNW5pE4enrx-t6y2H8A-UvGITdFhSeHpZrflwsFOQfOEva03sBUD3YFJcsS1Z44g-d8V1n_AmfP9uJwo3cvCg8Ndo83_V-vp1f8pfvTz-K1PPtxXnv1rpRlZ53v_e68n_3d-_hdwAAAP__FZWetw). Check them out in today's edition.

## School Personnel Accused of Planting Vape Pen on Students
Former Corpus Christi ISD police officer Andrew Gonzalez and Amanda Lee Corona, a former middle school assistant principal, have been arrested for [allegedly framing students](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuunTAQheGnMd0gjzEXFy7S0J20KZEv480o5iLjwNlvH-30qZf0aen_9bV8Oc68v366jWz9TseipNKAChCX6Di_F91E62U02JDFsesMDoPGZrVajr0hmdLU9z1ikEhIPnkTpY86mobtB0OFiKiMGtrJaOy7MUXvULqpF1pS5HqUtq5U6dtdKb-Pm0objq3Jdq31vET3Q6hZqPl5nvY3M9f7Mws1u1I5ZBJq3um5hJrzEVwWag6BrwhHShyogCuFrkoR6hogcc4U4XYnwUk7pOI23l9w1T-R9vpRetkBuSmh7DwMUWnQZtDgZYfgSWManCdtQlNsPB_Oma9hFFq-Nsf53_P635S3VX8DAAD__-NNdQM) by planting a THC-filled vape pen among their belongings. In March of last year, after a vape pen was found behind a filing cabinet during a routine backpack search, Gonzalez and Corona allegedly [conspired to place the pen in a student’s backpack](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPhCAUhH8NdhgeurgWFNfY7bVXGoSnvhyCAVZ3__3Fy7VXzkxmMvm-HuPDkKewfJoNdXnNcZRCthwkBxidIf8e28rpSbgeKtTQNU0PSrVQrdoIMynXq06AVKK_qRYUOHtXE0rTNa4ifY2BBACQvVT1vW_h1nSzmwwIc7-xVqCjElNdViz4Mnn273hgqm3cKq_XUvbMmg8mByaH8zzr70S5HFfM5BDwzEwOPlrj-Z-gwN_xmXhAWtYppjVGx-RgY9qfmdv16tNlrCYt6Pgc04aJW0vZ8T16ssjjPJPFxI21z4yOx5nv3oRCYeF4kMNgsUra7Sd5T1l1rBXLZsj_3i7_cjy0_AkAAP__gzJ4qQ), according to an audio recording obtained from a student’s cell phone. The same vape pen was [found in another student’s binder](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOtCAUBeCnwQ7jvSBIQfE3dvO3W5rrgCMJigF2HN9-M9Ntse3JyZeT83WbbhRi2B__afO2vpY0YYeSA3KAyVGI1yQbZ-fOGWi8BS2EAaUkNKsV1A9OD7PpF5qd9tqRUwidEIJQD30T7BsDBABAg6odjIRe6MXNBB0NPZOdd6Gm3NbVV_-issQrPX1u72lrol1rPQoT_xiODMfzPNvtKrTTXtMe0rvEcNz9WRiOJX3XlX8QhiPlGu7R_875kw7PD79zytmXWjgYoxCkao_1aLJ1xxliDEVpJrvHRiF-htQ_n3la_AkAAP__FPhmjA). Both students said the vape pen belonged to a third student. All three students were disciplined. “ _I'm mad, you know, mad that you did this to my son. You ruined the trust that I had for the teachers, for the principals, for the vice principals_ ,” said the mother of one of the students.
## Thieves Steal $400K of Legos
A two-year Department of Public Safety (DPS) investigation [unraveled an organized retail theft ring](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2uozAQxfGnMZ2RZzAfLlxs4-5uuyUyeAxWTIxgEpK3XyX9rY_009H_38_441NO9-Wv38jyK5YRFWoJKAHG4FN-j7oKdlLBQEUW-qYx0HUaqtXSgDNN8zBEE3uYms70uml9E_2s24BUJfvBAAEA0GBXD0ZD2_QxTB6UH1qhFYXE5ah5JaaXP2N-lycd9Vy2KtuVeT9F80egE-iu66pvmZ-fUaD72AIdoECnjED3BaR_8FqOxIlOyWXfM0mt1E1uj8xJnuyZZKalSF4psjzSfRHoqsOG_Uo5p7PrhVbL5lP-vuBfszwt_g8AAP__CKFj6w) involving at least 10 people operating across four states. So far, two suspects—Brian Keith Fleming, 33, and Ladarion Dontre Anderson, 33, both of Lancaster—have been arrested. The scheme involved stealing Lego sets from Walmart and Target stores and reselling them online through platforms like Amazon and eBay. The thieves [provided altered receipts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvozAQhH-N6RZ51wbiguIaunftldFiL8GSiSPbF9779yfS39SjbzTfn6_7F8cUn4_ffMjcvrd8J00WkADxHjimn7vtwrzq4LCTGSdjHI6jxW6frbtp2vwghswkxk2rnQQprHobgluxi_MFQ0JEJEdjf3MWBzNtYWXUfBuU1RJiy6VvuzT55rqln_yW0vt8dGneW3tVZX4pWhQt53n2fq3o-vZWtHBp0SdRtDzlrIqWlD0nRQsBlyK1SYAtF7D6CiR5ZGi7bA1KfD4gHi_2V0e4NviMQ225SIXcdikV2JdcK_y92INGcCMJ3_wAbuQRrHcOVuMY7MSXhaC3wXRlDq8zphTrOCmrHwfH9HnT_qv3PdO_AAAA__8vsHpV) for an equal number of lower-priced items if questioned by store employees. Investigators working with the retailers provided invoices showing that over 500 Lego sets worth $400,000 had been stolen since December 2021. Fleming was booked into the Smith County Jail on Dec. 6, and Anderson is detained at the Tarrant County Corrections Center. The bond for each suspect has been set at $1.1 million.
## Austin, Houston Most Fun Cities in Texas
Austin and Houston have been named among the [top 10 “Most Fun Cities in America,”](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGu4yAQheGnwR0WM2YwLii2ocu2W1oYcIwWh8iQOHn7q6S_9ZE-Hf3_LvPFpZxu179uj6a91jKjQMkBOcAcXMrvWXbBLCJM0EUD4zBMoJSEbjNqpWHxcQIdBhwXdHECjMqLSOhG0l0yHwwQAAAnVL2eJNAwrmFxIJwmJkUMqZWjb1ts8eXqmt_lGY_el73LZmvtXtnwh6FlaM_z7P9v5fEZGVp3tORzZGhv8awMbS7eZYb2CzG0e6mNr48b96mlWPmj8pxqY2hREydSkvyiuKcVuKSAXEtNfNUTkRBCaS-6w4T7mXJOVY1MiuvuUv5-a7_Gehr8CQAA__85kWgB) according to WalletHub. The study analyzed 182 cities across 65 key metrics, including options for entertainment, recreation, nightlife, and parties. [Austin ranked sixth overall](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAURL8GOizuheBQULzGXV67pYUNxGgxRAbHzt-vEm271RSjmaPzdRtvNqaY7__t6k07QxmRo2SADGB0NqbXKKkzE3caqDfQC6FBKQl0MWJCN3HrhbQ9h0k6rWcZ4OKDmp0KQKN5nwECAKBG1V21hIvog5sscHu9EMm9i61sXVt886etIb3K02_dXFaazNLaoxLxj-BAcDiOo_s-bX6XBIfsj0pw-Mx-M1cWK7N7bTGzsrGl7LWVzNayeRb2THCgm3GPI6YUq-qJ5PfVxvTBtT_9nwZ_AgAA__8voV4R), with a weighted score of 54.33 (out of 100), while Houston’s score of 51.64 ranked ninth. Las Vegas, Orlando, and Miami earned the top three spots. Other Texas cities receiving a better-than-average ranking include San Antonio (25th), Dallas (31st), El Paso (53rd), and Fort Worth (55th). clean_body: A two-year Department of Public Safety (DPS) investigation unraveled an organized retail theft ring involving at least 10 people operating across four states. So far, two suspects—Brian Keith Fleming, 33, and Ladarion Dontre Anderson, 33, both of Lancaster—have been arrested. | | | | | | Wednesday, December 11, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! Thieves Steal $400K of Legos A two-year Department of Public Safety (DPS) investigation involving at least 10 people operating across four states. So far, two suspects—Brian Keith Fleming, 33, and Ladarion Dontre Anderson, 33, both of Lancaster—have been arrested. The scheme involved stealing Lego sets from Walmart and Target stores and reselling them online through platforms like Amazon and eBay. The thieves for an equal number of lower-priced items if questioned by store employees. Investigators working with the retailers provided invoices showing that over 500 Lego sets worth $400,000 had been stolen since December 2021. Fleming was booked into the Smith County Jail on Dec. 6, and Anderson is detained at the Tarrant County Corrections Center. The bond for each suspect has been set at $1.1 million. Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9fd5ef1664db445783669e731232fe42&_e=wjRjarTRT9pxHYVXUH2XpRI4YZxegM08T3Mnc-g7ynJZgwsB16fsMaggIFvvRj2eDKb_ma8acYWxGB-Z515WvmMpvAL5IBJjwWVkoZJP1UXOZ6zsh5f6FqibA3RpiIeANMj_DGornwyO2Pqusf6x7BhSYnOrz47I8hKRcpEhMaO0ZL4IFYnpiBq66uFIS0SVe7SJ3kM4Tcc0AM6FozTEjoLh_75RmzSwf5f9yPFisIHj6uMarp0ZnoFqk02C2O5EqWjZCy5VZVAbkR8Zugsn4sab6SWKB-J39ZXTODqFu7Y%3D)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
**Defending Parental Rights** While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9fd5ef1664db445783669e731232fe42&_e=wjRjarTRT9pxHYVXUH2XpRI4YZxegM08T3Mnc-g7ynJZgwsB16fsMaggIFvvRj2eDKb_ma8acYWxGB-Z515WvmMpvAL5IBJjwWVkoZJP1UXOZ6zsh5f6FqibA3RpiIeANMj_DGornwyO2Pqusf6x7Gi2v5wLEI8x5z8pAxDl0bOQlb6kr9Fdi9xrKlPUCnOtf5cGi5oUMKeYdcvhRLH0kSMC6rJCetrPew3WXW3qAeIxz5G917JlNR0stZXtXsMNmoRP7X7TMsi9jfFmdFtTppq-n9m1Q56F3ibVDBUeyWU%3D)

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. clean_body: Please forgive me for sending you a long email. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it's about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn't occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won't fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They've been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here's what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter's room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber's daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it's the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute's exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It's so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute's latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** - The Goldwater Institute doesn't have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don't have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. # Wednesday, December 11, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1978, six masked individuals raided Lufthansa Airlines' cargo building at New York's JFK Airport, stealing $5 million in cash and $1 million in jewelry. The [notorious Lufthansa heist](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGu4yAQheGnwR0WMxATFxTbuMu2W1okDGGyxETAxvLbr3J121t_0tHR_-eyXjxn3u6__ZNcj2VFhUYCSoA1eM7HaobgIhGSHsiB1XoGq8xpSC7aGEkpVCcD55l8mNDGeSY1KYoR1cDuswYIAKAt2PE6abjS1dDpdialz8IoCtxLHR-Ft54o5qO8qY638hyyS72_mtC_BC4Cl33fx8Stl3p8XODSEzcZ_CF5k98icMn_Yk9-a14m4tblI_6Vnuur1C7vpYRIOfsmE231kIlzHqoLr51z5jZZYdT96Tl_Xeg_JXk7_B8AAP__oitl7A) remains one of the largest U.S. robberies. We see in our Holiday section that a lot of parents will [stay up all night Christmas Eve.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO4yAUgOGnsTssDuBLCopt3GXbLS0cDpcN5kSAgvL2o5l-XuDXr-_f_bibmGL2f82Fujk6BBeKgWAAhzUxfQ41Wu0QBcoRNaxS3mDlah6DNs7NEm9WiO1xW2De1kWBtAtwjsJtyxj1dw0EAIBcYZ3ORcKJp8L5sSGX26A42tioTP8p5hbQpQ-9sUwPusakQ2uvOsg_g9gHsffeJ09kM_aasXUqz4mKH8TeArKE2bdQ2csUzK0yT6xRN8Wyyzxj9ixQitZ8KrvwomLOhMxRYS1gLOwZbR3EPhZtXz2mFOuyDor7y8T0M9N-w3lr8RUAAP__h-ZpNw) We scoffed, until we remembered doing that once or twice ourselves. ## Panel: Trump Shooting 'Preventable'
A bipartisan House panel [report released Tuesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvgzAQBeBfYzaQ72yHdPDQhS1dO6IDLuEqgxG-hubfV3Tv8pYnfU_v89bfSJKsjw9aOOo992jR14A1QD-RpFfvqynemZFdxRFa596gtT5UcxzGgBBwBIdhnEIIFK4WyRLy1Hp2lcRTAwQAcC20zXBxMPDgOYxXtu5qvOVJNO_NV5ZVZ76nV37y3ox5qVKcVbdi3LvBzmB3HEdDP5LL2RrsTttgB3iGNdjp_r1sNZVCpchKKnmtSZWXTeudt7xrtcdpOyQlKZfWePtYSNLfmP53_hnxNwAA__-nl1rK) found that the attempted assassination of President-elect Donald Trump in July was "preventable and should not have happened." The 180-page document detailed failures by the Secret Service to properly plan, execute, and secure the site, particularly the building where the shooter fired eight shots. The report also included [25 recommendations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D-v4yAQBPBPgzssWPwvBcU17nLtlRaGJd47bCyWxMq3P-W9-tUz-mk0f-7L3VGi4_Hb7WhrzAso6KQGqfUSHKX30jXBRkRA06DVozE3PaqubzY76j72_bDG4EIIt5v3sBoPTnUK1qmPDdmPpkFrrc2ox3YdjF5x7bD3EyoziU5hoJpL-zfTUTeM6Z1fWFqf9ybZrdaThfklYBYwX9fVHqs_8OJPLmA-c6JKngXMh6uUD5cko38Wqm8B85afjLI6_idjLh5lwYSOkWWkT7XgmUuVtTz3Uzpmx0zfDsviD6cnM4yqKTacF6VEPIyiU4_dUfoaWH867GXhfwAAAP__BnhxGQ) specific to the Butler, Pennsylvania assassination attempt and 11 general recommendations for the Secret Service. Some of the [more notable recommendations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb_G3oh4gCEMDF2ypWtHC8MjeRUGC2ii_H2V7h2vrnR0dL6u69VTpnL79Du6keoquFAMBANYo6f8WtUcXUIUKGd0YKS0YLha5ruTJoioZbDxjDJptBoSWL5tMXhlIc3k3jQQAADSgDltWsKGm8IlnJHL86Q4Rhq1nb4rlXHHlF_1ge0U6j5ndx_j6JP8mMRlEhd_FHz29_UebVDIOIlLx9BwsI7tQQFZqOXWsHfW8KhtMN-7752KH1QLG-1nP9gi_cIFGAugheKYlErBbjFq9FHFZW4uHk_Kmbo2k-K33VP-cxr_NXo48RsAAP__TmFpkg) were reducing security for foreign leaders in favor of U.S. officials during the election season and moving the agency out of DHS.
## Malibu Fire Forces Evacuations
Firefighters continued battling [the wind-driven Franklin Fire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQRn-N6RwxYwdD4eIaulx7JTL2kMzFsZExRPz7VVbbbvnpk56e3r_bdHMcOd3_uhfZuuQJW9QSUAJMwXE8J90EuxAhqYYsGKUGMK2-Ng_begiawIEZrrj0FOZh6HqtuwDaoPcN2w8NEABAGTCXuVMw06zp6ntqVS90S4FrLpf_mVN90BLPfFC5-Pxqon3Uum5C_RE4ChyfNbrPIXBM9N4EjjF7F-XPWIpLz8hJLlxIUtnXuslErsiV1pVK4ERyT3xQ2biekg7nd1c5p03uKVB5u1Pg2BQb1jfHyFtnhG7vL8fx26f-1uew-BUAAP__qhFqSw) in Malibu, California, Tuesday, which has burned at least 2,667 acres so far with no containment, officials said. Thousands of residents were forced to evacuate as more than 8,100 homes and other structures were threatened, including celebrity seaside mansions, horse farms, and Pepperdine University, where students watched as flames raced down hillsides. [You can see photos of the fire and damage here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAYRJ_G7hzxATa4oLhNutx2SwvMkHwr_CNMHOXtV9l-y9FIR0fn6zbdPGde7__9AlfTNkkhdUeyI5qi5_yedBtdAiRUC0dGqZGM0H37cMJo2NFE-NkEJbRQckwURtvblEJULbsPjSQRkTJkLmFQFBA0-tlCKNtogch1K5fvjdf6QMrv7US5zNvSZveodT8a9a-R10Ze_b7idXyuzyiV54xGXl-cY-KCbvGZw7PD6eenr7yt3Y59R4m8onuufKIcXN8d0pgGeCJLfcCgE3yS6NEjmN7auS0u7i_OmY_BNFrcF8_516j-Veh08icAAP__VO5pPw). The Santa Ana winds, with gusts reaching 70 mph, are fueling the Franklin Fire, prompting meteorologists to warn that more fires could ignite before winds subside Thursday. ## Mangione Charged With Murder
A Pennsylvania judge [denied bail](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L9utDAQBPCnMR3IuzbYV7j4Grr72pTI4AU28p8T5xy5t49In2aakX4jzcd9unuOnLf_PpGra5lQom4BW4ApeI7vSTfBrURIqiEHRqkbGKn7Znd9MP1igx3MENCTnVGvvb0FNZCUdpENu0sDBABQBkw3DwpmmjX1iyWprNCSAtdydJ-Fc91pje_yoqNbSmqi22t9PIX6J3AUOJ7n2S15Xq5S4HjRAkfAK6TAMX7xxm3yeeOSqaXvevjAlUtu54N9bute0uNZcrfXFJvDhcfJMfJzMELLLXmOv7v1rx9eDn8CAAD__8aqXrw) for Luigi Mangione, now charged with the murder of United Healthcare CEO Brian Thompson, and sent him back to jail while he fights extradition to New York. Pennsylvania now has [30 days to obtain](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQBb_GdEb2rjlI4SIN3aVNiYxZ7I2MfQLfofv7iPTpnvSkGWm-79PdceIcvtxGtq5lAgVGapBaT4vj9J5Ms9iVCAgbsrpH_NC9Ml0TLTlD3ngwgANi5_HWeadUjyt1w4zQsL1oGrTWGnvdt_MN9Uyzoc4PpHAQRtHCteztT-FcI63pXV60t75sTbKx1sch8FPAKGA8z7P185HpPK5fwHhNAWN6cmC5uRy4ZJI-uj3QIp-ZKy2RXKrRu52kpyKPWErlHASMzW6Xx8kp8XHrhVFhc5z-zPW_Ei8LvwEAAP__nblhtQ) a warrant from Gov. Kathy Hochul before Mangione can answer charges in New York. [Mangione was arraigned](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGunDAQRb8GulnhMSxsQZGG7qVNuTJ4wJNnPCt7WMLfR5s-7b3Skc759fX8chw5bT_dTqOu8sQGWzAIxjy943g929qPKxGSrWk0vbUP0zdtV4dxmVvvHzjQfV6XwdsHusYjNv3czatvsObxQzNojDG2N_1tvlsz09xStwzU2KFqG_Kskm-_hZMGWuMlb8q3RfY6jkH1VSr7o8Kpwuk8z9vlgsjnrXBKdJYKp8hvqnA6Eiv5QC5qWFwmWEigBBHltMHx8k6pQDx4Y9hd2lgSwUUxFpBDC3uCRY6sQY5C4AoEgkL0XUAFVt6CAv3R7DwrS_qMiU64JH-DJNiP7CnDElzeqIB52A6HbmhvQfdY59G_To6Ry72v2mbbHcd_ivq_5O8R_wYAAP__HDGJGg) Monday in Pennsylvania on charges of forgery, carrying a gun without a license, falsely identifying himself, and tampering with records, in addition to the murder charge from New York prosecutors. The sensational nature of the case, reflecting anger at health insurers, has [inspired several online sellers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAUAL8GOwwPULSguMZur73SID7l3SFskF2zf3_Z66-eZDKZr9t8cxQp7Z_uQFu3PEshNQfJAebVUXzNulnthihRNWjBKDWCEbprgh1cvyB0AsTqt06MxqvRGOjMqLfeDWtD9m0DCQCgDJh26RUsuGjs_IBCDUwLXKnm0n5nSjXgFl_5iaX1-WiiDbXeT6Y-mJyYnK7ratPiE17nmzM5VfSByYlSxZKwMjk9ElVceUAXa_CuIPeY-Q_FiIWfj_OOvvIDiw88Pmgnfri0U07Ii08OBqW1bopd7xfFSGdvmBb74Sj-FdX_Dj2t_A0AAP__IddprQ) to list merchandise connected to the shooting, including fake bullets and Christmas ornaments bearing the words “Deny,” “Defend,” and “Depose.”

East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. **[Be Doers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1uwyAUAODTwBbL70FCMjBkKEOlZKmqdLP4eRAqbCyCHOX2Vbv3Ap_03S7TxeaSl3S1M-ke64Qjyh3gDmAKNpfXJHnQkQhJcNKghDiBGuWe37UPJ3TCWYrgg9pDBIiK7CGSt0565Fn_aoAAAEKBGtxBgCMnae-PNIojkyOF3Gsbvmte-p1iedWN2uDrzIu-974-mDgzNAxNylte0vCsrQRfF09tGWpLDM1qEzE05vN6u7x9vH-dDW86rM9cSn4cFJNjmm0uf2r_b7lp_AkAAP__QQ1Utg)** We’re asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. The 180-page document detailed failures by the Secret Service to properly plan, execute, and secure the site, particularly the building where the shooter fired eight shots. The report also included specific to the Butler, Pennsylvania assassination attempt and 11 general recommendations for the Secret Service. Some of the were reducing security for foreign leaders in favor of U.S. officials during the election season and moving the agency out of DHS. Malibu Fire Forces Evacuations Firefighters continued battling in Malibu, California, Tuesday, which has burned at least 2,667 acres so far with no containment, officials said. Thousands of residents were forced to evacuate as more than 8,100 homes and other structures were threatened, including celebrity seaside mansions, horse farms, and Pepperdine University, where students watched as flames raced down hillsides. . The Santa Ana winds, with gusts reaching 70 mph, are fueling the Franklin Fire, prompting meteorologists to warn that more fires could ignite before winds subside Thursday. . Mangione Charged With Murder A Pennsylvania judge for Luigi Mangione, now charged with the murder of United Healthcare CEO Brian Thompson, and sent him back to jail while he fights extradition to New York. Pennsylvania now has a warrant from Gov. Kathy Hochul before Mangione can answer charges in New York. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. subject: “Calls for Giuliani to be held in contempt of court”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
“He’s not going to be permitted to speak.”

| [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkb2O2zAQhJ-G6mSIS5m0ChWXCGqCC4JrriTW5EomjqQE_sTI2wcylD7tt4sPM5jPd_2Ozru4_sRA45dJOmWdnlmnav-0Br3P7YO81dBB33JoOde8saMdjETZ0MiVEAN0oufNY4TlTgtBdx1w6IW6g8IryqsAJZS06ta48fBw4JzzXnK49EbZbgEYUEl7M5z1HXpK5fJFtJstrolyTrTXu3cG48VsofHjo5Q9M_HGYGYwZzI10eXpYiJ7fDCYX_FXV73D6NolEdkttEuNtlUDCrQLMpiJbnYwBIKW_nYf5OETcy1BGww7ujUyMZ2JOwbyuASyrgYmJgro_AnzVpMhJqaPT_3tZMUwMf34_tH-q3xys8VCsTAx_Xpr0mj3p_PeZalY362H81Wy_PcYv0f4GwAA__8WUJBM)

Dear Friend,
---
According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly **_“hold me in contempt.”_**
---
Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – _yours truly_ – bankrupt and behind bars.
---
During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, __I will not be permitted to speak.__
---
It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech.
---
But I will _never_ _surrender_ this battle, _because**freedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for.**_
---
They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom!
---
**With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you.**
---
_Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can keep fighting for my rights and freedom against the Left’s vicious witch hunt.**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkb2O2zAQhJ-G6mSIS5m0ChWXCGqCC4JrriTW5EomjqQE_sTI2wcylD7tt4sPM5jPd_2Ozru4_sRA45dJOmWdnlmnav-0Br3P7YO81dBB33JoOde8saMdjETZ0MiVEAN0oufNY4TlTgtBdx1w6IW6g8IryqsAJZS06ta48fBw4JzzXnK49EbZbgEYUEl7M5z1HXpK5fJFtJstrolyTrTXu3cG48VsofHjo5Q9M_HGYGYwZzI10eXpYiJ7fDCYX_FXV73D6NolEdkttEuNtlUDCrQLMpiJbnYwBIKW_nYf5OETcy1BGww7ujUyMZ2JOwbyuASyrgYmJgro_AnzVpMhJqaPT_3tZMUwMf34_tH-q3xys8VCsTAx_Xpr0mj3p_PeZalY362H81Wy_PcYv0f4GwAA__8WUJBM)

clean_body: “He’s not going to be permitted to speak.” | Dear Friend, According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly “hold me in contempt.” Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – yours truly – bankrupt and behind bars. During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, I will not be permitted to speak. It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech. But I will never surrender this battle, becausefreedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for. They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom! With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you. Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| | | Hello, As a fellow conservative, you likely already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world to promise freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance; **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain **[free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/silzvrTUJLQj1nt9SPGYdQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPBQoP0SLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9jb25zdGl0dXRpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMV9BRS1ST041OTExNVcDc3BjQgpnVU18WWdvFQKQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/silzvrTUJLQj1nt9SPGYdQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPBQoP0SLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9jb25zdGl0dXRpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMV9BRS1ST041OTExNVcDc3BjQgpnVU18WWdvFQKQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives—they want government-controlled health care, higher taxes and redistribution of wealth in the form of socialism, increased regulations, to do away with the Electoral College, and for open borders. It is for this reason that we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, the freedoms promised to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it promises to us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by clicking this link today? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: **[https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/silzvrTUJLQj1nt9SPGYdQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPBQoP0SLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9jb25zdGl0dXRpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMV9BRS1ST041OTExNVcDc3BjQgpnVU18WWdvFQKQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the far-Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/silzvrTUJLQj1nt9SPGYdQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPBQoP0SLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9jb25zdGl0dXRpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMV9BRS1ST041OTExNVcDc3BjQgpnVU18WWdvFQKQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Thank you, Tony Johnson Director of Membership

clean_body: Please forgive me for sending you a long email. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute’s exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It’s so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute’s latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn’t have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don’t have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661.
