Dear Friend,
---
According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly **_“hold me in contempt.”_**
---
Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – _yours truly_ – bankrupt and behind bars.
---
During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, __I will not be permitted to speak.__
---
It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech.
---
But I will _never_ _surrender_ this battle, _because**freedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for.**_
---
They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom!
---
**With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you.**
---
_Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it._
---

clean_body: “He’s not going to be permitted to speak.” | Dear Friend, According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly “hold me in contempt.” Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – yours truly – bankrupt and behind bars. During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, I will not be permitted to speak. It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech. But I will never surrender this battle, becausefreedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for. They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom! With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you. Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it. ~~ ~~ ~ ~ ~ Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~_

[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6091a508ab714d48bd8acc379b4778d0&_e=C4WiEeF8tfNnzzt4sZPYfiFccFZKOVA-hRs7LSQPOxLNyfxA0o7NyFljNcjHxzywH59J8pw6MvJWEbpDQbgPa0GHoxfEItzvPa-sAScaUFw0fHFY7lTcqX5ILdmTjBmPqRyM5sHzoZaE8ilumZZ9wXvbY8XomCLnG3qyINy8w5L2AlkFB3h8PxLH_ox-sNUiHkje_BYDSPt5sWhEcwwMKkv6Y2OFfby195rSuhtLpPf634FM0xLEaFMnBD_JtuFHHFywA7Af8j5OdMAjtsx8_JEk_MBFRmr-DHvvrC8KWEtV-yKtTiaFYU8PmfpMwGGUz3tjKqpoivy1qveaHGYX7bcd3aSMAnVOVd_8UiqPxgA1XR5uYUAEL6t1NJU-YLCE_OMYaTc8JiFQoRH9V1x3wWI-bYhJ3ZOYqPgvD81VcoaDQr8o0FyFLqSq7VHMXugMEE3zTW7qK7mR4pNtcrRNccTznLNLwqkURH4F9B4GglY%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6091a508ab714d48bd8acc379b4778d0&_e=C4WiEeF8tfNnzzt4sZPYfiFccFZKOVA-hRs7LSQPOxLNyfxA0o7NyFljNcjHxzywH59J8pw6MvJWEbpDQbgPa0GHoxfEItzvPa-sAScaUFw0fHFY7lTcqX5ILdmTjBmPqRyM5sHzoZaE8ilumZZ9wXvbY8XomCLnG3qyINy8w5L2AlkFB3h8PxLH_ox-sNUiHkje_BYDSPt5sWhEcwwMKkv6Y2OFfby195rSuhtLpPf634FM0xLEaFMnBD_JtuFHHFywA7Af8j5OdMAjtsx8_JEk_MBFRmr-DHvvrC8KWEtV-yKtTiaFYU8PmfpMwGGUz3tjKqpoivy1qveaHGYX7UVG-3MhjxdbnYBkObDT0061G0pG4q6Uh0Fam2LXZ0cT2Q6HgwG3yNs61KoYHV1vdYN76ELj5fIoMP7oXY26OjTPvt0Ei4xnTvi1Edm6ZBHC19vO7bc7O0zF2do4ZxovSUz6hcb9V73gw5NxSYT0Tn4%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. clean_body: When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: History Facts
subject: This flower was worth more than gold 🌷
body:
We think of tulips as commonplace spring flowers, but the bulbous, vibrant plant was once one of the most sought-after commodities in the Netherlands. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cn7dbfhiahvkik5grk4urcrsr73zgutkfe86r66dav6puvyvr9pn5s0tipvdt1byx2s9jxh1s80r98m6e09uwyecqlflzc5it7n33yjsn1iyihkeeg0c69p1bpvcsvv59qav6grq7mq3vtc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Tulips were once more valuable than gold.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W e think of tulips as commonplace spring flowers, but the bulbous, vibrant plant was once one of the [most sought-after commodities](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in the Netherlands. Tulips were seen as exotic given their Middle Eastern origins — they were attractive and stylish, with highly saturated colors, and they looked like no other flower in Western and Northern Europe. Between 1634 and 1637, tulip prices skyrocketed in the Netherlands and other parts of Europe, and the flower became a status symbol, indicating both wealth and a certain aura of worldly cosmopolitanism. The demand for tulips in a variety of both colors and patterns (striped tulips became a particular point of obsession for their rare “broken” appearance) became so frenzied that a single bulb could be used as the dowry for a marriage. The phenomenon was dubbed “Tulipmania,” and at the height of the market, tulips were even more valuable than gold.
---
The florin (the Dutch currency at the time, also known as the guilder) had a gold content of roughly 0.77 grams, and a tulip bulb weighed around 20 grams, meaning any bulb that sold for more than 26 florins was worth more than its weight in gold. At the peak of the tulip craze, bulbs regularly cost more than [100 florins](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), and a Semper Augustus tulip — the most expensive bulb ever sold — could [cost as much as 5,200 florins](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), or roughly a quarter-million dollars today. Alas, the flower’s moment in the sun eventually came to an end. Like many economic bubbles, the tulip market burst in part because a number of people bought bulbs on credit that they were not able to pay back. In the winter of 1637, the bottom fell out of the tulip market, and the price halved in a matter of days.
| [Continue Reading](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

---|---|---
## The tulip market never crashed the Dutch economy.
While the tulip market did experience a fascinating boom in the 1630s, the Dutch economy didn’t exactly rise and fall with the flower frenzy as some accounts [have suggested](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Like many economic fads — including the present-day cryptocurrency trend — participation in the tulip market was limited to a very small number of already-wealthy people. [Tulipmania did not affect all of Dutch society](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobwcq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), and it never upended the country’s economy. Contrary to the many myths around this fragrant chapter of Dutch history, no one ever went bankrupt over the flower. Historians have only ever identified about 350 people who participated in the tulip trade. That’s certainly no small feat for a simple flower, but the tulip’s storied economic impact wilts under closer scrutiny.

clean_body: We think of tulips as commonplace spring flowers, but the bulbous, vibrant plant was once one of the most sought-after commodities in the Netherlands. | W e think of tulips as commonplace spring flowers, but the bulbous, vibrant plant was once one of the in the Netherlands. Tulips were seen as exotic given their Middle Eastern origins — they were attractive and stylish, with highly saturated colors, and they looked like no other flower in Western and Northern Europe. Between 1634 and 1637, tulip prices skyrocketed in the Netherlands and other parts of Europe, and the flower became a status symbol, indicating both wealth and a certain aura of worldly cosmopolitanism. The demand for tulips in a variety of both colors and patterns (striped tulips became a particular point of obsession for their rare “broken” appearance) became so frenzied that a single bulb could be used as the dowry for a marriage. The phenomenon was dubbed “Tulipmania,” and at the height of the market, tulips were even more valuable than gold. The florin (the Dutch currency at the time, also known as the guilder) had a gold content of roughly 0.77 grams, and a tulip bulb weighed around 20 grams, meaning any bulb that sold for more than 26 florins was worth more than its weight in gold. At the peak of the tulip craze, bulbs regularly cost more than , and a Semper Augustus tulip — the most expensive bulb ever sold — could , or roughly a quarter-million dollars today. Alas, the flower’s moment in the sun eventually came to an end. Like many economic bubbles, the tulip market burst in part because a number of people bought bulbs on credit that they were not able to pay back. In the winter of 1637, the bottom fell out of the tulip market, and the price halved in a matter of days. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Year the gold florin, also known as the guilder, was introduced in Florence 1252 | | Year tulips arrived in Belgium from Constantinople (modern-day Istanbul) 1551 | Year tulips arrived in Belgium from Constantinople (modern-day Istanbul) 1551 | | People who paid an average year’s salary for one tulip bulb between December 1636 and February 1637 37 | | Average maximum tulip price (in florins) at the market’s peak 200 | Average maximum tulip price (in florins) at the market’s peak 200 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The tulip market never crashed the Dutch economy. While the tulip market did experience a fascinating boom in the 1630s, the Dutch economy didn’t exactly rise and fall with the flower frenzy as some accounts . Like many economic fads — including the present-day cryptocurrency trend — participation in the tulip market was limited to a very small number of already-wealthy people. , and it never upended the country’s economy. Contrary to the many myths around this fragrant chapter of Dutch history, no one ever went bankrupt over the flower. Historians have only ever identified about 350 people who participated in the tulip trade. That’s certainly no small feat for a simple flower, but the tulip’s storied economic impact wilts under closer scrutiny. You can help deliver care packages, meals and connections to military heroes for the holidays.
I had to reach out and make sure you saw this incredibly important message.
Our Season of Giving goal of raising $75,000 ends TOMORROW, but right now, we're falling short. And we're counting on the help of patriotic Americans like you to help make up this gap.
**Service members at home and deployed abroad deserve to feel cared for while they make immense sacrifices for our country -- including spending special days like Christmas far away from their families. While deployed halfway around the world this year, _hundreds of thousands_ of service members will miss unwrapping presents with their kids, enjoying their favorite holiday foods and creating precious memories with their loved ones.
**That 's why it's so important that _you_ help provide our heroes with care packages, holiday meals and phone calls home and show them they are not alone.* [Please make a holiday gift before our urgent goal deadline.](https://links.e.uso.)**
Thank you so much, and happy holidays!
--Sydney Jones, the USO

Our service members make so many unseen sacrifices for our country all year long. But no time of year is more difficult than the holidays, and this year, **more than 200,000 of our military heroes are spending the holidays overseas.**
While deployed halfway around the world, military members miss the sound of their loved ones' voices. They miss the comfort of favorite holiday foods. And most of all, they miss out on crucial moments to make family memories. **But you can help connect service members to folks back home with care packages, holiday meals and calls with their loved ones.**
**[With so many of our heroes far from home this holiday season, we've set a goal to raise $75,000 via email and text message through Thursday to give them the care and comfort they deserve. Will you support the USO with a tax-deductible donation and help send a gift to our courageous service members?](https://links.e.uso.)**

I'm so proud of the work we have done. _But I 'm writing to you today not because our mission is over but because it's just beginning. _

**Next year, Winsome will lead Republicans to a crucial victory in November and keep Virginia on the path to prosperity!**

clean_body: | | | | | | "Glenn Youngkin" It's Governor Glenn Youngkin and I have an important announcement to share with you. In 2021, Winsome Earle-Sears and I ran for Virginia's highest offices. We fought to defend parents' rights, back the blue and our military, and get Virginia's economy and jobs moving again. Together, we've worked as a team to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. I'm so proud of the work we have done. But I 'm writing to you today not because our mission is over but because it's just beginning. Next year, Winsome will lead Republicans to a crucial victory in November and keep Virginia on the path to prosperity! "I’m proud to endorse Winsome for Governor! She has a tough race ahead of her and will need every single committed grassroots supporter to have her back. Please send in any amount you can spare to help her start off this campaign on a high note:" | | "SUPPORT WINSOME EARLE-SEARS FOR GOVERNOR " Winsome has been a fantastic Lt. Governor, and she will be an even better Governor. She brings the fighting spirit of a Marine to the office every single day. Seriously, there could not be a better person to continue our success for Virginians for the next four years. That's why I'm giving Winsome my complete endorsement and total support. Today, I'm asking you from the bottom of my heart to please do the same. | | "SUPPORT WINSOME FOR GOVERNOR " Winsome is a veteran, mother, and true conservative. We need her in office to keep up the progress we have made together. body:
Your flight covered, your hotel covered!

| | | Friend, the last year has proved that the MAGA movement is the bravest, toughest political movement in American history. Now, after everything the proud movement has ensured, we’re giving every true patriot a chance to win the ultimate victory prize! _**_[_**_You can enter right now by making a contribution of any amount for a chance to win a FREE trip for you and a guest to Washington, D.C. for President Trump's inauguration day!_**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0dg7ed2leje6niv6un8o12vqedukj356fojl660_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjj6epj1c9h2bs)_**_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze3vtr1v36tl3mp272pm2unfnh58s7u3uv2fo1d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjj6epj1c9h2bs)
---
**Flight?****_COVERED!_** **Hotel?****_COVERED!_** **_[Friend, we’ve reserved a ticket for one lucky winner and their plus one and we can’t wait to send a brave patriot on their merry way to witness what will surely be a historic day for our country.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zreicdd21eatj6h844s76a46p0ahqrairvnf0n1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjj6epj1c9h2bs)_ ** **Do you want to witness a moment that will define the future of America as we know? You’ll want to tell your kids and grandkids that YOU were there in our Nation’s Capital for this moment! **
---
[**ENTER FOR A CHANCE TO WIN TRIP**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7k2a1qljcucee8iv58ahp42s488n5c3hsm7iul0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjj6epj1c9h2bs)
---
**_[This will be a trip you’ll hold near and dear to your heart. You’ll remember this forever! So don’t waste any time. This opportunity won’t last forever and we’d hate for you to miss your chance!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdu14tri99q1i0olh8d2526nfcsm7so10r8h1i0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cjj6epj1c9h2bs)_ ** We hope you’ll be the lucky patriot at this once-in-a-lifetime event! subject: What? A Republican Congressman Supporting the Trans Agenda
body:
Call Him Now!
| | |
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwllEQ-Hk8vSPNXbVpgAsqno3c61KgBHWmQgTaVmBIJr-rdx73auoJBsdnRm0awyMLzre4vKdPRUqaFY2WP7Gf5SA578VRXEjVBMgM3moTtjA4NKjtI6J23HZGAIyriCSz_KGQ-9IE1HeZawnTZ6op4o-veLJ-THFRkVooyQ6o0gnXMOBuHrLn4w4qHq0J6JLFEzvXxuoa1CTLlEk1AMpA==&c=kTbFJqIEFO0MgjUfShJIM0-rbX-kSQW-H_3zSaNSYhJighCCdVGjdw==&ch=5O1cIEULFaCU1-JNrb6btooS_-f7r1CjmlNUoUAMks21I7pJjZ4r_g==)
---
| Friends,

Last week, [Speaker Johnson took a stand for our service members and their families to protect them from the predatory transgender industry.](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwllEQ-Hk8vSPNXbVpgAsqno3c61KgBHWmQgTaVmBIJr-rdx73auoCNtVq948moDtrqESDLh8Lvhg1B_-O1Bb4pDwvMvcDqyFjPk636GPONRjcKhHvQhWFCscvoBUpkWlBb0agFIvXVYfDFMynN8ST-iB5f-JRfInKRrJPF4Gxiw2c7_5TAV1QStYoyetphFyw9OnFxKjW0=&c=kTbFJqIEFO0MgjUfShJIM0-rbX-kSQW-H_3zSaNSYhJighCCdVGjdw==&ch=5O1cIEULFaCU1-JNrb6btooS_-f7r1CjmlNUoUAMks21I7pJjZ4r_g==) This is the beginning of the end of our woke military and should be supported by every Republican without question!
But Congressman Mike Rogers from Alabama does not agree...
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwllEQ-Hk8vSPNXbVpgAsqno3c61KgBHWmQgTaVmBIJr-rdx73auoCNtVq948moDEnQ5rhD3BVIzyAWQag9Mdk7b5fsfXoxIuL-ldE44vy72O-lEIq14PBTd_2epooKEEJIa9hrjJCSvp0cAkcn4tZQlw8O9iyY2BrqSUy46y3UDHAx2JNR2uVIdw43FoNaiNf92dxuIry4RfrmkuUK5-iYS1EIvjP5C66WIwzmfAAM=&c=kTbFJqIEFO0MgjUfShJIM0-rbX-kSQW-H_3zSaNSYhJighCCdVGjdw==&ch=5O1cIEULFaCU1-JNrb6btooS_-f7r1CjmlNUoUAMks21I7pJjZ4r_g==)
---
| A Republican who supports taxpayer-funded transgender surgeries?
I thought we ended this by electing Trump!
Do the people of Alabama support military funding for transgender surgeries?
Apparently, Congressman Mike Rogers does. [RIGHT NOW, he is actively opposing the strongest language yet to defund these procedures in the military.](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwllEQ-Hk8vSPNXbVpgAsqno3c61KgBHWmQgTaVmBIJr-rdx73auoCNtVq948moDy1BqeCfWqF3bdx4VRvQw_-mnY9eWSY0ysQtj_zJqo8T3Ks81uKTNG1HGc-Ju_Lwza02NlE_92qIIUtAO9RJmlY3W3-ibZ5zUu4NYFTwBGTqVKRhnIAm2C8Qwglj5K9ErdYGPcEekvbk=&c=kTbFJqIEFO0MgjUfShJIM0-rbX-kSQW-H_3zSaNSYhJighCCdVGjdw==&ch=5O1cIEULFaCU1-JNrb6btooS_-f7r1CjmlNUoUAMks21I7pJjZ4r_g==)
---
| We've worked hard to lay the foundation for Trump's next administration. That includes stopping Joe Biden's programs that waste taxpayer dollars and undermine conservative values.
This is the kind of insane DC nonsense we face every day and has to be put to an end in order to help make our country great again!
Call Congressman Mike Rogers' office NOW and tell him exactly what you think!
Here's the direct number to his office: 202-225-3261
---
| [CONTACT MIKE ROGERS NOW!](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwllEQ-Hk8vSPNXbVpgAsqno3c61KgBHWmQgTaVmBIJr-rdx73auoCNtVq948moDfmS5jKP1Ls0WBWs7StHMvqbxf4ilbfc2yIcG_eojou1KtT9kychdG38yAG7RFq8P9FYQM_C7C3Se6LgxAZmWJKuBNhcWaI3v&c=kTbFJqIEFO0MgjUfShJIM0-rbX-kSQW-H_3zSaNSYhJighCCdVGjdw==&ch=5O1cIEULFaCU1-JNrb6btooS_-f7r1CjmlNUoUAMks21I7pJjZ4r_g==)
---
[Sex change procedures should never be funded by taxpayers, especially in our military but most especially FOR CHILDREN.](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwllEQ-Hk8vSPNXbVpgAsqno3c61KgBHWmQgTaVmBIJr-rdx73auoCNtVq948moDwtT76yXpKDPDtlS2cfp-gPhdK9LijcLaoS01mF3egT7D9DoYX-z3rN130nlh8qnUwH84hN8HgNW1HioR9pck2cAuDXyeX1yKlhWzXZa9Lh10-hGOstIzIWztHM0zeVVD_h0xtnjeRRo=&c=kTbFJqIEFO0MgjUfShJIM0-rbX-kSQW-H_3zSaNSYhJighCCdVGjdw==&ch=5O1cIEULFaCU1-JNrb6btooS_-f7r1CjmlNUoUAMks21I7pJjZ4r_g==)
---
| Thank you!
In Freedom,
---
| |
---

body:
We can't believe it's come to this

|

| | |
Friend,

Democrats are trying to stop President Trump's agenda at all costs. **And now, they 've found their latest foothold: Special Elections in Florida. **

They're working hard to fill these two open House seats with radical, Leftist candidates who will _put all of their efforts into halting our MAGA agenda in Congress. _

**Nancy Pelosi and liberal billionaires are scheming as we speak: could funnel COUNTLESS dark money dollars into winning these critical Special Elections to slow down Trump 's agenda. **

If we want to make sure that the Left doesn't stop Trump's legislative priorities, we MUST save these seats. _But the damage isn 't done yet, Friend_! We have enough time to stop Pelosi's scheme before it becomes a dismal reality.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/11/2024
body:
‘If you want the truth, seek the truth’: Mesa Co. Clerk Gross responds to article allegations
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Happy Wednesday,
Here's a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Mesa County Clerk Bobbie Gross [defends her record](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) amid allegations tied to Dominion Voting Systems contracts and her predecessor’s legal troubles. Meanwhile, the Colorado General Assembly’s Legislative Audit Committee blocks a Republican-led request for an [audit of a password breach](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) by the Secretary of State’s office, further stoking partisan tensions. Additionally, the [Colorado Public Employees' Retirement Association (PERA) faces criticism](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over its growing costs and lack of transparency, as its board grapples with calls for reform from both members and lawmakers.
**🇺🇸 In National News...** President-elect Donald Trump has [vowed immediate action on January 6 defendants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) upon taking office, signaling sweeping changes on day one of his administration. Meanwhile, Trump’s pick for Secretary of Defense, [Pete Hegseth, earns praise from U.S. Rep.-elect Jeff Crank](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), a Republican, of Colorado Springs’ 5th District, for his commitment to American values despite fierce opposition from the left.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, December 11, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[‘If you want the truth, seek the truth’: Mesa Co. Clerk Gross responds to article allegations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk and a Gold Star mother with a clean prior record, has now served two months of a nine-year prison sentence. She was found guilty on seven charges related to the unlawful access she granted to the county’s election system.
Recent open-record requests published by The Gateway Pundit reveal an alleged conflict of interest: while facing political persecution for investigating possible election data manipulation by the secretary of state and Dominion Voting Systems, Clerk Peters was unknowingly working alongside county officials who were also Dominion contractors.
The Gateway Pundit article raised questions about whether the public knew that county officials and employees were also working for Dominion at the time. There’s also the question of whether Bobbie Gross disclosed her Dominion work history while campaigning to serve as Mesa County clerk following Peters’ term.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Hegseth, Trump’s Sec. of Defense pick, is ‘good man, committed to America’, U.S. Rep.-elect Crank says](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* U.S. Rep.-elect Jeff Crank expressed strong support for President-elect Trump’s Secretary of Defense nominee, Pete Hegseth, describing him as a principled and patriotic leader committed to America’s values.
* Crank criticized what he described as predictable media and partisan attacks against Hegseth, likening the opposition to prior contentious confirmation battles such as Brett Kavanaugh's.
* Crank underscored the President's right to choose cabinet members, emphasizing the importance of confirming qualified individuals who uphold integrity and ethics.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Democrats reject audit of Colorado Secretary of State’s password breach](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Democrats on the Legislative Audit Committee voted along party lines to block a Republican request for an audit into a password breach in the Secretary of State's office, citing sufficient third-party investigation.
* Republican lawmakers argued that an independent audit would restore trust among county clerks and voters, but the request was rejected despite ongoing mistrust surrounding election security.
* This marks the latest in a series of rejected audit requests targeting state agencies, reflecting persistent partisan tensions over election oversight in Colorado.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[‘You are here to serve’: As Colorado’s pension costs grow, some PERA members say its board isn’t listening](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Colorado Public Employees’ Retirement Association (PERA) faces growing criticism for its lack of transparency and increasing financial burden on public agencies, with contributions now consuming nearly a third of salary budgets in some districts.
* Critics, including lawmakers and school administrators, demand reforms, highlighting PERA’s restrictive public comment policies and inadequate communication with stakeholders.
* Legislators plan to introduce a bipartisan bill requiring PERA to adopt transparency standards comparable to local governments, addressing concerns about its opaque decision-making and growing costs.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Trump says he’ll act on ‘first day’ on Jan. 6 defendants, but perhaps not by pardon](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* President-elect Donald Trump pledged to act on his first day in office regarding the cases of January 6 defendants, emphasizing a case-by-case review rather than a blanket pardon.
* Trump criticized members of the January 6 Committee, suggesting they face legal scrutiny for their roles in the investigation of the Capitol riot.
* Trump signaled a broader overhaul of judicial processes, highlighting the need to address what he views as systemic injustices within the federal system.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[‘There are still a lot of unanswered questions’: Clerks react to investigative report on BIOS password exposure](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 9** _A report detailing the findings of an investigation into the activities of the Colorado secretary of state’s office during the public exposure of BIOS passwords, in the days leading up to the 2024 election, was released Monday._
**[Hindawi: Text messages from home and the fall of a dictator](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SALAM HINDAWI****| COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 9** _In late November, I had received a Telegram text from my brother, based in Germany, saying there were skirmishes between Syrian opposition forces and the Assad army – the official, regular Syrian armed forces – on the outskirts of our hometown of Aleppo, near our long-abandoned farmhouse._ __
[**Heatherly & Lundberg: It is time to downsize the Administrative State in Colorado, too**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY KEVIN LUNDBERG & CHARLES HEATHERLY****| COMMENTARY |****DECEMBER 9** _It’s not news that America’s $6 trillion federal Administrative State is targeted for radical downsizing by President Donald J. Trump. What is also not news is that Colorado’s progressives will oppose most of the President’s policies and probably think that Colorado can escape the oncoming Trump deregulation bulldozer._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** While many assume Jamestown, Virginia, is the oldest city in the U.S., it was actually the first permanent English colony, established in May 1607. The **title of oldest city** belongs to St. Augustine, Florida, founded by the Spanish in 1565. Apart from a brief period of British rule, it served as the capital of "Spanish Florida" for over 250 years.

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: You're Invited: Holiday Reception w/ County Executive Rushern Baker
body:
Join us on Wednesday, December 11, 2024, at 6:30 PM at 7580 Walker Drive, Suite 310, Greenbelt, MD, for an evening of holiday cheer, connection, and community. Celebrate the season while supporting the vision for a brighter future in Prince George’s County. Don’t miss it—RSVP now!| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98508988/516895079/-1122296919?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRlZDNkNS1iZmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oww2hbqMLOBJTbDmI623BwxjPkndnZYdlNemiJeCv90=&emci=f7e8d532-c6b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0a4ed3d5-bfb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=5895818)
---
**Prince Georgians,** **We ****deserve leadership we can trust!** [**That’s why I’ve decided to run for Prince George’s County Executive, again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98508989/516895109/65212731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRlZDNkNS1iZmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oww2hbqMLOBJTbDmI623BwxjPkndnZYdlNemiJeCv90=) As your County Executive from 2010 to 2018, I worked tirelessly to uplift Prince George’s County, and together, we accomplished remarkable progress. [**During my administration, Prince George’s led the state in job creation five years in a row.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98508990/516895113/65212731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRlZDNkNS1iZmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oww2hbqMLOBJTbDmI623BwxjPkndnZYdlNemiJeCv90=) We created over 6,000 jobs, trained more than 40,000 residents for emerging industries, and facilitated an unprecedented $10 billion in economic development. By raising the county’s commercial tax base, we secured critical revenues to invest in our schools, infrastructure, and essential community programs. [**We also made our County safer;** **overall crime dropped by 50%, and violent crime was reduced by 58%**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98508992/516895114/65212731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRlZDNkNS1iZmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oww2hbqMLOBJTbDmI623BwxjPkndnZYdlNemiJeCv90=), thanks to the successful implementation of the Transforming Neighborhood Initiative (TNI). TNI was a groundbreaking community-centered policing strategy that brought law enforcement, residents, and local organizations together to address the root causes of crime and create safer, stronger communities. Prince George’s County thrived under our leadership, but there is still more work to be done. [**I’m eager to finish what we started—together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98508995/516895116/65212731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRlZDNkNS1iZmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oww2hbqMLOBJTbDmI623BwxjPkndnZYdlNemiJeCv90=) I believe that when people come together, great things happen. With your support, we can continue to make Prince George’s County a place where all families thrive. To make this campaign a success, I’m asking for your help to ensure our message reaches every corner of the county. Your contribution will help us move Prince George’s County forward and build a brighter future for all. [**Your support means the world to me and will make all the difference in this important effort. Can I count on you to make a $25 donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98508996/516895117/65212731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRlZDNkNS1iZmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oww2hbqMLOBJTbDmI623BwxjPkndnZYdlNemiJeCv90=) Thank you for standing with me. Together, we can continue to uplift Prince George’s County. Warms Regards, Rushern L. Baker, III
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98508998/516895119/102678884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTRlZDNkNS1iZmI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oww2hbqMLOBJTbDmI623BwxjPkndnZYdlNemiJeCv90=)

name: Allegiance Gold
subject: Beware the Digital Dollar: Unveiling Its Terrifying Realities!
body:
Banks don’t need your permission to legally seize your deposits.

# **
Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying Realities!**
The purchasing power of the US dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the government's promises of financial stability crumble before your own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and[ **take immediate action to protect your wealth**.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7d231262c2204a5985af61acaa7e08e7&_e=f1cWFjrOexjLRMr2G45ktl9oz2ceVKpOnLL078zGxqw5jj8Rl5ufRTVMvYpK48ccX2HZRGcRenVqbf3yUxZDZs012DbT7shsu2G6Os9TTLJzvjJXGF1pdJUJYo6ifUFbKA43SSxA9E0RTuotOsx9LtNWtNxaCH1Mjeunem3mbjjbj3P2qFOI5x079rZLN_2XCm-FNto4CLTDmxCQZlsAVZQtl_v1aWZaNWdwHyrmZWkBSplhEIC865Q6XUljU2FGLmEQ6i8IrOFWnX0yaXauyDAh5cY0PwL6tzbswaJCkDtUUENtUh9z3eHi2mQ2t-OkRnKMlhxlBfTkqOIoo6_z9wVqs632HP3aSMzcSsXzTAP_fII-BQeohsObXEVqVSHH) The solution lies in the timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall Street don’t want you to have.

Now, more than ever, it is crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and The solution lies in the timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall Street don’t want you to have. For years, the government has insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but the truth is far from what they would have us believe. The silent erosion of the dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently devaluing. It's time to expose the deception and The signs of the dollar's decline are impossible to ignore. Inflation is soaring and the cost of everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control. The government's assurances that this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term financial security. It doesn’t stop there. subject: [URGENT] Syria Changes Everything for Trump
body:
Syria Changes Everything for Trump
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qw4ce9ldsjmmalsgzostk0xjqwdvu9ufg9mddvig9rs372qztcx4t9by8he65hwbk6eg6z9rnx8igdsmn4zri3itso06cmnikcphnr1vru0t11ww7pla72yx6jxobgxgspe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobzrm&__onlt=h) [unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiye7pw5t0yb6ry5pckmkenrgmyq0zngjn4pwhd9sjmovpd2f4al7ux4j28h3ctzklqfdw6tb2q4zk4zqgvz7mahtd&__stmp=sobzrm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=2zgtzgvw0o1thm8mw799kl1xcv7cz17tn5ag37fsz8tb5oos0wnahg4e2bf459a87jdqlu9883sm3qwz3jkg6ft1yiikgmwq9cqcp120h0hzgm1f6vjx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobzrm&__onlt=h "Headline") Fellow Concerned American: Dynamics in the Middle East are fluid. In fact, they’re changing by the minute in Syria and world leaders are looking to President-Elect Trump for guidance as we saw in Paris! Rather than ensure he hits the ground running, D.C. insiders are doing all they can to stymie him; putting up dangerous obstacles in his path. Some are scared that Trump will restore America's might in this world. **Simply put, they don't want a strong and powerful America.** [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=2zgtzgvw0o1thm8mw799kl1xcv7cz17tn5g4i1ialz1j0oyl0p1pwdp3xgey6l52q36j0f1gshtogxht7kqsosgzzdqby7j0w4rj9jvdjvvrlkpksl16&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobzrm&__onlt=h "Blueprint for the Trump Administration")**But we do.** That's why we've released a _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ that safeguards American values, enhances national security, and strengthens global alliances. And we want to give this to you as a thank you for your support. **[If you want to learn how the Trump administration can effectively confront Iranian aggression, Islamism, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict while restoring America's greatness, then get your copy today!](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=2zgtzgvw0o1thm8mw799kl1xcv7cz17tn5lrahljo1y4hoju05d29axr4le48axiw8yr23gsbzurxf6nnkg2u489axisq59ygut46g1v02785yc3dq5j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sobzrm&__onlt=h "If you want to learn how the Trump administration can effectively confront Iranian aggression, Islamism, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict while restoring America's greatness, then get your copy today!")** Our mission at the Middle East Forum is simple – to promote American interests in the Middle East and protect Western values from Middle Eastern threats. Because we know that protecting our border and increasing deportations of those here illegally is tied directly to what’s happening in the Middle East. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fae6d8b96e134fce935c66c5b304878a&_e=ZvGK2zHEL3cjVBPifjwTtm3rLgIlsy8vyKgRoQDwS_iW7-z7PZn4CUhNuB-x9iTD7ig7_woujk2ro9NFR1nDrPrxVXWtM6unpgG-_p9pR4eQ6WWeDidWpTo7j1uLHqkGhxAt6iSxV9c310XWKB6bByb8yjUk2rQQqaRk-2V5sjr2pWIagaNThf45DOr_nvgQEPzrA3t2NmC-aUjHu3_gA1xx7Vs5Rtys7Jze0uU0tuLymRKTsmuLYp2swkUAZvUoJyNiJNwbUVbHhzjxStR_WlQmg_ILct2Ok-nC603MChU46ucWL_PcWrkK6GEArLwyF5RsXdbk9LBaDNeETEfxLEnryVqpi20bZK_-4vr0qpeVlWh4M5vLE6MIm-yfo95b)

Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkTuL3TAQhX-N3Pmih9deFy4ua1xlQwgLKcVIGtkD8gM9cvG_D97cpEsRleccNGe--fGu34ECbfNXWHHwIeqYtMHTUdQLQqz9XjZXmxKMllw2tZC1EFpUbuCid01T4SA6pXrZ9p2olsEL_9o73wnbyB677kUIYyxKiY0xaHxFw_WPkEII1bS8vRn-Yjw46LED_wqWNRwCxnzzEdHtK2wukMGYz4jHHvPN7msVhiXnIzF1Z3Jicno8Hrer72UyOTkmJ4Mpf-5A26yBXNLgPRdXXk1gM1Pj_e2DX6_louX3tw8m25JXnfYSLTI1mtM9pRUdlZWpEbynQJDxaVhYD6B5Y2osSeOmIVxD9d-cNqe7lDrQvOQLZO32YgLqYz_AZtD_aHEUEygtGDU5psZv-3G3GZhsUzG_penL9_oPzCoO7nhQCJTajjV8XoHCJ6r8P2f9OchfAQAA___ZNq38)

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkTuL3TAQhX-N3Pmih9deFy4ua1xlQwgLKcVIGtkD8gM9cvG_D97cpEsRleccNGe--fGu34ECbfNXWHHwIeqYtMHTUdQLQqz9XjZXmxKMllw2tZC1EFpUbuCid01T4SA6pXrZ9p2olsEL_9o73wnbyB677kUIYyxKiY0xaHxFw_WPkEII1bS8vRn-Yjw46LED_wqWNRwCxnzzEdHtK2wukMGYz4jHHvPN7msVhiXnIzF1Z3Jicno8Hrer72UyOTkmJ4Mpf-5A26yBXNLgPRdXXk1gM1Pj_e2DX6_louX3tw8m25JXnfYSLTI1mtM9pRUdlZWpEbynQJDxaVhYD6B5Y2osSeOmIVxD9d-cNqe7lDrQvOQLZO32YgLqYz_AZtD_aHEUEygtGDU5psZv-3G3GZhsUzG_penL9_oPzCoO7nhQCJTajjV8XoHCJ6r8P2f9OchfAQAA___ZNq38)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkTuL3TAQhX-N3Pmih9deFy4ua1xlQwgLKcVIGtkD8gM9cvG_D97cpEsRleccNGe--fGu34ECbfNXWHHwIeqYtMHTUdQLQqz9XjZXmxKMllw2tZC1EFpUbuCid01T4SA6pXrZ9p2olsEL_9o73wnbyB677kUIYyxKiY0xaHxFw_WPkEII1bS8vRn-Yjw46LED_wqWNRwCxnzzEdHtK2wukMGYz4jHHvPN7msVhiXnIzF1Z3Jicno8Hrer72UyOTkmJ4Mpf-5A26yBXNLgPRdXXk1gM1Pj_e2DX6_louX3tw8m25JXnfYSLTI1mtM9pRUdlZWpEbynQJDxaVhYD6B5Y2osSeOmIVxD9d-cNqe7lDrQvOQLZO32YgLqYz_AZtD_aHEUEygtGDU5psZv-3G3GZhsUzG_penL9_oPzCoO7nhQCJTajjV8XoHCJ6r8P2f9OchfAQAA___ZNq38) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkTuL3TAQhX-N3Pmih9deFy4ua1xlQwgLKcVIGtkD8gM9cvG_D97cpEsRleccNGe--fGu34ECbfNXWHHwIeqYtMHTUdQLQqz9XjZXmxKMllw2tZC1EFpUbuCid01T4SA6pXrZ9p2olsEL_9o73wnbyB677kUIYyxKiY0xaHxFw_WPkEII1bS8vRn-Yjw46LED_wqWNRwCxnzzEdHtK2wukMGYz4jHHvPN7msVhiXnIzF1Z3Jicno8Hrer72UyOTkmJ4Mpf-5A26yBXNLgPRdXXk1gM1Pj_e2DX6_louX3tw8m25JXnfYSLTI1mtM9pRUdlZWpEbynQJDxaVhYD6B5Y2osSeOmIVxD9d-cNqe7lDrQvOQLZO32YgLqYz_AZtD_aHEUEygtGDU5psZv-3G3GZhsUzG_penL9_oPzCoO7nhQCJTajjV8XoHCJ6r8P2f9OchfAQAA___ZNq38) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkTuL3TAQhX-N3Pmih9deFy4ua1xlQwgLKcVIGtkD8gM9cvG_D97cpEsRleccNGe--fGu34ECbfNXWHHwIeqYtMHTUdQLQqz9XjZXmxKMllw2tZC1EFpUbuCid01T4SA6pXrZ9p2olsEL_9o73wnbyB677kUIYyxKiY0xaHxFw_WPkEII1bS8vRn-Yjw46LED_wqWNRwCxnzzEdHtK2wukMGYz4jHHvPN7msVhiXnIzF1Z3Jicno8Hrer72UyOTkmJ4Mpf-5A26yBXNLgPRdXXk1gM1Pj_e2DX6_louX3tw8m25JXnfYSLTI1mtM9pRUdlZWpEbynQJDxaVhYD6B5Y2osSeOmIVxD9d-cNqe7lDrQvOQLZO32YgLqYz_AZtD_aHEUEygtGDU5psZv-3G3GZhsUzG_penL9_oPzCoO7nhQCJTajjV8XoHCJ6r8P2f9OchfAQAA___ZNq38)
[ ](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkTuL3TAQhX-N3Pmih9deFy4ua1xlQwgLKcVIGtkD8gM9cvG_D97cpEsRleccNGe--fGu34ECbfNXWHHwIeqYtMHTUdQLQqz9XjZXmxKMllw2tZC1EFpUbuCid01T4SA6pXrZ9p2olsEL_9o73wnbyB677kUIYyxKiY0xaHxFw_WPkEII1bS8vRn-Yjw46LED_wqWNRwCxnzzEdHtK2wukMGYz4jHHvPN7msVhiXnIzF1Z3Jicno8Hrer72UyOTkmJ4Mpf-5A26yBXNLgPRdXXk1gM1Pj_e2DX6_louX3tw8m25JXnfYSLTI1mtM9pRUdlZWpEbynQJDxaVhYD6B5Y2osSeOmIVxD9d-cNqe7lDrQvOQLZO32YgLqYz_AZtD_aHEUEygtGDU5psZv-3G3GZhsUzG_penL9_oPzCoO7nhQCJTajjV8XoHCJ6r8P2f9OchfAQAA___ZNq38)
What makes [hear.com's](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkTuL3TAQhX-N3Pmih9deFy4ua1xlQwgLKcVIGtkD8gM9cvG_D97cpEsRleccNGe--fGu34ECbfNXWHHwIeqYtMHTUdQLQqz9XjZXmxKMllw2tZC1EFpUbuCid01T4SA6pXrZ9p2olsEL_9o73wnbyB677kUIYyxKiY0xaHxFw_WPkEII1bS8vRn-Yjw46LED_wqWNRwCxnzzEdHtK2wukMGYz4jHHvPN7msVhiXnIzF1Z3Jicno8Hrer72UyOTkmJ4Mpf-5A26yBXNLgPRdXXk1gM1Pj_e2DX6_louX3tw8m25JXnfYSLTI1mtM9pRUdlZWpEbynQJDxaVhYD6B5Y2osSeOmIVxD9d-cNqe7lDrQvOQLZO32YgLqYz_AZtD_aHEUEygtGDU5psZv-3G3GZhsUzG_penL9_oPzCoO7nhQCJTajjV8XoHCJ6r8P2f9OchfAQAA___ZNq38) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkTuL3TAQhX-N3Pmih9deFy4ua1xlQwgLKcVIGtkD8gM9cvG_D97cpEsRleccNGe--fGu34ECbfNXWHHwIeqYtMHTUdQLQqz9XjZXmxKMllw2tZC1EFpUbuCid01T4SA6pXrZ9p2olsEL_9o73wnbyB677kUIYyxKiY0xaHxFw_WPkEII1bS8vRn-Yjw46LED_wqWNRwCxnzzEdHtK2wukMGYz4jHHvPN7msVhiXnIzF1Z3Jicno8Hrer72UyOTkmJ4Mpf-5A26yBXNLgPRdXXk1gM1Pj_e2DX6_louX3tw8m25JXnfYSLTI1mtM9pRUdlZWpEbynQJDxaVhYD6B5Y2osSeOmIVxD9d-cNqe7lDrQvOQLZO32YgLqYz_AZtD_aHEUEygtGDU5psZv-3G3GZhsUzG_penL9_oPzCoO7nhQCJTajjV8XoHCJ6r8P2f9OchfAQAA___ZNq38) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkTuL3TAQhX-N3Pmih9deFy4ua1xlQwgLKcVIGtkD8gM9cvG_D97cpEsRleccNGe--fGu34ECbfNXWHHwIeqYtMHTUdQLQqz9XjZXmxKMllw2tZC1EFpUbuCid01T4SA6pXrZ9p2olsEL_9o73wnbyB677kUIYyxKiY0xaHxFw_WPkEII1bS8vRn-Yjw46LED_wqWNRwCxnzzEdHtK2wukMGYz4jHHvPN7msVhiXnIzF1Z3Jicno8Hrer72UyOTkmJ4Mpf-5A26yBXNLgPRdXXk1gM1Pj_e2DX6_louX3tw8m25JXnfYSLTI1mtM9pRUdlZWpEbynQJDxaVhYD6B5Y2osSeOmIVxD9d-cNqe7lDrQvOQLZO32YgLqYz_AZtD_aHEUEygtGDU5psZv-3G3GZhsUzG_penL9_oPzCoO7nhQCJTajjV8XoHCJ6r8P2f9OchfAQAA___ZNq38) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**

name: Ben Samuels
subject: Reckless media coverage of the UnitedHealthcare murder
body:
The press coverage of social media posts that glamorize Brian Thompson's murder is dangerous and out of touch with what nearly everyone actually believes.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.-zBoAKzZOKb5kE3D5iXvs9jcYGGdvuc5UZEifm9lC_M?) for more
---
# [Reckless media coverage of the UnitedHealthcare murder](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=152923443&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTIzNDQzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM5MjQ5NjYsImV4cCI6MTczNjUxNjk2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lJDVe4vYgXz1efSFXz2WX7XlkjPZ2uc_pm88Zh7CN-8)
### The press coverage of social media posts that glamorize Brian Thompson's murder is dangerous and out of touch with what nearly everyone actually believes.
| | [Ben Samuels](https://substack.com/@bensamuels)
---
| Dec 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@bensamuels)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..Xrr2PMrA2wu8LxUjx6ydrXGhifhsyhRFh-PWkncYYM4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/bensamuels/p/medias-reckless-coverage-of-the-unitedhealthcare-ceo-murder-brian-thompson?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Even with everything going on in the world--the [collapse of Assad's regime in Syria](https://substack.com/redirect/a039d825-de16-4b40-860e-59449f2183f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Trump's appointments to his cabinet](https://substack.com/redirect/318239d5-27f4-40bf-8893-44a0dcb897ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--this past week's top story has been, unquestionably, the [murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson](https://substack.com/redirect/660e4103-2e56-45b1-86f0-e2ad323b142e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I don't need to rehash the details of the assassination, the manhunt, or the coverage since.
But there is one part of this that's worth calling out: **the press has been reckless in its coverage of social media and how people are responding to Thompson 's murder**. What they're doing risks making things worse.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTUyOTIzNDQzLCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzMzOTI0OTY2LCJleHAiOjE3MzY1MTY5NjYsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.2as3UXicq8pfMOfOKv5EJmqsAmRvy6rtKhkw47T0Up8?)
### "Folk hero" is an asinine headline
From _[The New York Times](https://substack.com/redirect/ecd49709-49ae-4237-915d-8ba93ac2365a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to _[The Wall Street Journal](https://substack.com/redirect/0ab282cf-0b5a-493e-91a8-8ae38a3fbd85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to _[The Washington Post](https://substack.com/redirect/569cc8df-2a74-4abe-8ed6-b62b07691aed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to _[USA Today](https://substack.com/redirect/be0b6f2c-4424-44a6-9a5e-ed7ce285ff9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , from _[Daily Kos](https://substack.com/redirect/d6e76488-41a1-48bd-a929-46447977a9ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _to _[CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/0f141739-f0e3-45d3-a5cb-7dbb81c5db5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to _[Fox News](https://substack.com/redirect/22aa8f7f-5fd3-44c4-908e-e8cac67a019a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to _[Breitbart](https://substack.com/redirect/3b2f346d-7f9e-47f7-ba95-95e1ef658f06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , a consistent narrative has emerged: there's support for Thompson's murderer on social media.1 The _NYT_ 's article was particularly flagrant.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ecd49709-49ae-4237-915d-8ba93ac2365a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There's an axiom in politics that "[Twitter isn't real life](https://substack.com/redirect/05d1e516-5fb9-4e37-9f89-60cf159ca2fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."2 That's true not only of Twitter, whose users and posters [aren't at all representative of the general public](https://substack.com/redirect/e4d4b3e3-e324-46b2-940c-821ba41c8bb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),3 but also of [social media more generally](https://substack.com/redirect/d3ea7e83-e996-446c-b9b9-21fd640f9eaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where a vast majority of the posts come from a tiny percentage of the users.
I'm absent from social media entirely, but I've had enough friends send me screenshots to know that there _are_ people out there celebrating Thompson's murder. I'm not denying that. But by drawing so much attention to it, not only does it misstate the views of the average American, it actually risks making things much worse.
**Reporters are not properly contextualizing what these posts mean** , and the picture they're painting of an angry, violent public is fundamentally disconnected from reality.
### The vast majority of Americans do not support political violence
Political violence is a very real problem. There's a reason that when we say "January 6," people know what you're referring to. [I've written about political violence](https://substack.com/redirect/35d3dd00-a342-42dc-b0cc-1f64c5e2e368?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--it's alarming and worth addressing head-on.
But the overwhelming majority of Americans agree that political violence is bad. There are polls that say [21% of Americans believe political violence is acceptable](https://substack.com/redirect/31914c6c-ffa4-4f9c-b6c4-68f71592ed62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but those polls meaningfully overstate how likely Americans are to _actually_ believe in political violence. Here's why:
* From _[FiveThirtyEight](https://substack.com/redirect/96aecf6c-4eb1-45b8-8442-eff75f8e02aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ : "Some of these responses [to political violence in polls] can be chalked up to [respondents not paying close enough attention, vaguely worded questions or both](https://substack.com/redirect/fc892e4d-6a2e-4e75-9dd0-7c3ebaaa2fa5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)... [When] presented with specific examples of political violence, between 89 and 100 percent of respondents wanted a suspect in a politically motivated violent crime charged."4
* From [Pew Research Center](https://substack.com/redirect/e4cc84e5-bb79-4b78-be90-85dd1563ca65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): "Online opt-in polls can produce misleading results, especially for young people and Hispanic adults."5 There are a few reasons why,6 but in short, people don't have a strong incentive to answer questions honestly--and in many cases, aren't.

The murder of Brian Thompson is political violence. We know that now, and it's important and fair to call it out as such.
But saying that "some people" view him as a "folk hero" as front-page news with no context? That's sensationalist and misleading. Even in the era of incendiary politics we live in, **Americans do not support political violence** like Thompson's assassination.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=152923443&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTIzNDQzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM5MjQ5NjYsImV4cCI6MTczNjUxNjk2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lJDVe4vYgXz1efSFXz2WX7XlkjPZ2uc_pm88Zh7CN-8)
### This media coverage is more than misleading. It's dangerous.
In journalism, it's well understood that covering suicide has to be done delicately. Why? Because if it's done without sensitivity, it leads to an increase in the suicide rate. [Suicide contagion](https://substack.com/redirect/6c9c0df5-9922-4ee4-9146-36d85407a51e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as it's known, is [tragically a real phenomenon](https://substack.com/redirect/89ed243d-ada2-4e35-86e7-6003a1aa8138?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Consequently, there are guides for how the press should report on suicide. Here are [two](https://substack.com/redirect/3418b953-a8e2-4d53-9fd7-44ff64bf301e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [examples](https://substack.com/redirect/33a72c16-a7c8-48b3-a8d2-17c4d4589a56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The conclusion from the studies on this--and there are literally [more than 100](https://substack.com/redirect/3418b953-a8e2-4d53-9fd7-44ff64bf301e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that reach similar conclusions--is that glamorizing suicides makes other suicides more likely.
This phenomenon isn't limited to suicide, by the way. It's true of [eating disorders](https://substack.com/redirect/44ed2ad2-d440-41b0-91d9-a047af96a2cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It's also true of [school shootings](https://substack.com/redirect/c6b801e7-0a77-4321-b170-5f3a8001d3fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [other violence](https://substack.com/redirect/5b6f93f8-2a22-46a4-8ccb-3b19e8c34a4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): even if it's not intentionally so, **coverage that glamorizes people who commit high-profile acts of violence increases the odds of others doing the same**.
The _NYT_ and other media outlets should know better. The press cannot control what goes viral online, but I genuinely fear that their coverage could lead to more violence.
### One final thought
One thing that should be alarming, coming out of all of this, and something I'd like to see covered more: the breadth of surveillance in New York City (and potentially elsewhere).
Obviously, I'm glad that police tracked down a murderer. But I'm also unsettled by just how many cameras had eyes on someone's every move for the better part of a week.
[In places like Hong Kong](https://substack.com/redirect/31d6b9b8-d718-4c5a-99fa-a2c75dacedb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), we've already seen the consequences of this much surveillance. And in a world where Trump is threatening to [somewhat indiscriminately deport migrants](https://substack.com/redirect/6e11f996-d56f-43d6-bc28-29cf2edc3612?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and use the Department of Justice as a [tool for personal vengeance](https://substack.com/redirect/9076f9ed-2dc9-46a0-b372-c6a1c092724b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), it's worth thinking hard about whether we're comfortable with this tradeoff of privacy vs. security.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTUyOTIzNDQzLCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzMzOTI0OTY2LCJleHAiOjE3MzY1MTY5NjYsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.2as3UXicq8pfMOfOKv5EJmqsAmRvy6rtKhkw47T0Up8?)
_**Feel free to share this post with someone who will find this interesting.** (If you're reading this email because someone sent it to you, [please consider subscribing](https://substack.com/redirect/e1911d73-bf48-4ca1-964e-a50f214991da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)_
_I do not receive direct replies to this email. For press inquiries, please contact press@ben-samuels.com._
1
As a general rule: if you're writing an article that's just a recap of things you read on social media, you're producing shitty journalism.
Also as a general rule, on social media and in real life: don't applaud death. Exceptions: really none.
2
Any of us who have been thoroughly dragged online for [criticizing "Defund the Police,"](https://substack.com/redirect/ede9605a-c8b5-470a-9298-44be26d7f786?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a movement that was [never popular](https://substack.com/redirect/b6e8daf7-17a0-4da7-803c-7b753deb256b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [always a terrible idea](https://substack.com/redirect/388b5820-965b-4f31-a9ec-c5189f64d61d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), can speak to that.
Candidly, I think the media really missed the mark on this one too, probably for the same set of reasons--loud voices on social media do not represent the views of the public, but they do a good job inundating our feeds.
3
In a post-Elon world, that's probably even truer now than it was in 2022, when that research was published.
4
Obviously, that last part--the percentage of people who want perpetrators of political violence charged--is particularly salient here, and a good reflection of the fact that support for this murder is not the norm, despite what some of the press coverage has looked like.
5
The data on this are robust to a degree that _The Economist_ [had to walk back an article](https://substack.com/redirect/058d56c1-cc9c-4625-bbbc-8027ff332d21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that claimed one-in-five young Americans believe that the Holocaust was a myth. This is the topic of a much longer conversation--Holocaust denial is a very real problem, and education levels related to the Holocaust and WWII are waning. [I wrote about this literally last week](https://substack.com/redirect/9983f0c5-2e02-4396-9af1-ff339ebe21e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But it's also important to recognize that these surveys, sometimes, can overstate the scale of these problems.
6
From [Pew](https://substack.com/redirect/e4cc84e5-bb79-4b78-be90-85dd1563ca65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): "In particular, several recent studies have documented large errors in online opt-in surveys due to the presence of so-called ['bogus respondents.'](https://substack.com/redirect/983fcfc4-e5fe-4c28-8458-977078298ac2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) These respondents do not answer questions sincerely; instead, they attempt to complete surveys with as little effort as possible to earn money or other rewards."

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..Xrr2PMrA2wu8LxUjx6ydrXGhifhsyhRFh-PWkncYYM4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

But saying that "some people" view him as a "folk hero" as front-page news with no context? That's sensationalist and misleading. Even in the era of incendiary politics we live in, Americans do not support political violence like Thompson's assassination. This media coverage is more than misleading. It's dangerous. In journalism, it's well understood that covering suicide has to be done delicately. Why? Because if it's done without sensitivity, it leads to an increase in the suicide rate. , as it's known, is . Consequently, there are guides for how the press should report on suicide. Here are . The conclusion from the studies on this--and there are literally that reach similar conclusions--is that glamorizing suicides makes other suicides more likely. This phenomenon isn't limited to suicide, by the way. It's true of . It's also true of and : even if it's not intentionally so, coverage that glamorizes people who commit high-profile acts of violence increases the odds of others doing the same. The NYT and other media outlets should know better. The press cannot control what goes viral online, but I genuinely fear that their coverage could lead to more violence. One final thought One thing that should be alarming, coming out of all of this, and something I'd like to see covered more: the breadth of surveillance in New York City (and potentially elsewhere). Obviously, I'm glad that police tracked down a murderer. But I'm also unsettled by just how many cameras had eyes on someone's every move for the better part of a week. , we've already seen the consequences of this much surveillance. And in a world where Trump is threatening to and use the Department of Justice as a , it's worth thinking hard about whether we're comfortable with this tradeoff of privacy vs. security. ? Feel free to share this post with someone who will find this interesting. (If you're reading this email because someone sent it to you, .) I do not receive direct replies to this email. For press inquiries, please contact press@ben-samuels.com. 1 As a general rule: if you're writing an article that's just a recap of things you read on social media, you're producing shitty journalism. Also as a general rule, on social media and in real life: don't applaud death. Exceptions: really none. 2 Any of us who have been thoroughly dragged online for a movement that was and , can speak to that. Candidly, I think the media really missed the mark on this one too, probably for the same set of reasons--loud voices on social media do not represent the views of the public, but they do a good job inundating our feeds. 3 In a post-Elon world, that's probably even truer now than it was in 2022, when that research was published. 4 Obviously, that last part--the percentage of people who want perpetrators of political violence charged--is particularly salient here, and a good reflection of the fact that support for this murder is not the norm, despite what some of the press coverage has looked like. 5 The data on this are robust to a degree that The Economist that claimed one-in-five young Americans believe that the Holocaust was a myth. This is the topic of a much longer conversation--Holocaust denial is a very real problem, and education levels related to the Holocaust and WWII are waning. . But it's also important to recognize that these surveys, sometimes, can overstate the scale of these problems. 6 From : "In particular, several recent studies have documented large errors in online opt-in surveys due to the presence of so-called These respondents do not answer questions sincerely; instead, they attempt to complete surveys with as little effort as possible to earn money or other rewards." | | | (C) 2024 Ben Samuels 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

Sen. John Kennedy boldly _**[accused a Biden nominee of lying under oath](https://substack.com/redirect/ab6b033a-2572-4288-92dc-5fc56a2461d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ during a Senate Judiciary Committee hearing.
Sen. Charles Grassley asked the witness if she was ever associated with the far-left organization Worker's Dignity. When she confidently said "no" and rejected that she held the radical values of the organization, Kennedy dropped a bomb...
"You just lied to Sen. Grassley, didn't you?!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ab6b033a-2572-4288-92dc-5fc56a2461d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Watch the nominee scramble to respond, because Kennedy did not just make a wild accusation; he brought receipts!
"I have never represented that organization," the nominee insisted to Kennedy.
"That's not true, is it?" Kennedy doubled down.
And then she finally ADMITS IT! Watch what Kennedy does next right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ab6b033a-2572-4288-92dc-5fc56a2461d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Woke PUNK tries to trigger Vivek - It IMMEDIATELY backfires!**
A liberal college student from Penn State _**[tried to TRIGGER Vivek Ramaswamy](https://substack.com/redirect/04ec6cb6-6e9f-4a0b-b6e8-4aec395d8202?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ during the Q&A portion of his speech. Watch how Vivek handles this situation like a pro!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/13b2ab1d-c97a-482f-8905-32633ce78909?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You put your ideas forward and you like to think it triggers the libs,... it makes people angry," the student started his question. "I just think it's a bit hypocritical when I could say the same thing back to you."
"I could say that 'gender is non-binary' and it would pull the same reaction from you, right?" the student continued.
_**[Vivek calmly responded, with a big smile,](https://substack.com/redirect/04ec6cb6-6e9f-4a0b-b6e8-4aec395d8202?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ "tell me the most hypocritical thing i've said and I'll address it."
The student starts to get VERY nervous as he searches his brain for an example in front of the large crowd. "When you put this idea forward it doesn't make me angry. It just makes me realize I'm talking to a dumbass quite frankly."
Vivek paused before responding to the personal insult. _**[Watch how he handles this situation like a total boss.](https://substack.com/redirect/04ec6cb6-6e9f-4a0b-b6e8-4aec395d8202?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/13b2ab1d-c97a-482f-8905-32633ce78909?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Riley Gaines REFUSES to BACK DOWN when woke guests try to bully her on live tv**
_**[Riley Gaines doesn't back down](https://substack.com/redirect/d6d9f819-3048-4e1d-b7f7-5dc3ac1a3ec8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ when several woke guests try to gang up on her and shame her for her comments on transgender issues during a fierce Piers Morgan panel debate.
"There's always this conversation about the "woke" group that's pushing an agenda, but we gotta be real about people like her (Gaines) who are pushing a far-right agenda!" one of the left-wing panelist accused.
Piers Morgan even jumped in to defend Gaines, "She's not far-right!!"
_**[Watch the chaos ramp-up when Riley responds...](https://substack.com/redirect/d6d9f819-3048-4e1d-b7f7-5dc3ac1a3ec8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and they REALLY don't like what she says.
