Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *
| [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4zp2i7pkqbsup61o7v6hyrqucp38lxcvwyh2g9eiru1imypdsexl3lk108q7jtfwjqd2ju93u0skurkqqrhg8ksrgns3jjby0gg3r585dz7zhagushcp8gqdmx2d6spf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soc176&__onlt=h "Headline") Fellow Concerned American: Dynamics in the Middle East are fluid. In fact, they’re changing by the minute in Syria and world leaders are looking to President-Elect Trump for guidance as we saw in Paris! Rather than ensure he hits the ground running, D.C. insiders are doing all they can to stymie him; putting up dangerous obstacles in his path. Some are scared that Trump will restore America's might in this world. **Simply put, they don't want a strong and powerful America.** [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4zp2i7pkqbsup61o7v6hyrqucp38lxcvwzrbyl6nsmaw6a9u29l7qe6akw4csjb3wvcoiiydau5ovd9fpy5wh61kyfg7xb4il81l080l3az69qg5av8dwga85zr1om5j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soc176&__onlt=h "Blueprint for the Trump Administration")**But we do.** That's why we've released a _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ that safeguards American values, enhances national security, and strengthens global alliances. And we want to give this to you as a thank you for your support. **[If you want to learn how the Trump administration can effectively confront Iranian aggression, Islamism, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict while restoring America's greatness, then get your copy today!](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4zp2i7pkqbsup61o7v6hyrqucp38lxcvwa0oravct3n82c58zdorbwroihh90pwy7abyin0rglfcx2x8oerntpztro8n9sw7jx9gxmferc2az4fei6d5igjb0bdnu3jw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soc176&__onlt=h "If you want to learn how the Trump administration can effectively confront Iranian aggression, Islamism, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict while restoring America's greatness, then get your copy today!")** Our mission at the Middle East Forum is simple – to promote American interests in the Middle East and protect Western values from Middle Eastern threats. Because we know that protecting our border and increasing deportations of those here illegally is tied directly to what’s happening in the Middle East. That’s why it’s also vital that Americans Deep Six the Deep State before they have a chance to deep-six Trump's agenda in the Middle East. **[And we would love to send you the _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ today as a thank you for your support of $25 or more.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4zp2i7pkqbsup61o7v6hyrqucp38lxcvwawl8pj5thjhke0l98ba0oa0h7xdvfs4gfaihbq41tu4ypiznkb23x907gyqj7luhktc6pyxddu70gfs3g9w8h75he3xzjbh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soc176&__onlt=h "And we would love to send you the Blueprint for the Trump Administration today as a thank you for your support of $25 or more.")** You have the chance to join us in restoring American might and glory both in the Middle East and throughout the world, all while keeping our homeland safe. **Our book,_Reasserting American Power in the Middle East_ , covers all of these issues and much more:**
* Establishing a “Commission on Islamism” to survey American Islamist movements and establish new approaches for disrupting and thwarting Islamist ideological networks.
* Enhancing Israel’s security by providing it with the material and diplomatic support necessary to defeat Iran’s proxies.
* Enforcing transparency in foreign funding of American universities and curtailing campus extremism.

**It’s time to Make America Safe Again, but that can’t happen unless we deep-six the deep state before they deep-six Trump's agenda in the Middle East.** **[Learn how and get your copy of the _Blueprint for the Trump Administration_ today.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=4zp2i7pkqbsup61o7v6hyrqucp38lxcvwb5y13mwuawvgfibgc2in4iafvom39nztka6h3de7l6uzb82n4kebegv0p0uwlqfgnbxdsrr3ejbqwf3ntdkwhsycgrhfdty&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soc176&__onlt=h "Learn how and get your copy of the Blueprint for the Trump Administration today.")** Please use this Blueprint to increase your expertise and knowledge into what it will take to safeguard America’s might and glory. Keeping America Safe, Gregg Roman
Director and COO

clean_body: Please read the message below from our sponsor. Steve Thompson, Editor | "Headline" Fellow Concerned American: Dynamics in the Middle East are fluid. In fact, they’re changing by the minute in Syria and world leaders are looking to President-Elect Trump for guidance as we saw in Paris! Rather than ensure he hits the ground running, D.C. insiders are doing all they can to stymie him; putting up dangerous obstacles in his path. Some are scared that Trump will restore America's might in this world. Simply put, they don't want a strong and powerful America. "Blueprint for the Trump Administration"But we do. That's why we've released a Blueprint for the Trump Administration that safeguards American values, enhances national security, and strengthens global alliances. And we want to give this to you as a thank you for your support. "If you want to learn how the Trump administration can effectively confront Iranian aggression, Islamism, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict while restoring America's greatness, then get your copy today!" Our mission at the Middle East Forum is simple – to promote American interests in the Middle East and protect Western values from Middle Eastern threats. Because we know that protecting our border and increasing deportations of those here illegally is tied directly to what’s happening in the Middle East. That’s why it’s also vital that Americans Deep Six the Deep State before they have a chance to deep-six Trump's agenda in the Middle East. "And we would love to send you the Blueprint for the Trump Administration today as a thank you for your support of $25 or more." You have the chance to join us in restoring American might and glory both in the Middle East and throughout the world, all while keeping our homeland safe. Our book,Reasserting American Power in the Middle East , covers all of these issues and much more: Establishing a “Commission on Islamism” to survey American Islamist movements and establish new approaches for disrupting and thwarting Islamist ideological networks. Enhancing Israel’s security by providing it with the material and diplomatic support necessary to defeat Iran’s proxies. Enforcing transparency in foreign funding of American universities and curtailing campus extremism. It’s time to Make America Safe Again, but that can’t happen unless we deep-six the deep state before they deep-six Trump's agenda in the Middle East. "Learn how and get your copy of the Blueprint for the Trump Administration today." Please use this Blueprint to increase your expertise and knowledge into what it will take to safeguard America’s might and glory. body:

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os1MV_xWND

Dear Friend,

Historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has
written an insightful eBook, Victory and the Savior Generals,
which you can download for free.

Throughout history, certain leaders have turned around
seemingly hopeless situations with their unique vision and
skills. These savior generals displayed exceptional leadership
and strategic thinking.

In this eBook, you will explore the key traits that defined
these generals, how they approached conflict, never accepted
failure, and adapted out of necessity. You'll learn about their
innovative ideas, bold decisions, and steadfast courage and how
they turned the tide in critical moments.

Already downloaded by more than 30,000 people in the last 6
months, you don't want to miss your chance to learn from
history's most influential leaders from one of our country's most
esteemed historians.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this
exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and
Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven
policy research organization that seeks to improve the human
condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity,
national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one
hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that
have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

CA USA 94305

body:

name: NDRC Election Results
subject: State-Level Results Analysis: Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Democrats flipped a newly drawn congressional seat → another example of what fair maps can accomplish.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98516266/516913779/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkY2RhZTQ4LWM4YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5y0wRdcdNfmaK3MvrbFroWu-nWtJd1Jy32qU4O8ni7I=&emci=2a945d4c-27b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=7dcdae48-c8b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98516267/516913780/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AlabamaStateAnalysis_email_20241211-NDRC-Tier1-AlabamaStateAnalysis_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241211-NDRC-Tier1-AlabamaStateAnalysis_&utm_campaign=AlabamaStateAnalysis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkY2RhZTQ4LWM4YjctZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5y0wRdcdNfmaK3MvrbFroWu-nWtJd1Jy32qU4O8ni7I=)
---
Peter,
Today we’re breaking down Alabama’s election results. If you read our note about results in Louisiana, this may sound familiar — and that’s because it’s fairly simple: **When fair maps are in place, voters have a fair shot at equal representation.**
This November, Alabama voters elected **_two_** Black members of Congress. _For the first_ time in history, the state — which is 25% Black — will have two of its seven districts held by Black representatives at the same time.
**How did we get here?**
This victory ties _directly_ back to the landmark Supreme Court case _Allen v. Milligan_. The Court’s 2023 decision upheld Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act and ruled that Alabama’s congressional map illegally diluted the power of Black voters.
The ruling required Alabama to redraw its maps to include a second majority-Black district.
**What were we looking for in this election?**
Leading up to Election Day, Attorney General Holder was on the ground in Alabama supporting pro-democracy candidates, driving voter registration, education, and turnout.
On Election Night, we were watching results in the 2nd Congressional District — the one redrawn as a majority-Black district. **Shomari Figures, a Democrat from Mobile, AL, flipped the district**. For Alabamians, this next Congress will be the most representative of their lifetimes.
**What does this mean?**
This outcome confirms that the new congressional maps work as the Court intended — a truly representative map leads to a more representative government. It’s undeniable that the Voting Rights Act remains an extremely effective law to protect the right to vote.
**What’s next for Alabama?**
We should expect ongoing legal battles over these maps and interpretations of the Voting Rights Act.
As you might imagine, Republican leaders in the state are not interested in maps that are fair — they want maps that help their party unjustly win and hold on to power.
Just days after this November’s election, the former chair of the Alabama Republican Party weighed in on plans to undo this fair redraw of the 2nd Congressional District: “I can tell you that there is talk and it’s not going to go away. An election might be two years from now, but that does not mean our legislature might not take another look at it. It does not mean that we have to not file court cases and go to court over it.”
For now, fair maps are the law of the land in Alabama. But it’s clear we must do everything in our power to protect and strengthen them.
More to come on this — thanks so much.
Team NDRC

clean_body: Democrats flipped a newly drawn congressional seat → another example of what fair maps can accomplish. | | = Peter, Today we’re breaking down Alabama’s election results. If you read our note about results in Louisiana, this may sound familiar — and that’s because it’s fairly simple: When fair maps are in place, voters have a fair shot at equal representation. This November, Alabama voters elected two Black members of Congress. For the first time in history, the state — which is 25% Black — will have two of its seven districts held by Black representatives at the same time. How did we get here? This victory ties directly back to the landmark Supreme Court case Allen v. Milligan. The Court’s 2023 decision upheld Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act and ruled that Alabama’s congressional map illegally diluted the power of Black voters. The ruling required Alabama to redraw its maps to include a second majority-Black district. What were we looking for in this election? Leading up to Election Day, Attorney General Holder was on the ground in Alabama supporting pro-democracy candidates, driving voter registration, education, and turnout. On Election Night, we were watching results in the 2nd Congressional District — the one redrawn as a majority-Black district. Shomari Figures, a Democrat from Mobile, AL, flipped the district. For Alabamians, this next Congress will be the most representative of their lifetimes. What does this mean? This outcome confirms that the new congressional maps work as the Court intended — a truly representative map leads to a more representative government. It’s undeniable that the Voting Rights Act remains an extremely effective law to protect the right to vote. What’s next for Alabama? We should expect ongoing legal battles over these maps and interpretations of the Voting Rights Act. As you might imagine, Republican leaders in the state are not interested in maps that are fair — they want maps that help their party unjustly win and hold on to power. Just days after this November’s election, the former chair of the Alabama Republican Party weighed in on plans to undo this fair redraw of the 2nd Congressional District: “I can tell you that there is talk and it’s not going to go away. An election might be two years from now, but that does not mean our legislature might not take another look at it. It does not mean that we have to not file court cases and go to court over it.” For now, fair maps are the law of the land in Alabama. But it’s clear we must do everything in our power to protect and strengthen them. More to come on this — thanks so much. Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. I was on Fake News ABC when _**chaos**_ erupted.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds and I NEED you to read this because without you, I wouldn’t have stood a chance against Trump-Deranged Martha Raddatz.
Before I had time to thank her for having me on her show, she started INSULTING President Trump, our MAGA House Majority, and questioning EVERYTHING we plan to do at the southern border.
Here are the FACTS I laid out plain and simple:
FACT: Biden-Harris broke our border ON PURPOSE.
FACT: The Biden-Harris open border destroyed communities & got Americans killed.
FACT: Trump has a mandate to secure the border & deport illegals.
Suddenly, before I could even finish, she tried to shut me down saying: “ _I’m going to have to stop you there._ ”
My Mom taught me to always mind my manners, so I calmly explained to her that on DAY ONE of Trump’s Administration, we’re going to get the southern border under control, and ended it there.
But if it weren’t for the generous support of folks like you, ABC would’ve continued to get away with spinning the truth with no repercussions, and I have YOU to thank for keeping me in the fight.
With the inauguration almost here, we HAVE to keep up the momentum, so, please, if you can, could you chip in today to my _**[Fake News Offensive Fund](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b9115a17e0c1403780d3f12c5a347526&_e=rEwjmmvsLMl6Rxry6vDRa1WJavSZCXP2RJdDXyTS7RAXqlnDn6Gp1quokbgaVtyxwcXZPUYEXHxLotw5R_Ozt6SxPpAsQ6hG0FsTjCO0pRRzyCgWg_ibsCOL1EWC4GcfwyqAlUzaswStKeQdSyXcgXWpX9JvkIyTd5LZA84fpginVew2Y1MENV4mwdjwCXJTc01V04k3IHI9BVRfpzMY6Ptb4_w7Kl5aK1inrgEdtyl6glAHsPOpmYEBcc45BSl-EMVX4xXSqb3c48yS7Tshpsf3-UJbNl-KIp5CdZe36qEzRnV0TeMEKh7W9aJz4EjLu9RKQeNwoXGykoC8T8Q8I0fwF_GXYkb83FUfSlpgyR0Qr7I8KJXf4TK8RWDDwju0_G-umguHPoh--URTs9HBAWkSAnuEp4LgHxi0hRqFP9kVy8HjOm_h4M-0lSlR2P_FLyFZ0wu-Gfr8rdkDTppYd3D0GQncmoBwOcOlwksK6lXDqee6hTOxv8OK9z584D_F)**_ to help me stay in the fight?_****__****_

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “Calls for Giuliani to be held in contempt of court”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
“He’s not going to be permitted to speak.”
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2078f6a5c8f249b38707d0be05fc5cf6&_e=oEMnQ4Qxh0xoHjTQVyhwkn2zLUVk1SipJuj30AiXA3CIGZo-mwyC1lzpDZz24TdX4l-Ue5xbGegDTzQ9FlaOgm1syswvWeBH2kK7LB9oBNtIwOeMcfrmF80UxORGA6mOBIBRLnz8_aX5sekrsZHwahVphPTdRtfuIeoyeirPM38Jvlur9pfEoeEhDk6Jwti3m0oG8SBFbBIczPdQXzVuqf0dF51inmirkX5QBw0_q8qmPUY-NprLKbziBn97cMA-m2WFNHjslsXlE1pJiXZcqBvBzdOD-FtWKpIY7C61Qkfvor0cl_HH_tqupNxeX5GHfL_V5raIOPvsERqOlUIXBPPtQS1_qLv4QUA3KDE3JeBb0XnAVhxk9x3n4wOEBLRLHPUZsIefv6xvcQHNdEG-ig%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly **_“hold me in contempt.”_**
---
Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – _yours truly_ – bankrupt and behind bars.
---
During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, __I will not be permitted to speak.__
---
It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech.
---
But I will _never_ _surrender_ this battle, _because**freedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for.**_
---
They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom!
---
**With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you.**
---
_Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can keep fighting for my rights and freedom against the Left’s vicious witch hunt.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2078f6a5c8f249b38707d0be05fc5cf6&_e=oEMnQ4Qxh0xoHjTQVyhwkn2zLUVk1SipJuj30AiXA3CIGZo-mwyC1lzpDZz24TdX4l-Ue5xbGegDTzQ9FlaOgm1syswvWeBH2kK7LB9oBNtIwOeMcfrmF80UxORGA6mOBIBRLnz8_aX5sekrsZHwahVphPTdRtfuIeoyeirPM38Jvlur9pfEoeEhDk6Jwti3m0oG8SBFbBIczPdQXzVuqf0dF51inmirkX5QBw0_q8qmPUY-NprLKbziBn97cMA-BVLf-cczuUnrPoRtCurYPoyVfY-Cix9QYExI0UYdF0QNaBXQa_gfR8ua8jHQ-2UCa1k_Qwyx9402JgGTftT_MgRU81uTotmSBCMfxuHOyS2pmfHvEu_Wupb9P186MrXoLITZSPRHGV5z-06vhyLbIQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: “He’s not going to be permitted to speak.” | Dear Peter, According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly “hold me in contempt.” Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – yours truly – bankrupt and behind bars. During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, I will not be permitted to speak. It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech. But I will never surrender this battle, becausefreedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for. They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom! With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you. Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/81f651c0-ef03-4c42-86c1-74c4d53f71be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo: Jennifer Peltz/AP
Daniel Penny (the marine) was acquitted in chokehold death of Jordan Neely. It resulted in two diverging responses -**Applause vs. Uproar and Relief vs. Rage.**
The deceased was Neely, a 30-year-old who was a homeless man who made threats on an uptown F train on May 1, 2023. Arguments were made that he died from his schizophrenia, his drug use (with K2 in his system), his genetic conditions and his continued struggle with Penny once he was restrained.
It is also important to mention that he is a **career criminal** in a system that does not punish nor imprison repeat offenders. _**Therefore, the deterrence factor against criminal behavior is removed**_. Neely reportedly had 42 arrests. including petty larceny theft, and three unprovoked attacks on women. These innocent victims and their suffering is a consequence of our revolving door criminal justice system that does not protect the victims.
"I think the jurors all put themselves in that subway car, heard the fear of the passengers and identified with it -- and rejected the criminalization of the actions Mr. Penny took in the face of clear danger," Thomas J. Curran, a former assistant DA in Manhattan, told The Post.
Following the verdict, Mayor Eric Adams, noted that this case and the death highlighted the flaws in our system that failed Neely and others suffering from mental health issues and/or drug dependency.
Many have called for the resignation of Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg for this case and for bringing other recent cases, including against President Donald Trump.
Verdicts have consequences. They either send a message to deter future behavior or they lead to a riot-like behavior. Well in this case, the worst of both outcomes has occurred:
_**1) Good Samaritans will be afraid to step up to protect others and await for law enforcement which could result in greater public harm; and**_
_**2) The riot behavior increased with protestors following the verdict will continue to create conflict.**_
This verdict and cases like this continue to exacerbate the cracks in the American foundation that have been weaponized, especially in politics: race, crime, mental health and treatment of homeless.
**In this instance, Neely was Black. Penny is White. Race played no part of Penny 's decision to come to the aid. He simply employed his training to put service above self and put his own life at risk to save others.**
To be fair, there is still racism and antisemitism in this country, but that does not mean that every crime where the criminal and victim are of different races is racially motivated. **It is appalling that some are calling Penny the George Floyd of the right.**
**Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way.

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Together, We Can PROVE It!
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ_q8BGIy40AggtKciwpAnpilMSj2WSwO7vC58H_odIVDpsP5wM6BKiP6d1Sw)
---

I’m proud to announce that the Prove It Act, a bill I authored to defend small businesses, has passed in the U.S. House of Representatives.
This legislation fights President Biden’s crushing regulations and gives power back to the entrepreneurs who drive our economy.
For too long, federal red tape has strangled small businesses with compliance fees and drowned small businesses in paperwork.
With the **Prove It Act** , we will:
* **Protect small businesses** from Biden’s runaway government overreach.
* Require bureaucrats to **PROVE their regulations** won’t harm job creators.
* **Free small businesses from senseless rules** when agencies fail to comply.

But here’s the reality: Biden’s allies in the Senate don’t want this bill to succeed. They’d rather keep unelected bureaucrats in charge while hardworking small business owners suffer.
That’s where YOU come in. Will you join me in standing up for America’s job creators? **[Please add your name to support the Prove It Act and DEMAND that the Senate pass this legislation to protect entrepreneurs and small businesses from gross federal overreach.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ_q8BGIy40AggtKciwpAnpilMSj2WSwO7vC58H_odIVDpsP5wM6BKiP6d1Sw)**
---
| [ SIGN THE PETITION](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ_q8BGIy40AggtKciwpAnpilMSj2WSwO7vC58H_odIVDpsP5wM6BKiP6d1Sw)
---
We can’t let Biden’s bloated bureaucracy crush the American Dream any longer. Small businesses are the backbone of our economy, and I’m committed to putting Main Street ahead of Biden’s overreach.
The Prove It Act is the solution America needs. It forces federal agencies to PROVE their rules are fair, sensible, and not a death sentence for small businesses, or else those regulations won’t apply.Washington elites will stop at nothing to expand their control. But with your support, we can rein them in and fight for the hardworking Minnesotans who keep America strong. **[Please add your name to support the Prove It Act and DEMAND that the Senate pass this legislation to protect entrepreneurs and small businesses from gross federal overreach.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ_q8BGIy40AggtKciwpAnpilMSj2WSwO7vC58H_odIVDpsP5wM6BKiP6d1Sw) ** Thank you,

clean_body: | | | | I’m proud to announce that the Prove It Act, a bill I authored to defend small businesses, has passed in the U.S. House of Representatives. This legislation fights President Biden’s crushing regulations and gives power back to the entrepreneurs who drive our economy. For too long, federal red tape has strangled small businesses with compliance fees and drowned small businesses in paperwork. With the Prove It Act , we will: Protect small businesses from Biden’s runaway government overreach. Require bureaucrats to PROVE their regulations won’t harm job creators. Free small businesses from senseless rules when agencies fail to comply. But here’s the reality: Biden’s allies in the Senate don’t want this bill to succeed. They’d rather keep unelected bureaucrats in charge while hardworking small business owners suffer. That’s where YOU come in. Will you join me in standing up for America’s job creators? | We can’t let Biden’s bloated bureaucracy crush the American Dream any longer. Small businesses are the backbone of our economy, and I’m committed to putting Main Street ahead of Biden’s overreach. The Prove It Act is the solution America needs. It forces federal agencies to PROVE their rules are fair, sensible, and not a death sentence for small businesses, or else those regulations won’t apply.Washington elites will stop at nothing to expand their control. But with your support, we can rein them in and fight for the hardworking Minnesotans who keep America strong. ** Thank you, Brad FinstadMinnesota's 1st Congressional District | | | | | | | | PO Box 923, New Ulm, MN 56073

name: Riley Gaines
subject: WHY Women’s Rights Are Under Attack
body:
This is our opportunity
| Peter, Donald Trump’s victory brings renewed hope for conservative values. A renewed chance to set things right.
But the work is far from over. As a matter of fact, **it's just begun.** The radical left is determined to undermine women’s rights, and they still hold power all over our country, especially on college campuses. Consider this -- in recent years, males competing against women has led to female athletes who have lost out on opportunities, been exploited in changing rooms, and suffered injuries from male athletes posing as women on the opposing team. This isn't just an issue of wins and losses -- it’s about **respect** , **opportunity** , and **equality**. Now, consider this -- there is an entire political movement dedicated to cramming men into locker rooms with our daughters. Just sit with that for a second.
It is crucial that you and I stand firm against the forces that threaten our hard-fought gains. Women’s sports and opportunities are at risk, and must be protected.
At the Riley Gaines Center, **_my ambassadors and I are taking action_** to educate the public, advocate for women’s rights, and build a community of supporters. I’m asking for your help to expand our initiatives and reach even more individuals who share this vision.
Before the end of the year, I need to raise $300,000 to fully fund our Ambassador program. [Please consider a generous contribution now.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=761e5a51ff6b476b9426663429fed4ac&_e=gGCp2aZR28Mwfvwn0r_yuz2y6uNw27fuX6cwALMLI30S2E32TZt0B3gVls2x_g7_AXdobNMVQzKPDTFQVlfPeG4mzHeHdvXfWiZduc3VHuPde3c0hVrX8hQ6NpXif-ciUttu80vi-b7X5WBeznzloFoFzq-ZL2W9HzgyIxeNhlbi_XTKT8TKQzwBX4rTm2FpEOntAhMcT5MGruCkRKskqVRJYSRVHMfQ8lJBZEsHauI_2y75oRI94HBewrAoYhaN-SDTg7AjDuB2ZjRAw6qlFXt9fuMvECOO5bsgcOVn6BVABb1kO-9U0vlPmRVc6giIAMM0D3rhVBWg2sgwoT9a88aCoLeulpU4mlXl2fIQD6ywPmYeIyvOZ4F57uW3KAT8) Stand with us today to defend our rights and ensure a fair playing field for all women. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute P.S. - Your contribution today can have a profound impact. [With every dollar you give,](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=761e5a51ff6b476b9426663429fed4ac&_e=gGCp2aZR28Mwfvwn0r_yuz2y6uNw27fuX6cwALMLI30S2E32TZt0B3gVls2x_g7_AXdobNMVQzKPDTFQVlfPeG4mzHeHdvXfWiZduc3VHuPde3c0hVrX8hQ6NpXif-ciUttu80vi-b7X5WBeznzloFoFzq-ZL2W9HzgyIxeNhlbi_XTKT8TKQzwBX4rTm2FpEOntAhMcT5MGruCkRKskqVRJYSRVHMfQ8lJBZEsHauLnbdOY_FflLXQIA6Ao9SmActJ5OFfHyMp3OZhURk2Lx7nNz7BJGFPP4XvP9IAU6D0pdVyi7A61RtNXeTdJ9ySZ6ys1SdGMBdbNNS34sZYn7ddjOv3yCVXPnoApey6uaHLrcQ8tgnBJknSFZFT6PrOO) my ambassadors and I can continue to fight back and ensure that women’s voices are heard loud and clear.

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea553456-8993-4246-8463-3f72c0e9ea08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. [That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and Blue Amp Action’s today as we build the strongest foundation possible. Even $5 or $10 makes a big difference!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7c7fa58-16f3-46a5-8e5c-a7ccc82c1064/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Abigail

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te137503f-1b0c-4278-9963-23baee0a72ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Thanks to your incredible support, President Trump ushered in the

| | Friend, I wanted to check in with you this morning. Over the last several weeks, I have been thinking about all that we achieved over the course of the campaign. I want to reiterate how deeply honored and humbled I am to have the opportunity to represent our great district in Congress once again. Because of your unwavering support, we have strengthened our foundation to confront the challenges ahead and embrace the opportunities to come. As I hit the ground running in my next term, I will fight to: [✅](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=64ffade344a34b4ea8ea595475173e6a&_e=IQrBvBpSJnkBZrHzSpmkVoZ5YQxmWFZ1okWVSr2mTD1vGWhxTNBFf46XBz2WDLAeKpFoAtWKwMJLPXOGivZRsohvWXMFqriiuz4WF4w_OafQAANSVRoWySAydBQS8s593ibrZfiAei7UIe2xytfDbaF-Si3dbeymi24exqndBTzmke2ITefveudK5LAIyamzCRP_DLcxHlZvcbrJWNgeauRgFubO4FvTCzwZ1RsPflk%3D) Lower costs and reduce wasteful government spending ✅ Secure our border✅ Strengthen public safety to protect our communities Over the next two years, I pledge to work tirelessly to champion policies that address our community's most pressing concerns, and ensure your voice is both heard and strongly represented in Washington. **Thank you for your unwavering support—past, present, and future.** Thank you and be safe, Tom Kean, Jr.
---

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, I wanted to check in with you this morning. Over the last several weeks, I have been thinking about all that we achieved over the course of the campaign. I want to reiterate how deeply honored and humbled I am to have the opportunity to represent our great district in Congress once again. Because of your unwavering support, we have strengthened our foundation to confront the challenges ahead and embrace the opportunities to come. As I hit the ground running in my next term, I will fight to: Lower costs and reduce wasteful government spending ✅ Secure our border✅ Strengthen public safety to protect our communities Over the next two years, I pledge to work tirelessly to champion policies that address our community's most pressing concerns, and ensure your voice is both heard and strongly represented in Washington. Thank you for your unwavering support—past, present, and future. Thank you and be safe, Tom Kean, Jr. | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2024 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@TomKean.com.

If Tulsi Gabbard becomes Trump’s Director of National Intelligence, Republicans can GUT the deep-state and return government to the MAGA Majority.

**_I just received a message from a supporter that reminded me why I 'm fighting every day_** \- for women, girls, and everyday Americans who've been left behind by D.C. elites.

subject: Please don’t scroll away
body:
---
️☀️️To all Democrats: 🇺🇸 ️Please don’t scroll past this message. We know this isn’t the first time we’ve reached out since Election Day, so we’ll get straight to the point:
Trump’s inauguration will be here before we know it, and he’ll have a Republican Congress to do his bidding. If their proposed cabinet nominees and Project 2025 agenda are any indication, we know what we’re in for: years of chaos and disastrous policies.
We’ll need a strong and robust Democratic Party to hold them accountable -- and to organize against the destructive legislation and executive orders they’re sure to put forward on day one. But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. We’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up right now.

# BIZPAC VIP Founders Club is hosting a special VIP reception following our Christmas Party this Wednesday December 11th
Who can attend: BIZPAC Members (Members will receive separate invitation to this event with details) **_Our BIZPAC Christmas Party will be fantastic at Aston Martin, but, our VIP Reception afterward will be "off the chart." You don't want to miss it._** **-JL Trahan** **BIZPAC Founder & Executive Chairman**
---
---
# Drop by for some 200+mph excitement !
---
**See your BIZPAC Member friends and make a few new ones, too!**
---
**[See map](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=1583012.655.1.3e995732d3ff2817171ffdfa2613f545)** **Aston Martin Christmas Reception Event open to BIZPAC Members** **and** **Special Guests by exclusive invitation**
---
| | [ RSVP Now ](mailto:kim@BIZPAC.us)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=1583012.656.1.c11eda39e13fa27575509fb558202cb4)

# ATTENTION:
# Join
# Renew
# Upgrade
# your BIZPAC Membership Today
_Good Morning,_ _I hope you are planning to attend the BIZPAC Christmas reception._ _Kim, Sonu and I have been diligently working to produce one of the most fun, exciting and classiest Christmas receptions BIZPAC has ever held for our members. (see attached Christmas party invite) and RSVP with Kim@BIZPAC.us)_ _So, we are reaching out to ask TWO things from our members:_ _1) please bring a qualified member candidate with you to the Christmas Party...you never know, it might be just the thing their business needs to go to the next level_ _2) If you have not just joined or renewed, please Upgrade or Renew your membership today. BIZPAC needs your support to do our work in the Texas Legislature that has already started with bill filings._ _We ask for your support today. https://bizpac.us/join-now_ _See the special opportunities for membership below with our new VIP Founders Club._ _Sincerely,_
_JL Trahan_
_BIZPAC.us Founder and Executive Chairman_
---
| | Guest of Honor, Texas State Senator Brandon Creighton and BIZPAC Founder and Executive Chairman JL Trahan

[ ](mailto:sonu@bizpac.us)

These special elections will be one of the first opportunities to regain momentum after the setbacks to our movement on Election Day. And with the Virginia House and governorship at stake in 2025, we need to lay the groundwork for Democratic victories _now_.
With Republicans gaining power at the federal level, protecting state-level Democratic majorities is vital to protecting abortion access, voting rights, and gun safety against the MAGA agenda.
[Will you chip in $7 today to help Democrats build power in statehouses in Virginia and nationwide? clean_body: Every special election marks a chance to protect or expand Democratic seats in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. | | | | | ---|--- Next month, we’ll face our first challenges of 2025 – three special elections for seats in the Virginia House and Senate. | State | Chamber | District ---|---|--- Virginia | House | HD-26 Virginia | Senate | SD-10 Virginia | Senate | SD-32 Democrats hold the Virginia Senate by an ultra-thin margin. Holding our ground in these special elections is crucial to defending control of the chamber against a Republican power grab. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | These special elections will be one of the first opportunities to regain momentum after the setbacks to our movement on Election Day. And with the Virginia House and governorship at stake in 2025, we need to lay the groundwork for Democratic victories now. With Republicans gaining power at the federal level, protecting state-level Democratic majorities is vital to protecting abortion access, voting rights, and gun safety against the MAGA agenda. Thank you, Team DLCC | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. # **Major Banks Issue Stark Warning
About "Death of the Dollar"**

Ditching their holdings could flood America with a tsunami of US Dollars...

Peter Schiff, who famously predicted the housing crash, declares:
[_“This is going to be far more impactful than the 2008 crisis.”_](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
While Pres. Trump warns it will be like “losing a world war”.
Major banks are urging its billionaire clients to brace themselves

And with Biden caught in the headlights...
These global heavyweights are sprinting to land a final financial assault before a strong, America-first administration takes back power in November.
For practically everyone with an IRA and 401(k), it will be like walking into a hurricane with a paper umbrella.

Russell Vought, Trump’s pick to lead the Office of Management and Budget and **_co-author of Project 2025_** , has radical plans for a second Trump administration. Vought's plans include deploying the military to manage domestic unrest, defunding the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA), and instilling fear among career civil servants to undermine their effectiveness. His confirmation would also accelerate efforts to drastically cut federal programs, including Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and nutrition assistance, _thereby_ _harming millions of Americans._ At Able Dems, we fight for Americans with disabilities by electing Democrats who will defend essential social programs from Republican cuts. **We urge you to take a stand against Russell Vought's nomination to lead the Office of Management and Budget (OMB).** **[Russell Vought means to implement Trump’s dystopian vision. Sign on to tell the Senate: DO NOT confirm Russell Vought!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39NmOvaZcBPP9JnPfijpf5tFO_71LphVZjBJv0hBiv2R5n7hb38ttZM31qQTxNARy09wg103Wh92rhKuroH55p7C4UGy9tE1oFMomTFU3KyrnViF02-Ut7e-8H12Cr3I2XitRRUCPxdep1IJaQd99r2dr96xlksbm1bEj9zKz0ZSl4yk2rmdwLvaEyTn2rREtm-rlMcOUZd1gFNdp0kX7MnMYBiLG3bXmc67kz1FC4zxzUWqlW8d_X7stufuDAQTpxj_MzArXaVjnj3XfINURPkOMTngOE440DIJu5pvQwalJEf4BBT-oNZVm7z8RgmJ-FBN7wIi32NLWvBfqGuLiLWeWrbg1DX92hpL7OTCyGXM-nrfuENMbC2HpbY4qdePa5OVUb8tlWnhd63wetz8qR37d67cG8TW6P0FHHqDNUUXNW6cZDC2sprRgk9P-BGuGCcwT-Zpw1RV3l5NrTL1xoMKdOteiy0lrg7MkaJuQt_5yhoBk6AJy_14hBqKgRvLgbNYgxsyhavS4HSvqaByeHia59XGqYH2Me1hTNUZ8mT1w6UTcA8GX3iGVmEy7Y7MsF84gweuK99kk8qYZLdeh50/4c7/1a2xXaONTcOwTUv3EK3NuA/h2/h001.rcC_oTAIyEm4KOK9Fl8DenXfqtBULA9clvUHA-2Ugvs)** **** | [SIGN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39NmOvaZcBPP9JnPfijpf5tFO_71LphVZjBJv0hBiv2R5n7hb38ttZM31qQTxNARy09wg103Wh92rhKuroH55p7C4UGy9tE1oFMomTFU3KyrnViF02-Ut7e-8H12Cr3I2XitRRUCPxdep1IJaQd99r2dr96xlksbm1bEj9zKz0ZSl4yk2rmdwLvaEyTn2rREtm-rlMcOUZd1gFNdp0kX7MnMYBiLG3bXmc67kz1FC4zxzUWqlW8d_X7stufuDAQTpxj_MzArXaVjnj3XfINURPkOMTngOE440DIJu5pvQwalJEf4BBT-oNZVm7z8RgmJ-Fr1t_YNXXdeUygJWxftXx9WJ2BlGXMeTmLDOBhf1jW16iHbeP8fLcWe3fb6lKb7SopsNJ_9W5itbMHOgyDBiKnWijwM8_Go7iKM9OUhjdddg_3XAPlLK2jAb5woIz_W2UErjV0x0PjWyjy3BOkADuhdKiuU3IiZcBwUihUBHgru0RlVOJwrmWObYkNOOTmS4P-mikCi-n3eRPU02ZbZQZ7crnbNKf3EvjkURSwABPIpXIsEx5HW5bvAbJo1ItHuJQWWs_p6tCn192DJGqt2Xh9/4c7/1a2xXaONTcOwTUv3EK3NuA/h3/h001.Q5_5AqEt6hYY3_tYDFI1G1AmbAnlRtOhjBPngayFC0c)

Vought’s speeches reveal a commitment to dismantling independent agencies and undermining democratic norms.
His plans closely align with Trump's campaign rhetoric, which includes using the military to confront domestic protesters, whom Trump has referred to as the "enemy within."
Appointing Vought to the OMB would likely result in policies that prioritize authoritarian objectives over the well-being of citizens.
**We cannot allow such a pivotal role to be filled by someone whose strategies could dismantle vital services and erode democratic processes.**

subject: MassGOP Demands Action: Attorney General Campbell Must Defend Voter Mandate and Legislative Accountability
body:
| | | | |

| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010o8StlEehrR0s3cYj5Dim-7TtwhYg88zKpKqXAf1NHpWKWG3HVRZ7tVzp3LyrvBpUfQ8xEJB9kTCRvCW6vILFyvse4zf2pxUGlKF6-7O4geUKONLNhVT_bLQre5-rUdFCFESP6p9ijHUNBu3ZOWc-g==&c=I4FyqsPdr4fwtPNZl00-F_mOi7UW9SMtfIbVW36Md5ifwcto7Orzow==&ch=sA10vlmr1343eoKuRpnVLnDx0qFKpCiex-1iS-Jv9U29iiBFt_1Wmg==)

| MassGOP Demands Action: Attorney General Campbell Must Defend Voter Mandate and Legislative Accountability
---
---
| Boston, MA- The Democratic supermajority in the Massachusetts Legislature has brazenly claimed that auditing its operations falls outside the Auditor's jurisdiction--an assertion that blatantly undermines the authority granted by the voters. Yet, Attorney General Andrea Campbell has refused to take a definitive stance on this critical issue, dismissing it as 'not her place' to weigh in.
This failure of leadership is unacceptable. When disputes arise between branches of government, the Attorney General has a duty to step forward, uphold the rule of law, and provide clarity to the public. Massachusetts voters overwhelmingly supported this measure, and they deserve assurance that their mandate is being respected and enforced.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale issued a sharp rebuke, stating, "Attorney General Campbell should take a stand, defend the voters' mandate, and ensure legislative accountability. Her silence not only erodes public trust but also raises serious questions about whether she's avoiding this issue to protect the Legislature from political fallout."
Carnevale continued, "This is straightforward. Massachusetts consistently ranks among the least transparent governments in the nation. Residents are fed up with backdoor deals and legislators operating in secrecy. Auditor Diana DiZoglio recognized this and offered a ballot question that voters overwhelmingly endorsed. The government must prioritize the will of the people over shielding their own interests."
"It's time for Attorney General Campbell to choose--defend the people's mandate or remain complicit in the Legislature's attempts to avoid accountability. The people of Massachusetts deserve better," Carnevale concluded.
###

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | MassGOP Demands Action: Attorney General Campbell Must Defend Voter Mandate and Legislative Accountability | Boston, MA- The Democratic supermajority in the Massachusetts Legislature has brazenly claimed that auditing its operations falls outside the Auditor's jurisdiction--an assertion that blatantly undermines the authority granted by the voters. Yet, Attorney General Andrea Campbell has refused to take a definitive stance on this critical issue, dismissing it as 'not her place' to weigh in. This failure of leadership is unacceptable. When disputes arise between branches of government, the Attorney General has a duty to step forward, uphold the rule of law, and provide clarity to the public. Massachusetts voters overwhelmingly supported this measure, and they deserve assurance that their mandate is being respected and enforced. MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale issued a sharp rebuke, stating, "Attorney General Campbell should take a stand, defend the voters' mandate, and ensure legislative accountability. Her silence not only erodes public trust but also raises serious questions about whether she's avoiding this issue to protect the Legislature from political fallout." Carnevale continued, "This is straightforward. Massachusetts consistently ranks among the least transparent governments in the nation. Residents are fed up with backdoor deals and legislators operating in secrecy. Auditor Diana DiZoglio recognized this and offered a ballot question that voters overwhelmingly endorsed. The government must prioritize the will of the people over shielding their own interests." "It's time for Attorney General Campbell to choose--defend the people's mandate or remain complicit in the Legislature's attempts to avoid accountability. The people of Massachusetts deserve better," Carnevale concluded. | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

| | Dear Peter, Time is running out to protect Oregon's Owyhee Canyonlands - we know this. This special place needs our help now and your gift - _of any amount_ \- will help us push this movement forward, showing our elected officials what the Owyhee Canyonlands means to us. The Owyhee Canyonlands is a place like no other. It is 2.5 million acres of deep, rugged canyons, rolling sagebrush grasslands, and rushing rivers. The Owyhee is not only home to 200 species of wildlife, but also hosts 28 plants that can’t be found anywhere else in the world. It's critical that we protect this special place. name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: They want to gut the VA, Medicare, Medicaid, and so mch more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
It's not hard to see the coming train wreck when you listen to Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy talk about their new "government efficiency" department: DOGE. It's a disaster waiting to happen , for the simple reason that they don't understand the fundamental difference between a business and a government -- one is built for profit, the other is built to serve people.
Sign on today to oppose this wrongheaded government takeover >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121124_1&amount=25]
Team:
We have to act now to urge Congress to oppose the creation of the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and the proposed appointments of Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to this agency.
This new department, introduced by President-elect Donald Trump, is billed as a means to streamline federal operations . But instead, this department is expected to pave the way for widespread deregulation, corporate favoritism, and diminished government accountability.
We believe, these reasons among many, make Musk and Ramaswamy’s DOGE a disaster waiting to happen.
Please, add your name: Stand against Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
The reasons are clear: [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
1. Lack of Public Service Experience: Musk and Ramaswamy are corporate moguls with no background in public service. Government is about serving people, not profit—something neither of these leaders has shown a commitment to.

2. Conflicts of Interest: Both have significant business ties to industries that benefit from lax regulations. Putting them in charge of efficiency reform risks favoritism toward their interests and big businesses, rather than safeguarding public needs.

3. Deregulation Disguised as Efficiency: "Efficiency" here could mean removing protections. With Musk and Ramaswamy at the helm, we could see environmental, labor, and consumer protections slashed under the guise of "streamlining."

4. Privatization of Public Services: DOGE could push to outsource critical government functions to corporations, reducing transparency and accountability to taxpayers, while increasing corporate profits.

5. Threat to Democracy: Government must be accountable to the people, not corporate elites. This department could erode public trust and prioritize corporate power over democratic values.
Sign on now to stand against Elon and Vivek’s appointments and the creation of this thinly veiled attempt of a corporate takeover of our government >> [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-against-elon-musks-department-of-government-efficiency?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3D1124opposedoge]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121124_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121124_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121124_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121124_1&amount=25]

name: Jay (personal)
subject: Did you see what Jason Miyares just said?
body:
https://jayjones.com [https://jayjones.com]

Team,

We know that Virginia’s Attorney General, Jason Miyares, will stand up for Trump — not for Virginia families. Just take a look at what he said recently:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024]

I don’t know about you, but I don’t think of Donald Trump as a common-sense leader. Between leading an insurrection on our country and backing the overturning of reproductive freedom, he’s the furthest thing from common sense – but my MAGA opponent will continue to defend Trump – no matter what.

If Miyares gets reelected for another four years, he’ll uphold far-right, extremist policies that will hurt working families, women, and our democracy.

Folks: Virginia needs an attorney general who will defend our democracy and put Virginia families first.

So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or more to help build our grassroots movement across Virginia? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=10]

name: GOP Surveys
subject: We need to know YOUR #1 Priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Help guide our majority

| | | Peter,

With less than a month until the 119th Congress is sworn in, we are set to have a historically slim Majority.

With such a razor-thin lead, we need to know exactly where to focus our energy, so we’re turning to **YOU**. **[**Will you take a moment to let us know what YOUR #1 priority is for 2025?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
| | [ TAKE THE #1 PRIORITY SURVEY](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
| | Your response will help guide our first moves in the 119th Congress.

Thank you for answering,
GOP Surveys

body:

|

Friend,

**The Left has found its first opportunity to cause chaos during Donald Trump 's Presidency: buying the FL-1 and FL-6 House seats in the upcoming Special Elections. **

Democrats are attempting to flip these open seats and infiltrate **RED** Florida with **BLUE** liberals.

Friend, it's safe to say that our America First legislative agenda will be in grave danger if Nancy Pelosi and her liberal billionaires take these seats.

And they're not going down without a fight: the Left will spend BIG to take these seats because they know how important they are!

# [A Lawyer's View of the Hunter Biden Pardon](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=152970483&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyOTcwNDgzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM5MzQ4NzIsImV4cCI6MTczNjUyNjg3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.sdCAjPS_e5skIw1rxllJliHYrfssMCkyHgu8M96UUPM)
### Is a Blanket Pardon Constitutional?
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Dec 11

---

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/a-lawyers-view-of-the-hunter-biden?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

My recent article on President Biden's pardon of his son elicited considerable response, with the vast majority of comments agreeing with my main points.

But my brother, a lawyer and gifted writer, argues quite effectively that a blanket pardon for undisclosed crimes is unconstitutional.

IS THE HUNTER BIDEN PARDON CONSTITUTIONAL? WE THINK NOT.
By Nicholas Bentivegna
12/07/2024
President Biden's ten-year blanket pardon of his son, Hunter, has generated considerable chatter among the pundit class. Conspicuously absent from the conversation, however, is a most fundamental question, and that is, whether or not such a pardon is constitutional. In my opinion, it is not.
Our United States Federal Constitution is a remarkably compact document: a Preamble, seven Articles, ten Amendments known as the "Bill of Rights," and seventeen more after that. It basically stands on principle, meaning that particular terms or concepts, such as "executive powers," or "interstate commerce," not to mention "equal protection" and "due process," are general in scope and direction. Court decisions, legislative findings, and learned treatises, interpreting and applying what amounts to very little in terms of actual words, have been known to fill many volumes, databases, and even libraries.
Seeking to apply a constitutional provision to particular facts and circumstances? Only the Supreme Court knows for sure. Even then, among the individual justices, there can be considerable disagreement. Court "opinions" are exactly that.
All of this being said, our country has always exhibited what might be called a "constitutional culture." Americans instinctively know when their rights are being violated, or when something else is amiss. When they learn of censorship or the jailing of governmental opponents in other countries, particularly nominally similar democracies such as Britain or Canada, they beam with pride in our American "superiority," in terms of self-government. To put this attitude in the simplest of terms, if something looks, sounds or smells unconstitutional, it probably is. America, after all, is a land of common sense.
Authority for the granting of Presidential pardons is found in Article II, Section 2, of the U.S. Constitution. It reads that the President "shall have the Power to grant Reprieves and Pardons for Offenses against the United States, except in cases of Impeachment." That's basically it. Yet when read in the context of other Constitutional provisions, and the rights and privileges they enumerate, it is not difficult to determine the clause's overall intent and purpose.
In the American Constitutional form of government, persons accused of crimes are accorded certain rights of due process. These include the well-known presumption of innocence, the right to confront witnesses, and the right to determination by a jury of peers, of guilt beyond a "reasonable doubt." It goes without saying that, in such a system, certain miscreants might escape punishment, even when they are actually guilty. But this is generally considered a small price to pay, given the alternative, and that is, that an accused might be incarcerated, or even put to death, who is actually innocent. Derivatively, this leads to a simple concern that a particular punishment, for one reason or another, may not fit the crime. Thus, we have yet another check and balance in the system, and that is, the empowerment of the executive authority to grant a pardon, or perhaps some degree of clemency, in particular cases.
Executive authorities, that is, presidents and state governors, take this power very seriously. They want to be fair, yet at the same time, are acutely aware that mistakes can be costly. Most maintain some sort of office, or staff, whereby individual applications are carefully reviewed and investigated, before being decided upon. Typically, such process is not even initiated until after an applicant has been convicted of a crime, and perhaps served a sentence for a number of years. Presidents and governors are human, of course, and so, it is not unusual for executives to grant pardons to family members, political acquaintances, or even famous persons, whom they like and respect. But, in all such cases, there is generally some sort of pretext, or rational basis, for any pardon that is ultimately granted.
One form of pardon that is exceedingly rare, is that of a "preemptive" pardon, or one which is granted before a person is even charged with a crime. The most famous of such a pardon was that given by President Gerald Ford in 1974, to former President Richard Nixon. This was an unconditional pardon for any Federal crimes Mr. Nixon may have committed, during his time in in office. Shortly thereafter, in 1977, President Carter issued a blanket pardon to men, convicted or not, who had violated the Military Selective Service Act, by evading the draft, during the Vietnam War era.
Both of these pardons were controversial at the time, and rightly so. But I don't think it can be said that either of the two presidents did not have the Nation's best interests at heart. President Ford's pardon of Nixon was the act of our only unelected President, in favor of the only President who had ever resigned the office. The Carter pardon was the final act in a controversy that had roiled the country for over a decade. Both decisions involved very difficult and unusual circumstances, by any measure, constitutional or otherwise.
Is this power of pardon absolute? One would think not. Nothing else in Constitutional law is really absolute. Justice Oliver Wendell Holmes once famously observed that the right of free speech did not extend to "shouting fire in a crowded theater." Freedom of religion does not enable human sacrifice, or the killing of persons who fail to subscribe to your particular faith. And no, the right to bear arms does not extend to private ownership of nuclear weapons, nor even personal RPG's (much to the chagrin of middle-school boys everywhere.)
Returning to the general principles of criminal law in our Constitutional government, there is a basic rule that a person charged with a crime is entitled to know the exact basis of the charge. Criminal indictments typically recite the name of the accused, the particular time and place of the alleged offense, a detailed factual description of the specific act complained of, and a citation of the statute or legal provision that the person is accused of violating. "Vagueness" is forbidden. A prosecutor cannot, for example, charge a person for unspecific "bad behavior" at an unknown place and time. Which is not to say that it hasn't been tried, on occasion.
Preemptive pardons are purposely vague, ambiguous, and overbroad. All, in my view, are constitutionally suspect, on their face. Thus each, at the very least, should be subject to some sort of rational basis test. Hunter Biden pled guilty to certain tax evasion charges, and was convicted of specific firearms violations. Had his pardon been limited to those crimes alone, it might have fit the narrative of a father looking out for his son. The Presidential pardon power, it might have been said, is one of the perks of the office.
We all know that the pardon issued by President Biden goes far beyond any of that. It essentially exonerates young Hunter for any and all Federal crimes, going back for a period of over ten years. No specific acts, circumstances, laws, or statutes, are so much as mentioned. No overriding concern or national interest is claimed or is evident. Hunter's father may be President, but Hunter himself is no more than a private citizen. And, a rather badly behaved one, at that. The inescapable conclusion is that the Bidens know something we don't. And, it can't be good.
What is the limit of the astonishing overbreadth this pardon represents? May a President reward political contributors by excusing them from payment of their income taxes? May a governor commission a hit man to take out a political opponent, and then "forgive" the assassin of the murder charge? May any executive simply declare that a particular person or group of persons is exempt from obeying any and all laws, for all time?
To ask any of these questions is to provide the answer. The Hunter Biden pardon is not the humble privilege of a merciful father, so much as it is the thuggish act of a dictator. The Justice Department needs to step up here, and challenge this pardon head on, before the United States Supreme Court. Once the man with the square mustache arrives on the scene, it may be too late...

clean_body: Is a Blanket Pardon Constitutional? | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Is a Blanket Pardon Constitutional? | | | Dec 11 | | | | | | | | | | | | My recent article on President Biden's pardon of his son elicited considerable response, with the vast majority of comments agreeing with my main points. But my brother, a lawyer and gifted writer, argues quite effectively that a blanket pardon for undisclosed crimes is unconstitutional. IS THE HUNTER BIDEN PARDON CONSTITUTIONAL? WE THINK NOT. By Nicholas Bentivegna 12/07/2024 President Biden's ten-year blanket pardon of his son, Hunter, has generated considerable chatter among the pundit class. Conspicuously absent from the conversation, however, is a most fundamental question, and that is, whether or not such a pardon is constitutional. In my opinion, it is not. Our United States Federal Constitution is a remarkably compact document: a Preamble, seven Articles, ten Amendments known as the "Bill of Rights," and seventeen more after that. It basically stands on principle, meaning that particular terms or concepts, such as "executive powers," or "interstate commerce," not to mention "equal protection" and "due process," are general in scope and direction. Court decisions, legislative findings, and learned treatises, interpreting and applying what amounts to very little in terms of actual words, have been known to fill many volumes, databases, and even libraries. Seeking to apply a constitutional provision to particular facts and circumstances? Only the Supreme Court knows for sure. Even then, among the individual justices, there can be considerable disagreement. Court "opinions" are exactly that. All of this being said, our country has always exhibited what might be called a "constitutional culture." Americans instinctively know when their rights are being violated, or when something else is amiss. When they learn of censorship or the jailing of governmental opponents in other countries, particularly nominally similar democracies such as Britain or Canada, they beam with pride in our American "superiority," in terms of self-government. To put this attitude in the simplest of terms, if something looks, sounds or smells unconstitutional, it probably is. America, after all, is a land of common sense. Authority for the granting of Presidential pardons is found in Article II, Section 2, of the U.S. Constitution. It reads that the President "shall have the Power to grant Reprieves and Pardons for Offenses against the United States, except in cases of Impeachment." That's basically it. Yet when read in the context of other Constitutional provisions, and the rights and privileges they enumerate, it is not difficult to determine the clause's overall intent and purpose. In the American Constitutional form of government, persons accused of crimes are accorded certain rights of due process. These include the well-known presumption of innocence, the right to confront witnesses, and the right to determination by a jury of peers, of guilt beyond a "reasonable doubt." It goes without saying that, in such a system, certain miscreants might escape punishment, even when they are actually guilty. But this is generally considered a small price to pay, given the alternative, and that is, that an accused might be incarcerated, or even put to death, who is actually innocent. Derivatively, this leads to a simple concern that a particular punishment, for one reason or another, may not fit the crime. Thus, we have yet another check and balance in the system, and that is, the empowerment of the executive authority to grant a pardon, or perhaps some degree of clemency, in particular cases. Executive authorities, that is, presidents and state governors, take this power very seriously. They want to be fair, yet at the same time, are acutely aware that mistakes can be costly. Most maintain some sort of office, or staff, whereby individual applications are carefully reviewed and investigated, before being decided upon. Typically, such process is not even initiated until after an applicant has been convicted of a crime, and perhaps served a sentence for a number of years. Presidents and governors are human, of course, and so, it is not unusual for executives to grant pardons to family members, political acquaintances, or even famous persons, whom they like and respect. But, in all such cases, there is generally some sort of pretext, or rational basis, for any pardon that is ultimately granted. One form of pardon that is exceedingly rare, is that of a "preemptive" pardon, or one which is granted before a person is even charged with a crime. The most famous of such a pardon was that given by President Gerald Ford in 1974, to former President Richard Nixon. This was an unconditional pardon for any Federal crimes Mr. Nixon may have committed, during his time in in office. Shortly thereafter, in 1977, President Carter issued a blanket pardon to men, convicted or not, who had violated the Military Selective Service Act, by evading the draft, during the Vietnam War era. Both of these pardons were controversial at the time, and rightly so. But I don't think it can be said that either of the two presidents did not have the Nation's best interests at heart. President Ford's pardon of Nixon was the act of our only unelected President, in favor of the only President who had ever resigned the office. The Carter pardon was the final act in a controversy that had roiled the country for over a decade. Both decisions involved very difficult and unusual circumstances, by any measure, constitutional or otherwise. Is this power of pardon absolute? One would think not. Nothing else in Constitutional law is really absolute. Justice Oliver Wendell Holmes once famously observed that the right of free speech did not extend to "shouting fire in a crowded theater." Freedom of religion does not enable human sacrifice, or the killing of persons who fail to subscribe to your particular faith. And no, the right to bear arms does not extend to private ownership of nuclear weapons, nor even personal RPG's (much to the chagrin of middle-school boys everywhere.) Returning to the general principles of criminal law in our Constitutional government, there is a basic rule that a person charged with a crime is entitled to know the exact basis of the charge. Criminal indictments typically recite the name of the accused, the particular time and place of the alleged offense, a detailed factual description of the specific act complained of, and a citation of the statute or legal provision that the person is accused of violating. "Vagueness" is forbidden. A prosecutor cannot, for example, charge a person for unspecific "bad behavior" at an unknown place and time. Which is not to say that it hasn't been tried, on occasion. Preemptive pardons are purposely vague, ambiguous, and overbroad. All, in my view, are constitutionally suspect, on their face. Thus each, at the very least, should be subject to some sort of rational basis test. Hunter Biden pled guilty to certain tax evasion charges, and was convicted of specific firearms violations. Had his pardon been limited to those crimes alone, it might have fit the narrative of a father looking out for his son. The Presidential pardon power, it might have been said, is one of the perks of the office. We all know that the pardon issued by President Biden goes far beyond any of that. It essentially exonerates young Hunter for any and all Federal crimes, going back for a period of over ten years. No specific acts, circumstances, laws, or statutes, are so much as mentioned. No overriding concern or national interest is claimed or is evident. Hunter's father may be President, but Hunter himself is no more than a private citizen. And, a rather badly behaved one, at that. The inescapable conclusion is that the Bidens know something we don't. And, it can't be good. What is the limit of the astonishing overbreadth this pardon represents? May a President reward political contributors by excusing them from payment of their income taxes? May a governor commission a hit man to take out a political opponent, and then "forgive" the assassin of the murder charge? May any executive simply declare that a particular person or group of persons is exempt from obeying any and all laws, for all time? To ask any of these questions is to provide the answer. The Hunter Biden pardon is not the humble privilege of a merciful father, so much as it is the thuggish act of a dictator. The Justice Department needs to step up here, and challenge this pardon head on, before the United States Supreme Court. Once the man with the square mustache arrives on the scene, it may be too late... | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Joseph Bentivegna 541 Cromwell Avenue, Rocky Hill, CT 06067 ? ?
