name: Tony Johnson
subject: Know Your Rights
body:
This is a critical year in our nation’s history

| | |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gREYMMQ4G8n6eeq4mkHTNw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPEwsP0SMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9jb25zdGl0dXRpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMV9BRS1VU0NONTkxMTZXA3NwY0IKZ1W1wVlnd4FnyVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | | Hello, As a fellow conservative, you likely already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world to promise freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance; **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain **[free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gREYMMQ4G8n6eeq4mkHTNw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPEwsP0SMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9jb25zdGl0dXRpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMV9BRS1VU0NONTkxMTZXA3NwY0IKZ1W1wVlnd4FnyVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gREYMMQ4G8n6eeq4mkHTNw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpPEwsP0SMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhlcml0YWdlLm9yZy9jb25zdGl0dXRpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbmd1aWRlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMV9BRS1VU0NONTkxMTZXA3NwY0IKZ1W1wVlnd4FnyVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives—they want government-controlled health care, higher taxes and redistribution of wealth in the form of socialism, increased regulations, to do away with the Electoral College, and for open borders. It is for this reason that we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, the freedoms promised to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it promises to us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by clicking this link today? clean_body: This is a critical year in our nation’s history | | | | | ~ | | | Hello, As a fellow conservative, you likely already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world to promise freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance; our Constitution. That’s why I’m writing today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain ~ ~ In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find: Useful, clause-by-clause analysis of the entire Constitution and each amendment Input from more than 100 constitutional scholars and legal experts including President Reagan's former Attorney Ed Meese A thorough review of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today A copy of the Constitution and the documents that served as its foundation This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives—they want government-controlled health care, higher taxes and redistribution of wealth in the form of socialism, increased regulations, to do away with the Electoral College, and for open borders. It is for this reason that we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, the freedoms promised to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it promises to us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by clicking this link today? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: ~ This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the far-Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. ~ Thank you, Tony Johnson Director of Membership ~ | | The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE | Washington, D.C. 20002 US Conservative Network PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---

The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: | | | Peter, we’re proud. Proud of the campaign that we ran. Proud of the fight that we put up. Proud of the hard work that we gave to this cause. But most of all, we’re proud of Vice President Harris for all of the ways that she stepped up when we needed her most. With just 107 days on the campaign trail, she was relentless, focused, determined, and disciplined to do what she has always worked toward: serving the American people. That’s why writing to you today to ask you to The outcome of the election may not be what we fought for or hoped for. But in the words of Vice President Harris, “Sometimes the fight takes a while.But that doesn’t mean we won’t win.” Her inspiring words ring true for all of us as we keep up our fight for freedom, and we are so grateful for the supporters across the country who have already added their name. Now we’re hoping you’ll be next, Peter. | | We’d love to tell Vice President Harris that you added your name today. Thank you and Happy Holidays! Team Harris-Walz | | | |

body:

Urgent: Only Weeks Remain To Shield Your Retirement Savings | Go [here](https://links.daily-bullet.com/a/1537/click/19358/6374453/895e96b8401ed55afe543b97ca4c8b36503afb1c/8cf4058415ca090d802664fd17880ef80c6ee27b) to opt-out of our email list or mark as [SPAM](https://links.daily-bullet.com/a/1537/click/19358/6374453/895e96b8401ed55afe543b97ca4c8b36503afb1c/8cf4058415ca090d802664fd17880ef80c6ee27b) [](https://links.daily-bullet.com/a/1537/click/19358/6374453/7fcbc3157cf6b21b63fd39408eb35e2156ed3cfe/8cf4058415ca090d802664fd17880ef80c6ee27b) **December 11th, 2024**
* * *
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.daily-bullet.com/a/1537/click/19358/6374453/7fcbc3157cf6b21b63fd39408eb35e2156ed3cfe/8cf4058415ca090d802664fd17880ef80c6ee27b). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.daily-bullet.com/a/1537/click/19358/6374453/7fcbc3157cf6b21b63fd39408eb35e2156ed3cfe/8cf4058415ca090d802664fd17880ef80c6ee27b).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.daily-bullet.com/a/1537/click/19358/6374453/7fcbc3157cf6b21b63fd39408eb35e2156ed3cfe/8cf4058415ca090d802664fd17880ef80c6ee27b)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

**“Rep. Maxwell Frost to be First Gen Z Congressional Leader”**
**_-Reported from Axios_** **Peter - I was just elected as Co-Chair of the Democratic Policy and Communications Committee (DPCC), making me the first Gen Z member of Congressional leadership!** You might be wondering what this even means, so let me explain: The DPCC is House Democrats’ messaging and policy arm – it’s how we figure out the _best_ way to communicate our vision for the future of our country. And now that we’re headed towards another Trump presidency, we’ll need to get more creative. **As Co-Chair, I’m going to find new ways to ensure Democrats’ message reaches as many people as possible in this new political landscape – _especially_ young people.** I won’t lie, it’s going to be an uphill battle. A lot of young people are feeling hopeless, wary, or are even tuning out completely. We’re also losing support from communities that have traditionally supported Democrats. **But this is exactly why I’m up for the challenge.** As the only member of Gen Z in Congress, I know how to talk to young people – I’m closer in age to them than I am to most of my colleagues in Congress. **It’s going to take a new generation of leadership to bring in a new generation of Democratic support. So even though what lies ahead won’t be easy, I’m hopeful, and I’m ready for this fight.** [**_So now, I have a question for you: Are YOU ready for this fight? If you’re ready to support a new generation of leadership in Congress, rush a donation to power the work ahead >> _**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/hNgRzPtI1TGysT3gFb8bIQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpPE2jP0TGaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MTIxMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9kcGNjX2VuJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJxNHpKcDJSSDBneEdaR0hZR3pyQkxUR2lHbCZyZWZjb2RlMj0ycTR6SnAyUkgwZ3hHWkdIWUd6ckJMVEdpR2wmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MnE0ekpwMlJIMGd4R1pHSFlHenJCTFRHaUdsVwNzcGNCCmdVo8hZZ3pNZtRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/G4GtZmeiT9_hFE9E20FDYA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpPE2jP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_YW1vdW50PTEwJnJlZmNvZGU9MjAyNDEyMTFfZW1fZnJfYjFfZHBjY19lbiZleHByZXNzX2xhbmU9dHJ1ZSZjZG1jPTJxNHpKcDJSSDBneEdaR0hZR3pyQkxUR2lHbCZyZWZjb2RlMj0ycTR6SnAyUkgwZ3hHWkdIWUd6ckJMVEdpR2wmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MnE0ekpwMlJIMGd4R1pHSFlHenJCTFRHaUdsVwNzcGNCCmdVo8hZZ3pNZtRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Staying the course on addressing housing AND homelessness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Last week, I released my recommended state budget for the next two years. It’s a direct reflection of my continued and steadfast commitment to making progress on Oregonians’ priorities. One of my main priorities, since I was first sworn in, is addressing the housing and homelessness crises. That’s why I declared a state of emergency on my first day in office, and it’s why I’ve committed **over $2 billion dollars** to the issue in my latest budget. Some people claim we can only deal with either the housing shortage or the lack of shelter space and services for people experiencing unsheltered homelessness. That’s plain wrong. We need to do both. My current initiatives are projected to **rehouse 3,300 households** and **prevent another 24,000 from becoming homeless in the first place**. **4,800 shelter beds** will be supported and maintained. And **2,800 affordable housing** units financed. These are common sense solutions, but it’s going to take resolve, resources, and patience to see them through. Now is when I need the support of this team: [_**Will you add your name today to stand by my proposed budget and investments in housing?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98535259/516973912/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODgwZmQwNi1lNGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v_QC5EuK2bnVI0CL2-kEZXFGrD8CnsahsGYnLhf590=&emci=0809198e-d2b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0880fd06-e4b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98535260/516973913/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODgwZmQwNi1lNGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8v_QC5EuK2bnVI0CL2-kEZXFGrD8CnsahsGYnLhf590=&emci=0809198e-d2b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0880fd06-e4b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15353729)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: You might be wondering…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Some of us served in Vietnam, or the Gulf War, or the War on Terror. We’ve been through it — and we got through it together. It’s more important than ever that we stick up for ourselves, for our communities, and for what’s right.
#
Peter,
You might be wondering how an organization like VoteVets went from this ad, back in 2006...
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24-2006.3CNrFf&refcode=em241211-1-30&t=1&akid=34020%2E3013755%2E7ma-Zw)
...to becoming one of the largest and most successful organizations in politics in 2024.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24-2006.3CNrFf&refcode=em241211-1-30&t=2&akid=34020%2E3013755%2E7ma-Zw)
Well, it started in the Iraq War. Bush and his administration lied us into that war. They sent us out with no strategy, and without the equipment we needed. Thousands were killed, and thousands more wounded. After we came back, a generation of Veterans was forced to live with that war for the rest of their lives.
Frankly, we were pretty pissed. So we came home and raised hell. We were told that Republicans owned the Military. They owned Veterans. They owned the flag, and patriotism. But we came back and found a hell of a lot of Veterans were just as pissed as we were, and we organized.
We made it our mission to take the fight to the GOP on ground they thought was safe — and beat them.
Over the years, we fought for the things that matter most to us. We fought to support our Active Duty, to make sure they got what they needed. We fought to make sure Veterans and their families were provided for when they came home. We fought to end the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan.
We’ve had setbacks along the way, but we’ve also had incredible victories. The wars are over. We ended “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” We’ve stopped every single attempt to privatize the VA and sell off care to the lowest bidder, and we’ve helped get improvements to efficiency and expanded care signed into law. We passed the PACT Act, and now millions of Veterans are getting treatment for the toxic exposures they were forced to endure overseas.
Most importantly, we’ve defeated more Republicans and pro-war, anti-veteran candidates than we can count over the last 20 years. Because of our work, thousands and thousands of Veterans are serving at every level of government.
And now, we’re gearing up for a second Trump administration.
Some of us served in Vietnam, or the Gulf War, or the Global War on Terror. We’ve been through it — and we got through it together. It’s more important than ever that we stick up for ourselves, for our communities, and for what’s right.
**Trump and the billionaires he’s filling his administration with are setting their sights on the VA. They aim to slash billions in care for Veterans.**
VoteVets is one of the only organizations standing in their way, and if we’re going to stop them, we need your help.
[**Please, whether you’ve had our back in the past or you’re just getting started now, one of the most impactful things you can do to fight back against Trump and his administration is to make a donation to VoteVets as we put our strategy for 2025 and beyond together. Chip in $5 or whatever you can.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24-2006.3CNrFf&refcode=em241211-1-30&t=3&akid=34020%2E3013755%2E7ma-Zw)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24-2006.RPpxSq&refcode=em241211-1-30&t=22&akid=34020%2E3013755%2E7ma-Zw)**

Trump and the billionaires he’s filling his administration with are setting their sights on the VA. They aim to slash billions in care for Veterans. VoteVets is one of the only organizations standing in their way, and if we’re going to stop them, we need your help. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you so much for your support. name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: What you need to know about ghost guns
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

You may be seeing ghost guns in the news after a shooter killed Brian Thompson, the CEO of UnitedHealthcare, in New York City last week. The suspected perpetrator has been arrested in Pennsylvania with a ghost gun.
Ghost guns are untraceable firearms that can be made in minutes from kits and parts bought online. They’ve become a go-to source for gun traffickers and have been tied to thousands of crimes because they’re so easy to get without a trace. In this case, it is suspected that the assassin used a ghost gun that he was able to 3-D print at home.
**The killing of the United HealthCare CEO is frightening and just one of many examples that show just how fatal ghost guns can be. It is critical for Americans’ safety that ghost guns be treated like the guns that they are.**
Right now, the future of ghost guns’ legality is in the Supreme Court’s hands. We are hard at work here at GIFFORDS urging the Supreme Court to uphold a current rule that requires that the kits used to make ghost guns are treated like guns, with serial numbers and background checks.
[**If you are ready to join us in the fight against ghost guns, please make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241211-1-b&t=1&akid=9601%2E3935704%2Ebz02ik)

clean_body: You may be seeing ghost guns in the news after a shooter killed Brian Thompson, the CEO of UnitedHealthcare, in New York City last week. The suspected perpetrator has been arrested in Pennsylvania with a ghost gun. Ghost guns are untraceable firearms that can be made in minutes from kits and parts bought online. They’ve become a go-to source for gun traffickers and have been tied to thousands of crimes because they’re so easy to get without a trace. In this case, it is suspected that the assassin used a ghost gun that he was able to 3-D print at home. The killing of the United HealthCare CEO is frightening and just one of many examples that show just how fatal ghost guns can be. It is critical for Americans’ safety that ghost guns be treated like the guns that they are. Right now, the future of ghost guns’ legality is in the Supreme Court’s hands. We are hard at work here at GIFFORDS urging the Supreme Court to uphold a current rule that requires that the kits used to make ghost guns are treated like guns, with serial numbers and background checks. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Team GIFFORDS PAC Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: COURIER
subject: What Hegseth’s survival says about Trump’s media dominance
body:
MAGA reporters and influencers are making thinly-veiled threats to Republican electeds ahead of Trump’s second term

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98538431/516982770/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTk1YWE1YmItZTZiNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vjETFQXhryNCK4KeKqFSswc0JfYJbzuuoH62YX8PTsQ=&emci=475aa5bb-e6b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=595aa5bb-e6b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
Less than a week ago, Pete Hegseth’s nomination for Defense Secretary seemed doomed. The _Fox & Friends_ host is objectively unqualified for the role and faces serious allegations of sexual misconduct and public drunkenness.
Iowa Republican Senator Joni Ernst, a combat veteran and advocate for survivors of sexual assault in the military, was publicly skeptical of Trump’s pick. In normal times, Ernst might have stood her ground and led the opposition to Hegseth.
But these aren’t normal times. In the end, the right-wing media did Trump’s bidding, bullying Ernst into submission and breathing new life into Hegseth’s nomination.
**[We’ll explain how in a moment, but if you’re ready to help build a progressive media network strong enough to go toe-to-toe with the right’s fascist media machine, can you chip in $25 now to help COURIER protect democracy and defend the truth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98538435/516982773/-593472309?refcode=20241211-EM-TrumpCabinetPicks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTk1YWE1YmItZTZiNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vjETFQXhryNCK4KeKqFSswc0JfYJbzuuoH62YX8PTsQ=)**
The moment Ernst showed signs of wavering, the right-wing media unleashed its full arsenal:
* **Elon Musk weaponized X,** threatening to fund primary challenges against any Republican who opposed Trump’s cabinet picks.
* **Fox News ran a story quoting Trump insiders,** warning Ernst she would pay a “political price” for stepping out of line.
* **MAGA influencers followed Musk and flooded X,** calling Ernst “spineless” and demanding a primary challenger in 2026.
* **Megyn Kelly’s viral TikTok** accused Ernst of betraying Trump, racking up millions of views.

**The message was clear: defy Trump, and you’ll pay the price.**
And it worked. Ernst reversed course, praising Hegseth and dismissing the allegations against him unless accusers came forward publicly. Suddenly, the unqualified, scandal-plagued _Fox & Friends_ host had a path to overseeing the most powerful military in the world.
**This is straight out of the authoritarian playbook: use media dominance to silence dissent, rewrite the narrative, and force compliance to Trump at all costs.**
In 2024, we saw just how unfit the legacy media is to fight back. It’s up to us to build a progressive media network that can counter the right, hold them accountable, defend the truth, and stop Trump from causing irreparable damage to our democracy.
**[Chip in $25 now to help COURIER take on the right-wing media machine and stop fascism in its tracks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98538440/516982780/-593472309?refcode=20241211-EM-TrumpCabinetPicks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTk1YWE1YmItZTZiNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vjETFQXhryNCK4KeKqFSswc0JfYJbzuuoH62YX8PTsQ=)**

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Fox News Op-Ed: Don’t let Biden sneak in more Medicare cuts on his way out the door
body:
Seniors rely on Medicare Advantage for medical care and peace of mind| | | |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=d2f9568bd02c41049d92ba553ba90200&_e=7nOO6HeoodzYOTlYq9gkLC7VbGNjS4MS51-m-h4AFzBLPFGl2BaCvWngv8EUO_Smd8no3uNY-dksEj-r9boUUlqKhMv5hTSTcdvm4COSaCNkb1DWm1FqTZlEscNQ7o7CHZprq-AWZhC77UGx8rpQ647YWMJVuoAFVx4GwiIrax5jskjgggTJoukmhW0UvvGrDmDlTSKJr_3zZ64qpP1qgg%3D%3D)
---
**Don’t let Biden sneak in more Medicare cuts on his way out the door** _Seniors rely on Medicare Advantage for medical care and peace of mind_ [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=d2f9568bd02c41049d92ba553ba90200&_e=7nOO6HeoodzYOTlYq9gkLAS7VrefyaiI07UXi7L1Oja2lOnUKWShh8smkj3KoeBzfX0cuMPgLI5IGkpIBOcAQtD_vurHdes0StV-8Slhj6eeMqiekMRXqFnrDk8zLBSKC74n8-cpezEFGYXY9jZujJsgSNpO6p3NoYWzVtXV0Tj3Er-gyXj_j79LuueKKedKGbYQlU8SELjM7Q96t3uczm6yPOme5710XZbn9VTfrj0%3D "View More Articles By Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi")By Bobby Jindal
---
America’s seniors shouldn’t be used as pawns in a political game. But that is exactly what could be happening right now in the waning days of President Biden’s administration. President Biden has made numerous claims over the years that it’s Republicans who are the party that supposedly wants to cut the Medicare program. President Biden needs to take a long, hard look in the mirror. It is actually the Biden administration that’s spent the last two years quietly chipping away at one of the most popular healthcare programs for our seniors: Medicare Advantage. And now, apparently not satisfied with the damage they have already inflicted, it appears the Biden team is trying to squeeze in one more cut on the way out the door. Medicare Advantage shows how choice and competition can deliver better outcomes at lower costs for seniors and taxpayers. Nearly 35 million American seniors, over half of total Medicare beneficiaries, choose Medicare Advantage for their health coverage over a traditional government-run Medicare plan. Medicare Advantage plans are offered and managed by private health insurers that contract with Medicare. Their popularity has boomed over the years because they offer better value at a lower cost for seniors. Added benefits under Medicare Advantage plans like dental and vision care, better access to preventative care, along with improved health outcomes have helped ingrain their value to America’s seniors. **[Finish reading on FoxNews.com](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=d2f9568bd02c41049d92ba553ba90200&_e=7nOO6HeoodzYOTlYq9gkLKTduGVGi4Db2ge096dG0dvs3JlSBo6udh6vBgs2inabD2b4omif-hluH0zVIw7wLTYt9YtlJ4iDvsXxQfJte1NsBH4YfVA2A5gMDTl2sAx_jqQyUsuR_Zse51-ksJM49tsCl5qj3pJlNGKRRY1oFVXcxkgAH96eOrHMe-FjS4iPhGgOQit__QmLQulJ9-u-ZnGLecZps_5NXanykTPrFAW3UK-CABOQu_KTW-eC9wEtkjWusNFPpAwrl2iXT59zO9UQKUQ4p9fNtinkSxl3KKc%3D)**

clean_body: Seniors rely on Medicare Advantage for medical care and peace of mind| | | | Don’t let Biden sneak in more Medicare cuts on his way out the door Seniors rely on Medicare Advantage for medical care and peace of mind "View More Articles By Bobby Jindal And Charlie Katebi"By Bobby Jindal America’s seniors shouldn’t be used as pawns in a political game. But that is exactly what could be happening right now in the waning days of President Biden’s administration. President Biden has made numerous claims over the years that it’s Republicans who are the party that supposedly wants to cut the Medicare program. President Biden needs to take a long, hard look in the mirror. It is actually the Biden administration that’s spent the last two years quietly chipping away at one of the most popular healthcare programs for our seniors: Medicare Advantage. And now, apparently not satisfied with the damage they have already inflicted, it appears the Biden team is trying to squeeze in one more cut on the way out the door. Medicare Advantage shows how choice and competition can deliver better outcomes at lower costs for seniors and taxpayers. Nearly 35 million American seniors, over half of total Medicare beneficiaries, choose Medicare Advantage for their health coverage over a traditional government-run Medicare plan. Medicare Advantage plans are offered and managed by private health insurers that contract with Medicare. Their popularity has boomed over the years because they offer better value at a lower cost for seniors. Added benefits under Medicare Advantage plans like dental and vision care, better access to preventative care, along with improved health outcomes have helped ingrain their value to America’s seniors. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by AmericaNext

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Israel wasted no time invading and attacking Syria
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After the sudden fall of the Assad regime in Syria, Israel wasted no time
taking the opportunity to attack and invade this sovereign nation.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241211-israel_syria/?source=em20241211-36226&akid=36226%2E1203867%2E_-TIt9 ]Screenshot of various headlines about Israel striking and invading
Syria

While countless Syrians attempt to reunite with loved ones, return to
their homes, and prepare for whatever comes next for the nation, Israel
has:

* Carried out almost 500 airstrikes across Syria in just two days,
including dropping bombs on the historic capital city of Damascus;

* Deployed tanks and ground troops into and beyond a demilitarized
buffer zone for the first time in 50 years, and asserted that Israel
has annexed this land (three times the size of Gaza) for itself in yet
another land grab;

* Destroyed Syria’s navy and attacked Syria’s military bases,
warehouses, and aircraft, leaving the nation defenseless.

The Israeli government is doing this all while continuing to attack and
starve the people of Gaza, bomb Lebanon, and carry out settler violence in
the West Bank.

Western leaders like President Biden have barely made a peep, refusing to
hold Israel accountable for its unbridled aggression against its neighbors
while continuing to fund the bombs and weapons Israel is using in its
ever-expanding regional war.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241211-israel_syria/?source=em20241211-36226&akid=36226%2E1203867%2E_-TIt9 ]Benjamin Netanyahu and the right-wing Israeli government cannot
continue to go unchecked like this. If you agree, add your name to join us
in demanding the Biden administration condemn Israel’s actions now →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20241211-israel_syria/?source=em20241211-36226&akid=36226%2E1203867%2E_-TIt9 ]Add Your Name

When Russia annexes land and attacks people in Ukraine, the United States
is unflinching in its condemnations — so why are they silent when Israel
does it to Gaza, the West Bank, Lebanon, Yemen, and now Syria?

Israel is not above the law, and it’s long overdue for the U.S. government
to stop acting like it is.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241211-36226-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36226_1203867__-TIt9&akid=36226%2E1203867%2E_-TIt9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36226%2E1203867%2E_-TIt9

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Our numbers have started to drop off

body:
Next month, Democrats will face three special elections for two seats in the Virginia Senate and one seat in the House – we can’t risk the GOP gaining ground. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Since we launched our 2025 membership drive last month, our renewal numbers have started to drop off. | **2025 DLCC Membership**
---
**Active Members:** **Over 1,800**
**December Member Goal: 2,000**

**Too much is at stake to slow down right now.**
* With a GOP federal trifecta looming, state Democrats are our last line of defense against Project 2025.
* There are nearly a dozen special elections on the horizon, and the Virginia House and governorship are at stake next fall.
* Next month, Democrats will face three special elections for two seats in the Virginia Senate and one seat in the House – we can’t risk the GOP gaining ground.

With a strong membership team, we can overcome these challenges. But if we fall short of our goal, we risk leaving our candidates without the resources they need to compete against their Republican opponents.

clean_body: Next month, Democrats will face three special elections for two seats in the Virginia Senate and one seat in the House – we can’t risk the GOP gaining ground. | | | | | ---|--- Since we launched our 2025 membership drive last month, our renewal numbers have started to drop off. | 2025 DLCC Membership Active Members: Over 1,800 December Member Goal: 2,000 Too much is at stake to slow down right now. With a GOP federal trifecta looming, state Democrats are our last line of defense against Project 2025. There are nearly a dozen special elections on the horizon, and the Virginia House and governorship are at stake next fall. Next month, Democrats will face three special elections for two seats in the Virginia Senate and one seat in the House – we can’t risk the GOP gaining ground. With a strong membership team, we can overcome these challenges. But if we fall short of our goal, we risk leaving our candidates without the resources they need to compete against their Republican opponents. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Don’t miss this opportunity, DLCC Membership Team ** The information provided above is associated with the following email address: dpwillis67@gmail.com. (www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18195%2E878179%2ERdzHgf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18195%2E878179%2ERdzHgf).**

subject: We can double down too.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Hey there, Friend,
Eric here, Lateefah’s finance director.
First off, thank you. Your incredible grassroots support helped elect Lateefah Simon to Congress.
Our victory? It’s yours too. But now, the real fight begins.
In January, Trump and his extremist allies will undoubtedly work to roll back our rights, block climate action, and give billionaires more tax breaks.
So what’s our job, Friend? To defend our democracy the same exact way we ran this campaign: from the roots up. Lateefah is ready to stand up for justice — and she’s already taking action. As the newly elected Vice Chair of the Progressive Caucus, she’s been hard at work collaborating with her colleagues, preparing and planning for the fight ahead.
But she needs us to stand hand-in-hand with her.
Will you consider becoming a monthly donor to Lateefah’s campaign? Even $5 a month helps us secure our plan to fight back. Together, we can show extremists that our democracy isn’t for sale. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=x_121124_financeupdate&recurring=1]

name: David Horowitz
subject: America is on the brink of destruction
body:
Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ae9f2c65e0d947b5be6c2de42661ca40&_e=2YDwdNSAsCGVoOfpGbMFinCmAge_CgkFuWSvBGapQrp_1GMvrT9UxnDVDhoQCICXxyQhgTYdLqwff58EcbvE5yn3MNw7bjUwStw6DpQjcIuJvHdZRtdSV1PC-EyNEgdhJ0z6pjqKVs703vDIMb5O29lUR4BQd4HDb-BI9oxyR72f_1iDijm7vMTzroV3QG1Y5mNKdSlonEQ-Ovboq_FLO_-n6jv1AtNUq8-_b3_ekUI3pGJ_vIFq_lL9eBFiVwPkxXSkkb7i4gzFLtFYsq2Hs7emBFp8X57OvkblHdM2ehPpXAuuAj1GSuLUR2ZU_yE0ON6JUv0mlQRmovuI-Uvd6UIoBdiaGyOV8SG8YKr9oI2bhUyCeRQUC0yhHsAaBgiAO-tgByujTRxNUZjwKA0oTp5OSf7818AuJ9eQAemfA4c%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ae9f2c65e0d947b5be6c2de42661ca40&_e=2YDwdNSAsCGVoOfpGbMFinCmAge_CgkFuWSvBGapQrp_1GMvrT9UxnDVDhoQCICXxyQhgTYdLqwff58EcbvE5yn3MNw7bjUwStw6DpQjcIuJvHdZRtdSV1PC-EyNEgdhJ0z6pjqKVs703vDIMb5O29lUR4BQd4HDb-BI9oxyR72f_1iDijm7vMTzroV3QG1Y5mNKdSlonEQ-Ovboq_FLO_-n6jv1AtNUq8-_b3_ekUI3pGJ_vIFq_lL9eBFiVwPkmJXwRk50iUiko7djkbdTl9iYouPFpYUZjjUp6OBwJ39o9Deory_ovifsHwFG3t5DpEukrOvQ74qnRU74l8b-O5zvLEJtzTFh15w0wl0_bHlPCiyPc8bJNB4lwPIEGJMbA25sEADGkP_QNIcIcVe7A6PiibyWvB5fdCPYCmxzyeI%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. clean_body: Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008.| | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. Peter – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b7cfb164650f4234b9241f86bd4a6e04&_e=l5ZH2Tj2_UeGbPg4_ozVAyTvo8tjq1kqb18dhKxRVZPJBmbaN4Y1ZMq1q6Mh9yANkvYuTh9hsSMcmPwfeK9Qt7NM_Tf0aniqmO3ydHQvDapIbk9mM_LmRHHmR5K8fLgi8nkQ4wqEB1Vpq3rdeNphY43xrD_lGhWBc6T2nYhVHzHlSphowAPgUKVQYemDTdVW628_cXx4PfC0het0RMaDTF4-FfJ7ne4ptl7ZOgWydzU0UHzX9HJVcPfRrArIqvQmtm29dSDJkplVDVSH3yoPGqAygQfdUTV648hXbup9Y4DyNkTOdDyWwkNk7nvtalXnSI8TJz4EzKcV7s_V_ZzoKudimp8h224dNwVInxHB0855muFxfYCsKvKEq-UZ9jyECUg4U4sOWxbpthIlgd127h3EQZAXIF8Gkl79XI1xQ8o%3D)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b7cfb164650f4234b9241f86bd4a6e04&_e=l5ZH2Tj2_UeGbPg4_ozVAyTvo8tjq1kqb18dhKxRVZPJBmbaN4Y1ZMq1q6Mh9yANkvYuTh9hsSMcmPwfeK9Qt7NM_Tf0aniqmO3ydHQvDapIbk9mM_LmRHHmR5K8fLgi8nkQ4wqEB1Vpq3rdeNphY43xrD_lGhWBc6T2nYhVHzHlSphowAPgUKVQYemDTdVW628_cXx4PfC0het0RMaDTF4-FfJ7ne4ptl7ZOgWydzU0UHzX9HJVcPfRrArIqvQm-bklNzJx2cUbAmpHrVnX9jdNOcbp-7hf7GpLWawpAk6BKDVN74UvwyOlMkK5hYguqoU9tLGVrhaUhGQ7tdprX92TiO6abL7D88pVxWk50tUrxeaFJ2r40TEZmVU8yOtOfdhI8KdwGnC91bz4SkSS2VmkcZf3YMuisX-JT6-80zM%3D)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Peter — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.

Let’s celebrate this milestone and commit to continuing the work that got us here. | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. body:
“He’s not going to be permitted to speak.”

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/cd1aabbaccd7c4d8/?utm_campaign=20241210&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has
ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday
to possibly _“HOLD ME IN CONTEMPT.”_

Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory,
and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former
lawyer – _yours truly_ – bankrupt and behind bars.

During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, _I
will not be permitted to speak._

It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest
me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and
disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech.

But I will never surrender this battle, _because FREEDOM IS ALWAYS
WORTH FIGHTING FOR._

They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but
so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom!

WITH MY FINANCIAL ACCOUNTS NOW SEIZED, MY ONLY HOPE OF REMAINING IN
THIS BATTLE DEPENDS ON THE GENEROSITY OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU.

_Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still
dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give
right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it._

body:

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=fM3mGwOceA4YqfP302Y2aCWlcAgfKZLBFgtwWSw2VPPi275KvhgCr7ZjMD7lUyTgEOU9H7SgV9hHPGqetkcC1LooiHJ5f41ZT04bKHyGAUN9UNJS3zGt7qrYNUQ4y6VqtiDBqhW8dtM%2F58Cor5qAYykyOI78hLehkFPsmF4GW0YAxzVQsEiiQxNziXAkrwhb9MMGrD0omqatR%2F41%2BdmUvzkGZvWGzPykvYk7fpK5I9lzzdN4WMbO7QfUNE%2B69bvRDwC59CKuE8TJSgLcLacDlEVCZzpPb8Ayr8oaCBZkXO1ZLel4wGgJSZF8wfltqx756GSn6XR6i%2BA%2Bk1ZsgGAOonlcccpdI7I4M%2FfEx%2FqKOLsxwH4z1eOhtfvGqS5WLqM60eLC%2BzTPX2lO%2FgIodR6yrNB6QFPthElYAwKw9kEs718GAa0wzNX4UJg6oZdYwdWA)

Over the past few weeks, Donald Trump has nominated a barrage of MAGA loyalists to hold seats in his presidential cabinet. We here at Team Ruiz are circulating an internal survey to judge how voters feel about Donald Trump’s picks — and we need your input. [Will you take our short survey to share if you approve or disapprove of Trump’s cabinet nominations?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98541857/516992901/1847103704?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_121124_1_1_Cabinet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTMwMmViMjEtZWViNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F49kUSkpH1Un7FG98Db2Kj1mDx2UI_0iZvsr4lLoVn4=&emci=9002eb21-eeb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9302eb21-eeb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986) | | **[TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98541861/516992905/1847103704?source=SBD_EM_ENG_30DO_121124_1_1_Cabinet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTMwMmViMjEtZWViNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F49kUSkpH1Un7FG98Db2Kj1mDx2UI_0iZvsr4lLoVn4=&emci=9002eb21-eeb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9302eb21-eeb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4131986)**
---
From former Fox News hosts to fossil fuel executives, one thing is clear: Trump is gearing up to enact his Project 2025 like never before.
With his top trusted MAGA allies, he’ll have all the support he needs to carry out his plan to slash federal jobs, destroy the Department of Education, and so much more — that’s why we need to know where the American people stand.

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. | | **At Movement Labs, informing, connecting, and getting voters ready to participate is a year-round job.** Because as we saw in this election, and many before it, voting rights are not equal across the board in this country. Right-wing election officials skirt rules by switching up, reducing, or closing polling places – disproportionately affecting minority communities and college students. They close DMV locations to make it harder for folks to obtain photo IDs. Residents get randomly purged from the voter rolls if they skip an election. Voter outreach groups are intimidated and struggle to do their jobs registering and updating voter information. That's why we work all year long to connect voters, supporters, and volunteers together with the goal of building grassroots, people-powered networks that move voters to show up in every precinct in every election. **We can't afford to miss any chance for voters to make their voices heard. So whether you're in a red state, purple state, or feel just plain forgotten about, Movement Labs is coming to a county near you to organize, support – and yes, fund – local Democratic organizations.** We build resources year-round to cultivate, communicate, and organize in places where it's tough to win – and that's the long-term commitment that leads to victories big and small. _Sarah_ Sarah Long
Director of Development

clean_body: | | | | At Movement Labs, informing, connecting, and getting voters ready to participate is a year-round job. Because as we saw in this election, and many before it, voting rights are not equal across the board in this country. Right-wing election officials skirt rules by switching up, reducing, or closing polling places – disproportionately affecting minority communities and college students. They close DMV locations to make it harder for folks to obtain photo IDs. Residents get randomly purged from the voter rolls if they skip an election. Voter outreach groups are intimidated and struggle to do their jobs registering and updating voter information. That's why we work all year long to connect voters, supporters, and volunteers together with the goal of building grassroots, people-powered networks that move voters to show up in every precinct in every election. We can't afford to miss any chance for voters to make their voices heard. So whether you're in a red state, purple state, or feel just plain forgotten about, Movement Labs is coming to a county near you to organize, support – and yes, fund – local Democratic organizations. We build resources year-round to cultivate, communicate, and organize in places where it's tough to win – and that's the long-term commitment that leads to victories big and small. Sarah Sarah Long Director of Development Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Movement Labs instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

Fellow Virginia Republicans, With the conclusion of the 2024 RPV Advance this past weekend in Charlottesville, I thank the 500 grassroots Republicans who gathered together to celebrate our 2024 clean-sweep election of President Donald J. Trump and Republican majorities in the US House and US Senate. Our party won the popular vote, the Electoral College, and a Republican trifecta in Washington—while holding six conservative seats on the US Supreme Court. Through this historic landslide victory, the American people have entrusted President Trump and Congressional Republicans with a broad mandate to restore American greatness. These successes follow our great Virginia Republican comeback since the 2021 election of Republicans Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears, and Jason Miyares as Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General, respectively. They are a tribute to the hard work of great grassroots Republicans who serve as members of our 124 local Republican committees across Virginia, many of whom attended our 2024 RPV Advance. This Advance was our 41st annual gathering at which we celebrated just-completed GOP victories, planned for the coming election cycle, collaborated and networked to form statewide partnerships, and celebrated recipients of annual RPV awards. Mark your calendar now for the 2025 RPV Advance on the weekend of December 5-7, 2025, at Kingsmill Resort in Williamsburg, VA. Soon, you’ll see a link to register for this annual gathering of Virginia grassroots Republicans. On behalf of myself and the entire RPV staff, **THANK YOU** for your leadership and service to our Commonwealth. Let’s bask over the holidays in our most recent victories, ready to pivot in January to the Virginia state election cycle in a shared commitment to elect a Republican Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Attorney General, and Virginia House of Delegates! Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays, and a Happy New Year to you and your family from a grateful Republican Party of Virginia!
---
---
RICHARD L. ANDERSON 31st Chairman Republican Party of Virginia
---

body:

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: America desperately needs to hear this message
body:
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=60ca8ebdca5e4321a57c764752e3f43b&_e=nNi_15FxdKoxtFVM2UTP6hLWYujJHY17CkXyDfERmHEvz5HYQ1kaNcL-_rTBs8pN5jm_nTyYYwBYU22fDjsySuHrbDFXMZ397ndjx2hw4_yCPU9S1UvjogUoNVSdIfP_H9mFKFvvhVan4K9MeDgxqJ5JJVJEP8MmaO1ey7C9oiKF8aU6LuJwKx3_9FgLUkpG2VnAwH0S6VvCWenOliPDp0c2pOJwTVDCuTIArI4X5YxCaj_SzJnkrA9Yhb1cSf1S0sGE6vGQCqOkT6vVphrcEro6ekHztWefr_zCC3P6-cpv82BCqGAlfOm7F90QsWNbeJC7BdB4FknDzQJL1Oc8mlFKhMzUSMOYmYJ2rwZuw-g%3D)
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=60ca8ebdca5e4321a57c764752e3f43b&_e=nNi_15FxdKoxtFVM2UTP6hLWYujJHY17CkXyDfERmHEvz5HYQ1kaNcL-_rTBs8pN5jm_nTyYYwBYU22fDjsySuHrbDFXMZ397ndjx2hw4_yCPU9S1UvjogUoNVSdIfP_H9mFKFvvhVan4K9MeDgxqJ5JJVJEP8MmaO1ey7C9oiK1oX9EXRMb8iwAeY2fAUainHF0SPRaC2GXmD2t3CS8iNeuh2WHiSRsD08HbzFOx6XlIzSNYRekWnqXIun2BG0kNiroCu_YVYkn0v6tidPQZ-hzUwsNsSs8wMKeB51zr6S1neG5Tmx58lDZkALeVyt1QPXo9fvzpb0PwPda_z9PZY-AJ6ErxSjq5vMyDXu6SFH0Oq8jrKoiH8F7mnIJ2-dn)

This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=60ca8ebdca5e4321a57c764752e3f43b&_e=nNi_15FxdKoxtFVM2UTP6hLWYujJHY17CkXyDfERmHEvz5HYQ1kaNcL-_rTBs8pN5jm_nTyYYwBYU22fDjsySuHrbDFXMZ397ndjx2hw4_yCPU9S1UvjogUoNVSdIfP_H9mFKFvvhVan4K9MeDgxqJ5JJVJEP8MmaO1ey7C9oiLk3tOwRAnKMtFsQrWh-FR7770YpX_B07gxXfnfvhTeQuwnK8kj-xaf0ylnGNEqKOYYLiYSRXc6z9cQbAe970cNDTacyiHCDukw06KQp09SkJ0fz4XypxnsDBBMEEZsKdhFD2Sn5IXciLpXOpvclLeTn5Es1v7D-w7xBomUoxa45xSGY1O_0WtAwLAv8O5wsGg%3D)

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount >>>](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=60ca8ebdca5e4321a57c764752e3f43b&_e=nNi_15FxdKoxtFVM2UTP6hLWYujJHY17CkXyDfERmHEvz5HYQ1kaNcL-_rTBs8pN5jm_nTyYYwBYU22fDjsySuHrbDFXMZ397ndjx2hw4_yCPU9S1UvjogUoNVSdIfP_H9mFKFvvhVan4K9MeDgxqJ5JJVJEP8MmaO1ey7C9oiIQ899p09x--9zesU1kgzBzHLf_3yTh-3IMCHI5MbgLmt3BCf6vTqkB8jHHPTyq0XqvnSbQXUqunf1hpvnd4d5_0Z1fMOd3XI220kUPtpf2v9foUu0blXjtMQxx3c-Xk8KWw3CTqdaPSXaRk46ajxc24Oj9NUkChRIVY1MET41HCB0SHh2Hr4ZUAfPC2cY2lWjNEcTII8RmtAZheTkr-n-n)**

Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below:

[Donate $10](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=60ca8ebdca5e4321a57c764752e3f43b&_e=nNi_15FxdKoxtFVM2UTP6hLWYujJHY17CkXyDfERmHEvz5HYQ1kaNcL-_rTBs8pN5jm_nTyYYwBYU22fDjsySuHrbDFXMZ397ndjx2hw4_yCPU9S1UvjogUoNVSdIfP_H9mFKFvvhVan4K9MeDgxqJ5JJVJEP8MmaO1ey7C9oiK_i23SuPA8QrPw-4bfJV-3kvvPZ2daZc_Wp1SCAahiZ0BU2G5bUGJJud-TYu5JIoK_diiRw2rFk0yWiaRYw5Td7tH2GVz-ffZDFYvpHlsEVqYoWMZPUR849Rjr7A0SesftojZ74dy_FP_CAmvw4Ct33C6iOfBcTTj8m_4f0ieGky7d8z71aT_7Qu4udzJfDNS5Lb0TEUKT7ssuiiyryaYE)

You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more.

Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. The Atlas Society is on the frontlines of fighting in the philosophical culture war, which may determine the fate of the country's future.

We CANNOT give up the culture or give up young people.

This is more important than a campaign or a single election.

You and I must invest in reaching young people with this message.

Please don't wait to take action.

My goal is to raise this $25,000 ASAP within a 48-hour period. Can I count on you to make a donation?

clean_body: This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before. No, this isn't about a campaign or an election. I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society. Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends. Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important? If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are desperate to hear the unfiltered truth. This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for: Free market capitalism Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles. Young people need an alternative. The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more. I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below: You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more. Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. The Atlas Society is on the frontlines of fighting in the philosophical culture war, which may determine the fate of the country's future. We CANNOT give up the culture or give up young people. This is more important than a campaign or a single election. You and I must invest in reaching young people with this message. Please don't wait to take action. My goal is to raise this $25,000 ASAP within a 48-hour period. Can I count on you to make a donation? Kellyanne Conway, Former Senior Counselor to President Trump The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible.

name: Team Crow
subject: No fight is too tough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Folks — Jason has always gone where the fight is. No matter how tough.

When there wasn’t enough money for him to go to college, Jason got to work delivering newspapers and working at Arby’s to save up.

When our nation was under attack, Jason stepped up. He went active duty after 9/11 and served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2024]

When a five-term GOP congressman avoided passing gun safety legislation (and instead took money from the NRA), Jason refused to let that slide. So he ran for Congress and flipped this seat blue for the first time since the district was created.

And when Republicans didn’t have the courage to hold Donald Trump accountable, Jason stepped up. He served as an impeachment manager for Trump’s first trial and exposed the truth about Donald Trump directly to the American people.

Now, Jason is on the front lines to bring service-oriented leadership to Congress. He’s fighting for Colorado values, and is more ready than ever to defend Coloradans from the potential impacts of the incoming Trump Administration.

Are you ready to take on this fight with him?

Will you donate today to strengthen our movement for the work that lies ahead? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2024]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Peter — did you see Valerie’s email? This Saturday marks 12 years since the Sandy Hook massacre where 20 students and 6 staff members lost their lives to gun violence. In the years since, our nation has witnessed countless tragedies resulting from our government’s inaction to the gun violence epidemic. But, Valerie is committed to fighting for a future where our children do not fear for their lives every time they attend school. Valerie is committed to a future free of gun violence. We’re forwarding Monday’s email from Valerie where she shares more about what we can do to enact change. [Give it a read and then please consider adding your name to our gun violence petition below:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98544093/517000037/717271575?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_121124_1_2_Gun-Violence-PetitionFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzM3ZGY0OS1mNGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jzQm55DzYvRwqnRtPE93QO6fW-3paEGXogdXuzVIJDQ=&emci=6d2e0191-f4b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=fc37df49-f4b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=799895) | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98544095/517000041/717271575?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_121124_1_2_Gun-Violence-PetitionFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzM3ZGY0OS1mNGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jzQm55DzYvRwqnRtPE93QO6fW-3paEGXogdXuzVIJDQ=&emci=6d2e0191-f4b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=fc37df49-f4b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=799895)

* * *
_Begin Forwarded Message from Valerie Foushee:_
Peter,
**This Saturday, December 14, will mark 12 years since the Sandy Hook massacre.**
On that fateful day, 20 children between the ages of six and seven years old were tragically killed in their own classrooms — along with 6 adult staff members.
Had those 12 girls and 8 boys’ futures not been taken away, they would now be between 18 and 19 years old. **They would have graduated high school, voted in their first elections, started college, and followed their path into adulthood. But, they were robbed of these opportunities.**
In the 12 years since the Sandy Hook massacre, our nation has only witnessed further tragedies as a result of gun violence. Our government has systemically failed to enact critical gun violence prevention laws — leading to innumerable loss of life and preventable heartache for their loved ones.
The passage of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act was a step in the right direction. But, it still isn’t enough. We need to fight for tighter gun laws and regulations to ensure no more communities befall the same fate as Sandy Hook, Robb Elementary School, Parkland High School, and so many others. We need immediate, urgent action to honor the many souls lost to gun violence. [Please, Peter, join me in fighting for a future free of gun violence by adding your name to the petition:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98544097/517000043/717271575?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_121124_1_2_Gun-Violence-PetitionFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzM3ZGY0OS1mNGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jzQm55DzYvRwqnRtPE93QO6fW-3paEGXogdXuzVIJDQ=&emci=6d2e0191-f4b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=fc37df49-f4b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=799895)
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98544099/517000045/717271575?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_121124_1_2_Gun-Violence-PetitionFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzM3ZGY0OS1mNGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jzQm55DzYvRwqnRtPE93QO6fW-3paEGXogdXuzVIJDQ=&emci=6d2e0191-f4b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=fc37df49-f4b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=799895)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The threat of the 'nonprofit killer" bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121124_2&amount=25]
Truthout: House Passes Chilling “Nonprofit Killer” Bill [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121124_2&amount=25]
We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President-elect Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes has passed a major hurdle toward becoming law, recently passing in the U.S. House of Representatives.
The bill, also known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons.
“ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will .” “ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin.
Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House now and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress next year. That's why we need to start working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121124_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121124_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121124_2&amount=25]

Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? | As we build the foundation for 2026, we’re taking stock of what we know about MI-03.

▶️ In 2022, we made history by electing the first woman to Congress and the first Democrat in 50 years to serve this district.

▶️ In 2024, we defended MI-03 amidst a surge of Republican attacks.

**▶️ **The stakes are much higher for 2026. **We already have our first Republican opponent.** And this year, we won this district by three points LESS than Hillary’s first election.
