disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98544573/517001650/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjUzYjYzNC1mN2I3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2fuZLpFLXCe43DWLMP_XSkOdWyChnEBY7e1FaEqi1w=) The support for our campaign in 2024 has been overwhelming:
* **50,000+ individuals** donated their hard-earned money to power our campaign.
* **More than 217,000** Michiganders voted for our vision.
* And we defied the odds, **winning by 7%** in a district that Trump won by 2%.

I’m so deeply grateful for every single person who made this possible. When I decided to run for Congress, I knew I wanted to run a different kind of campaign. I wanted to build a broad coalition of supporters, community members and leaders, a campaign rooted in the values we all care about – protecting our fundamental rights, ensuring our kids can thrive, and making sure every family has a chance to get ahead. And thanks to you that’s exactly what we did. [_**Now, I’m ready to take this coalition building approach to Congress. But I can’t do it without your continued support. name: Riley Gaines
subject: Warning: The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner
body:
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex. | |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdp6X2RdJE07uoHPu8Ul4ZOIBr5ohckC8809MlciidT6rGsXP2Wpx4XH0r05NbIjMt4KpCwJ1fXFzbq0GV0kgOfI_jpVclAnfrDONhABXSWpe62EZb9TXjGCK9Tv5xFjHLBiqGh4Hp2gZr4z4yHKBgqXX5Gqr68gRV5QKrSiiWdEbg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdon1vUzPHbtbiBAO3xnSWCNCdJ6QFmcWCgsuqBWMJSctIJK5dVzZCotWW-pYmYjN4tG5VWJL9cSXLgPO9EGdLBxZgEmdloeDyAuTQUuOpedSA7HFxIqgADgelkYmI8gncGayyre_mEAXDbwgTKFizEdY9VmmC3G4lDOEONuiKATIQ%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdoRltMI4eztMGDz3Ia8cjkaL71E7ynaJx-PohkDt1kzCreOE_Qc64ERYMmscUBMS6kLhGyPqOZBqhOezWxKAoWewYEWpMIEkyZegXPhhVkZG6SzyisPm0xyMducHJkmjlRooLZ4cCCV1V-QhXqURUH9xZIAKXh1kvaO2AQUpYIWVA%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdpcnrp7gYLYC7pSW7pzUMd-GDRXlE6b6VwSKdTNjma7hTvbK_VCwkveOjAZSXq8d_b7oGUZIlAjtZIHp9r0q87GLyUHinrMC3invQGRuxYMBNkXzLZY64AjLA_cI3lsSJt8uPxqNNFgFsT99zoyXcoNY1trJxFf8mAU83IN_uWGag%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdrdESRsITBd2lxH-kpLSui66M8dnDMtTKg1nD3jRSi265oNo0LuSo4JBczBVtM5DaF3Z7Q4n-R6B30g2M96r7r0wu1udJuDJI1N3aGt42kS2E2y01N-wpIPVueqjf5sQxSubh8wfbgbnqKPEqpoFHp2eKGhiVlycalxhKHvf3FLhA%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdqENEor21hHh6VO5z74IWv9zOt3MGguwwPRf6Dt7PZbFAjRIxR7f-e7IfdecURujp-avhhyTMRPV98p0Jf6M1kd7K8SeAtpMwTJH6l1QAzHiJTa6tuAEn83eCwiRgW2KULSu3gD36fHLWqAZvvho9bzO8gL5oigZIELuqtsaaoaBg%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdoHyE963ADZZUzpQd5WBYPpIRSJPsNO_m1ppc7taHQNJnxznMhudb5CanKUipaZr7bQ_S43Jg2qbTdK8D4aZsfyRp8VTvOLhHAGEaZ6-0_tNqvcZ-ALgrMF5P3X2trZRSE_rtWFrT8fp7N2CS--It5tIfwS_DQ9y--3aODj9RUnWw%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdq3aTivdcVZk58OWIfOem7G28BmTS2p_Ku2yCvcWwBDj4IPf6C-MtW3id2qcdpPhkhUb8PzMmto0jXbWVfMJj43y9xqgCww46g0-MbP9ve5QtZNXeZMPnEJgam4cPkcU4-TV4pM1u_hOlFSpL9G2HoMrFO4kvDj7i2QWZvf1KCyMQ%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdoKN-lKFNUtvmVVDVB_rtl9s05FRAUpCaaeLlwB4UlkvRIBavyuU6wIC8zsqr3-oU2y9uyI__b9pYRwL6dHTRNUgKkcuZ16-qqXz0a6kobwHfqmrQiw-US20wKvZHyZplDj3GH62B71Os6lL-ZD6AHhySEtEZf5NKh01siTlN-Gsg%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdqYHFCLgCPfqjJcO0mONLs-eSt1UbwpPpSM9cjB-bBq3qMt_VgWVDWsT8DhPhaQ9wcCFnZZY0d14VGRULbpwrAgfFTYD0nTk3zBJMwGHXgOWbjFb7lhlEa2BXeUCVhgtrmA192pw4BK8VYq1H-7B3w9IJ0ccqIoM8ocWz2OT4ocJw%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=47a7c24773204cadacf9fb1e3300b231&_e=PHT-y3mtm7vcVKy6B39t3Qoa4w6edmrAOfXVquQo73CVlV0wY76Riwa5JcZJedU8cZvCV1FHV8Yyj_grdZoEx1pt-rAnGulqgO_sdsvW3oIGsc2Tqc6dxdUuEPe6BAN1oMDM4BNXj1aS8Q2fJ4jyzWfj5537G2WWntvMno4BqDV2eB25yXSIEP7KYTOfDSWh6Y-J3bwATNiAMZMh9mybvCqLzy7KAsnRTpXMB-_dzdon1vUzPHbtbiBAO3xnSWCNSv-z2c077Mc9ylLLxMwRlrCxao_9HnBtNhBWducOvzUfBGVXarMin_jzg9RRiyqgYFerepgWHgkdYUnowznbFcoYvlHcj8FZtHZiVDUKdLd7dqqLJPJwJEUv2On-g14Dughne0KtZWnlvEYsQIHtbw%3D%3D)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. clean_body: I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

Dear Friend,
---
Winter rages here in Montana, but we have all we need— family, a fire, and hearts full of faith! Proverbs 22:6 says, "Train up a child in the way he should go: and when he is old, he will not depart from it." And that's exactly what I'm doing!

I love watching my kids take hold of their faith, and there's nothing better than worshiping alongside them! Here's a video of some father-son worship during a cold Montana day! _**Watch Father-son Montana cabin worship mashup **_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=13c611c5f7f343cbad0176fe1a8ef524&_e=nUg8ZiA7pYMWG-1cKCX3KNrvch_03GG3QeMgZDWug9jIpegvXtECA9W0OaHNH8kz3_K9C0V7sa6CZOKEZkaHc6ybSBNGbk8vxNcVRH0uJLriaMdqHAtWrm9MIMSMob44IiJMcIkjnMyABlkSL46E4WnLYKMxeCNATclVOmCpGD6aguKtVotZ5r8-MpcnLcFSLChyuKb7PVyKzD0kqV4iGA32a_BmAhiWHV0HOrWNmKe3iNgVciemVuN2pfUmb11UQWRPmhp7LOi8xLN5A4qvucBSMuE08biRJmPo-VERpH-uNrzUez6goDCny0cilTFiAoeCCesJZvEi85Q1p7H-vmfQLaNvYNOf0AlisodGhUM%3D)
---
If you haven't heard, on Friday we are gathering in Texas to hold a Nations Dinner and to implore heaven to protect the persecuted church. This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=df95cb1f5e4d464f9dbdea4488ba319f&_e=OYhNSUgl7L2DzAu2ZtqnilbOfTDLkEzx4-dn5_Wc8jHBHdy4fw8n6bNYT_Y9EPjlgET41y5RV4DyXCoTIo6LoeXEQd62A-G_qUhUJYXjudJPVWKsf8kQ-zQKLK8elLbAwCPCjkIxjuDISK5uguID4nbRUUup7cCxiR5eTdbEcEfqLL3XZmcTBkPVKV10_kAs9bGkJtXDj27QjkxE50ik6o1KZx9h5396IEFc1ZBTlVGCYQMmlZK3I3cSk-6KZeXpzp0Y_qIYrAjqZ3TXkjY4CNJB6GrOzZUvItAidRCJz0QReWMSN1v41iO5QkXlsbgAUzLB3hbROxkOy1xAt8anDFdFHkWqRVbjt6EOiHPyS5Q%3D)

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount >>>](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=df95cb1f5e4d464f9dbdea4488ba319f&_e=OYhNSUgl7L2DzAu2ZtqnilbOfTDLkEzx4-dn5_Wc8jHBHdy4fw8n6bNYT_Y9EPjlgET41y5RV4DyXCoTIo6LoeXEQd62A-G_qUhUJYXjudJPVWKsf8kQ-zQKLK8elLbAwCPCjkIxjuDISK5uguID4iWORwgDtcIzwei1EoVPy5h6dj4mTnl4--YXxPsQNEybdE9G0QKcQSMGWPAaCOloUr1BF5OMnPTaT6RrXgggifuQuea9ZkdyDjYIzIZJg4Kv7568MIXbmVbjwyUkyWOQ_G2Q5zT8UWKZP9mfV_kJliywcNF1OFeWxc2onr1KpNEqKnqTpAa9-prHbMo30lZuB7Xi8rfskEQMatX13E4DWRM%3D)**

Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=58bd681eeaa642d9bdf494fd09cd45d8&_e=AEyjsl4YwuWxAI_kWtTi1sfIRbzmRxIRVDESehI63d3taDdf_bI292bDhYiscgveQ3ZqUVUcaXb4Zktbpqqdb-Yzb6xhRjsvX8XXVV9v7GN67VcX_EXwe7HxFKo-bKc3EWH4bf9jFFcYWXfs07gEbpj7xtKJHbbxKv5R45_xGELwAf7-1YrIaBxLyvLwWpcJsoQMnbtu7FijkM_BowR9Nhe52owXe_G-89D3sLr15ogAN9lIDtuUtOXKlsHU5jFHeFlB0MJR-ENDI65nlRk92jAc3xHY08rFOckL4DRk9uZE0V3YH1aJUlmQf3nfQAgcnSr9N1C64PlLZOPjMo8Obg1Sdk3fpsCjr4Bv0dCeOn6qChnkZFv3WV5Ct29x1lM7)

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount >>>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=58bd681eeaa642d9bdf494fd09cd45d8&_e=AEyjsl4YwuWxAI_kWtTi1sfIRbzmRxIRVDESehI63d3taDdf_bI292bDhYiscgveQ3ZqUVUcaXb4Zktbpqqdb-Yzb6xhRjsvX8XXVV9v7GN67VcX_EXwe7HxFKo-bKc3EWH4bf9jFFcYWXfs07gEbpj7xtKJHbbxKv5R45_xGELpbNc7A3DaGeDMAgvx3UXiSdv_Hf1jqBo9X1rIpt1pnL8n9BZfjhZHY8jerCRufM9UdjFSoUqxBMGUp0wCntynwc1xXDDz5NEq5igEvtthn6NByQtZ35_P5INyjw_cyZM-qsRgf4_QaS51nRgjIHv3rLx-PIW9Ky-aRmBUiScFpCVutmuTByLzM9Il6vt8FjDcnuesZauvjIlJcR6qVG9e)**

Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below:

subject: Democrats to BLOCK President Trump’s deportation plan.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
We need all hands on deck. Democrats are trying to subvert the will of the people and BLOCK his plan for mass deportations.| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=16a292d2c7b148d186e7e5e8f7213262&_t=pBwhWNTh1FIOF-2d353sN9rMyKRLv7vOCKiAMCd9TKsJ7j0UhfqYMUDybn-ZoM7-TtWF7l6MPLWxh_kf2jkK6GwghYf_SHR_WUT90LuuUbS549k6aRDzGGWo6_zHOG5y)_.
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=16a292d2c7b148d186e7e5e8f7213262&_e=o9wvd66U_Az1HYnqBlLecgHBcXZcswTynxB42Mh8caOPsJLz-jCJ2SCG7bDXDuxNSduxue57gYtN0IYgRkBHnaBgzYqm3n3486chZu-M3yP5qQzU7CwyXGs3VA_j1ve-TCURD7NK8XPSl-yGkeNZi1VJefyR-RWTUQTJCZuFKwDAZ-vqmzOaxZfd8sJ_ArpQGyC1nyogLj2RtJlzYPMEpBXTMuaBK80eEW0fobFK4V3FtTccXMkbZ6WwOrGiRqWWzkje5tJz9Ubkw2AUCvzvSBT9zWjOHyoJmj2qcFkur6T2zWSQVFhOEkpCnxkuin9ecb0jTN0My0QQSaFxq7EMXhZZ79Cc9YuMKBgutoYb3KhBIYqhJvteBXHyvXFa-iAK6Rwbgg5IdAFE-pndbnZ7zqH1i2j5__xnE1U2lcMcMnam-o7vesiFyE2d8Gj-H3Uj)
---
Peter,** ** more than 77 million Americans voted for President Trump, but now top **Democrats are trying to subvert the will of the people and BLOCK his plan for mass deportations.** ** ** **And sanctuary cities are even planning to rally their police officers to stand in the way of ICE agents enforcing the law!**
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=16a292d2c7b148d186e7e5e8f7213262&_e=o9wvd66U_Az1HYnqBlLecgHBcXZcswTynxB42Mh8caOPsJLz-jCJ2SCG7bDXDuxNSduxue57gYtN0IYgRkBHnaBgzYqm3n3486chZu-M3yP5qQzU7CwyXGs3VA_j1ve-TCURD7NK8XPSl-yGkeNZi1VJefyR-RWTUQTJCZuFKwDAZ-vqmzOaxZfd8sJ_ArpQGyC1nyogLj2RtJlzYPMEpBXTMuaBK80eEW0fobFK4V3FtTccXMkbZ6WwOrGiRqWWzkje5tJz9Ubkw2AUCvzvSBT9zWjOHyoJmj2qcFkur6ROulCFYl1Qm9vw7HMNy8SmBvfc9ZYyBJew44xAq9nYpTYw_nck23g7ydJHiXETVeS2-sLH-JB_gg_9FgtASJAsxa24eD9fkrU_xFQ89U2Ui63UUsC46VYnug9pSCCVJFwwVjNfoDsSFj9BnhYVRWrF)
---
This is a disgrace to our country and the millions of Americans who voted for President Trump and his policies. But don’t worry, help is on the way: **Heritage Action was the #1 group on the front lines fighting the Biden-Harris administration's open border policies.** _**And now we’re fighting to enact President Trump’s common-sense border security plans.**_ Democrats will do anything to stop President Trump from securing the border and deporting criminal illegal immigrants.
So, if you want to ensure President Trump and conservatives are successful, **[**we need you on our team today!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=16a292d2c7b148d186e7e5e8f7213262&_e=o9wvd66U_Az1HYnqBlLecgHBcXZcswTynxB42Mh8caOPsJLz-jCJ2SCG7bDXDuxNSduxue57gYtN0IYgRkBHnaBgzYqm3n3486chZu-M3yP5qQzU7CwyXGs3VA_j1ve-TCURD7NK8XPSl-yGkeNZi1VJefyR-RWTUQTJCZuFKwDAZ-vqmzOaxZfd8sJ_ArpQGyC1nyogLj2RtJlzYPMEpBXTMuaBK80eEW0fobFK4V3FtTccXMkbZ6WwOrGiRqWWzkje5tJz9Ubkw2AUCvzvSBT9zWjOHyoJmj2qcFkur6QfZjnRAfZMYIpGGhQGbItI_29ZNmeJH3116bcyZjCG-T4u-OpaugPyA50osKbQOv2dyctRA1X3oN-Xz9nZyWIPkMLy9ucMorg4N2iQ_y0OB4U2IKdSxl5uECvZq0PNmhS6IUqW9lSDgPLg84Okzar4)**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=16a292d2c7b148d186e7e5e8f7213262&_e=o9wvd66U_Az1HYnqBlLecgHBcXZcswTynxB42Mh8caOPsJLz-jCJ2SCG7bDXDuxNSduxue57gYtN0IYgRkBHnaBgzYqm3n3486chZu-M3yP5qQzU7CwyXGs3VA_j1ve-TCURD7NK8XPSl-yGkeNZi1VJefyR-RWTUQTJCZuFKwDAZ-vqmzOaxZfd8sJ_ArpQGyC1nyogLj2RtJlzYPMEpBXTMuaBK80eEW0fobFK4V3FtTccXMkbZ6WwOrGiRqWWzkje5tJz9Ubkw2AUCvzvSBT9zWjOHyoJmj2qcFkur6RAMyG2IjegE9krnNV1QqF7x7t9KaXILpYEow7gc1bTCYaBueuSUWVnmLjC3csGtFwCtrfs81dgnVTL8WC5ZmlDIaIwAQxoUVM8Vkfls5pX4dwblQyPGWdYhTTFgy7-_JrzWlg5ssIWe4ok3xs612JK)

Please, please do not sit on the sidelines as Democrats try to keep the borders open and millions of illegal immigrants in our country.
---
|
---

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Mattress Mack doing well after open-heart surgery, constable says,** " Houston Chronicle's **John Lomax V** -- "**Jim "Mattress Mack" McIngvale** is out of the hospital after undergoing open-heart surgery Tuesday, according to a social media post made by the Precinct 4 Constable's Office.

The 73-year-old owner of Gallery Furniture said in a video on social media that he had a "leaky mitral valve," which prompted the operation. Although McIngvale said that he would be at the hospital for roughly a week after the surgery, the Houston furniture mogul appeared in an image alongside Precinct 4 deputies outside the north Houston Gallery Furniture location the day of his operation.

"A lot of people have been calling and asking what they can do for me," McIngvale said in a video posted announcing his procedure. "The best thing you can do for me is pray, obviously, and if you need any furniture, come out and buy furniture. That'll ease a lot of my anxiety."

A leaky mitral valve, or mitral valve regurgitation, is the most common type of heart valve disease and occurs when a valve separating the chambers of the heart does not fully close, [causing blood to leak between the chambers, according to the Mayo Clinic](https://substack.com/redirect/849cb53a-eb8c-4aef-ade7-422bb3372030?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Without medical intervention, the condition can result heart rhythm problems or, in severe cases, heart failure.

[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/519b39e1-a663-49e5-9370-0e0a41a0d0c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Open-heart surgery is "usually the best solution for most valve conditions that cannot be managed with medication," according to [Houston Methodist's treatment page for heart valve diseases](https://substack.com/redirect/9ac4aefb-185c-4f93-bfc0-3b8b5223deb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

The news of McIngvale's scheduled surgery came just months after he was hospitalized following a cellulitis diagnosis in late August. The infection caused a "temporary disconnect of cognitive abilities," McIngvale said in an [interview with Fox26 shortly after he was released from the hospital](https://substack.com/redirect/7b67c4c7-800e-4614-ac9d-093b922bfda7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." * **TOP NEWS**

"**Mattress Mack doing well after open-heart surgery, constable says,** " Houston Chronicle's **John Lomax V** -- "**Jim "Mattress Mack" McIngvale** is out of the hospital after undergoing open-heart surgery Tuesday, according to a social media post made by the Precinct 4 Constable's Office.

The 73-year-old owner of Gallery Furniture said in a video on social media that he had a "leaky mitral valve," which prompted the operation. Although McIngvale said that he would be at the hospital for roughly a week after the surgery, the Houston furniture mogul appeared in an image alongside Precinct 4 deputies outside the north Houston Gallery Furniture location the day of his operation.

"A lot of people have been calling and asking what they can do for me," McIngvale said in a video posted announcing his procedure. "The best thing you can do for me is pray, obviously, and if you need any furniture, come out and buy furniture. That'll ease a lot of my anxiety."

A leaky mitral valve, or mitral valve regurgitation, is the most common type of heart valve disease and occurs when a valve separating the chambers of the heart does not fully close, [causing blood to leak between the chambers, according to the Mayo Clinic](https://substack.com/redirect/67b5aefb-b614-4973-b375-4ff36205c869?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Without medical intervention, the condition can result heart rhythm problems or, in severe cases, heart failure.

Open-heart surgery is "usually the best solution for most valve conditions that cannot be managed with medication," according to [Houston Methodist's treatment page for heart valve diseases](https://substack.com/redirect/02ff449d-56e9-48bd-a5e3-db8380fafa84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

The news of McIngvale's scheduled surgery came just months after he was hospitalized following a cellulitis diagnosis in late August. The infection caused a "temporary disconnect of cognitive abilities," McIngvale said in an [interview with Fox26 shortly after he was released from the hospital](https://substack.com/redirect/c7a50bf4-eadc-433a-869b-ecde4df69c44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Mattress Mack doing well after open-heart surgery, constable says, " Houston Chronicle's John Lomax V -- "Jim "Mattress Mack" McIngvale is out of the hospital after undergoing open-heart surgery Tuesday, according to a social media post made by the Precinct 4 Constable's Office. The 73-year-old owner of Gallery Furniture said in a video on social media that he had a "leaky mitral valve," which prompted the operation. Although McIngvale said that he would be at the hospital for roughly a week after the surgery, the Houston furniture mogul appeared in an image alongside Precinct 4 deputies outside the north Houston Gallery Furniture location the day of his operation. "A lot of people have been calling and asking what they can do for me," McIngvale said in a video posted announcing his procedure. "The best thing you can do for me is pray, obviously, and if you need any furniture, come out and buy furniture. That'll ease a lot of my anxiety." A leaky mitral valve, or mitral valve regurgitation, is the most common type of heart valve disease and occurs when a valve separating the chambers of the heart does not fully close, . Without medical intervention, the condition can result heart rhythm problems or, in severe cases, heart failure. Open-heart surgery is "usually the best solution for most valve conditions that cannot be managed with medication," according to . The news of McIngvale's scheduled surgery came just months after he was hospitalized following a cellulitis diagnosis in late August. The infection caused a "temporary disconnect of cognitive abilities," McIngvale said in an ." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. # **[Kari Lake](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=184e050bc5e742c686dc82546de191a4&_e=-CUzqOdb2s-JEDINNFEEkK9sbv4nahKLzdcfGSZeklk83dXsB547zl-nug_syWagFQRgP2I_gE65ilh-yhytq8LRlOJmTYk-bk3JOvghkxO_wuUN2rlk8kZfCKJI6oZOC2dm1ZdFGBK2K0W0Ur4o572MuzvV-TMBOFgNX9LT9f5E0SZQ4bredwTigzireyCGfaeKeS65Efmq3eFI63rb_1AEDe3SCApvPkwBID4fxefB7N0Zqpo_letPMvwtpBSltnFRzf3Qb9yzwoukJptNYlRvMB-MdPk80KprmwU4NUtOsGDiKlHwzJ5RRJicYBZK1Lj_HfgqZPzG2tG9_-Cn-Y6pltpsHPsTgLUL6kZOmiihTGjxPk9oSLb8zuvalUr7ZgJHKZJBvVJ4OTBczhs-EuvMxSDruAImzfJpyoOHEaU%3D)**

Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=184e050bc5e742c686dc82546de191a4&_e=-CUzqOdb2s-JEDINNFEEkK9sbv4nahKLzdcfGSZeklk83dXsB547zl-nug_syWagFQRgP2I_gE65ilh-yhytq8LRlOJmTYk-bk3JOvghkxO_wuUN2rlk8kZfCKJI6oZOC2dm1ZdFGBK2K0W0Ur4o572MuzvV-TMBOFgNX9LT9f5E0SZQ4bredwTigzireyCGfaeKeS65Efmq3eFI63rb_1AEDe3SCApvPkwBID4fxefB7N0Zqpo_letPMvwtpBSltnFRzf3Qb9yzwoukJptNYpTkRr_bESr8UzAF2Jksxcy0bBdw5iDEQ96QQDa-6CZabtVwEdki_GHD9jrMzdNJEJk0FitHRu7obaExUF9ijd8uXtwVoJmwRwHMDVBNGupPDl377SYvHC64CWLJ2wboa5OdmBsxKoXpA26gMD27ZUw%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Peter, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=184e050bc5e742c686dc82546de191a4&_e=-CUzqOdb2s-JEDINNFEEkK9sbv4nahKLzdcfGSZeklk83dXsB547zl-nug_syWagFQRgP2I_gE65ilh-yhytq8LRlOJmTYk-bk3JOvghkxO_wuUN2rlk8kZfCKJI6oZOC2dm1ZdFGBK2K0W0Ur4o572MuzvV-TMBOFgNX9LT9f5E0SZQ4bredwTigzireyCGfaeKeS65Efmq3eFI63rb_1AEDe3SCApvPkwBID4fxefB7N0Zqpo_letPMvwtpBSltnFRzf3Qb9yzwoukJptNYuQgxG3_2RVhEFcgPVUwUMCMHFA46YwKHAU8qBHj0NE3aLtwFMmaTSyf0ZnUh9G9psn5JOFQDRXJiozNAKiXqh6HEBlmzHs7nvrYdj2TA1Z3it_StK2CUk7vaTeIcjYtCLm3vDmRZ1JLqEDT47v8nVY%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=184e050bc5e742c686dc82546de191a4&_e=-CUzqOdb2s-JEDINNFEEkK9sbv4nahKLzdcfGSZeklk83dXsB547zl-nug_syWagFQRgP2I_gE65ilh-yhytq8LRlOJmTYk-bk3JOvghkxO_wuUN2rlk8kZfCKJI6oZOC2dm1ZdFGBK2K0W0Ur4o572MuzvV-TMBOFgNX9LT9f5E0SZQ4bredwTigzireyCGfaeKeS65Efmq3eFI63rb_1AEDe3SCApvPkwBID4fxefB7N0Zqpo_letPMvwtpBSltnFRzf3Qb9yzwoukJptNYutmblcFTCTAZhCdH4FYmE5-gG4rQzFkajz8WEg7Cap1_rfhwXKbS1T1c_hXw2q-awfiKI7r_-8A_Q7_id4pto-SCErYXSyBQxmIuvh-UYAg9aA3pUjMkprQZnarIAcWySbq-gEAu0pAQ7Skaz8qUx4%3D)

clean_body: Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. | | | | | | | MERRY CHRISTMAS From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo | | From the Desk of | Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this Christmas Card to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones. Peter, I’m not giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you. You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country. Not the Left’s lawfare.Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth. generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family. Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your h Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602****

name: Tobias Read
subject: SURVEY: Where do you stand on Vote By Mail?
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98545815/517006014/-569431239?refcode=241211em-rs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzJlYWUxNS1mZGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4XLoXdFzf_sPprD5oj3--f0fLlYtfDZzR5cVkDvky-8=)
---
| | Hi folks, it’s Oregon Secretary of State-elect Tobias Read. Did you know opponents in Oregon have _already_ launched an effort to repeal Vote by Mail in our state? I ran and won on this issue because Vote by Mail is safe, secure, and democratic. Those who want to dismantle it are trying to tip the scales on future elections because they know they can’t win on their own merit. But as your next Secretary of State — the person tasked with overseeing elections in Oregon — I want to hear from you: **[Do you agree that we should expand voting rights and preserve Vote By Mail? Or do you stand with the MAGA-inspired initiative to restrict it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98545816/517006015/-1463078012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzJlYWUxNS1mZGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4XLoXdFzf_sPprD5oj3--f0fLlYtfDZzR5cVkDvky-8=&emci=c02eae15-fdb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c72eae15-fdb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30662126)**
---
[**I SUPPORT VOTE BY MAIL**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98545817/517006016/-1463078012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzJlYWUxNS1mZGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4XLoXdFzf_sPprD5oj3--f0fLlYtfDZzR5cVkDvky-8=&emci=c02eae15-fdb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c72eae15-fdb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30662126)
---
[**I WANT TO RESTRICT IT**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98545818/517006017/-1463078012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzJlYWUxNS1mZGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4XLoXdFzf_sPprD5oj3--f0fLlYtfDZzR5cVkDvky-8=&emci=c02eae15-fdb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c72eae15-fdb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30662126)
---
As Oregon’s Secretary of State,**I will fight to defend the voting rights of every single person in Oregon, whether they voted for me or not. That’s what my job is, and that’s what democracy means.** **Your support is crucial in strengthening our collective voice against those who seek to restrict democracy.[Please let us know where you stand today. Your voice matters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98545819/517006018/-1463078012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzJlYWUxNS1mZGI3LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4XLoXdFzf_sPprD5oj3--f0fLlYtfDZzR5cVkDvky-8=&emci=c02eae15-fdb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c72eae15-fdb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30662126)** Thanks for your support, Tobias Read

clean_body: | | | = | | Hi folks, it’s Oregon Secretary of State-elect Tobias Read. Did you know opponents in Oregon have already launched an effort to repeal Vote by Mail in our state? I ran and won on this issue because Vote by Mail is safe, secure, and democratic. Those who want to dismantle it are trying to tip the scales on future elections because they know they can’t win on their own merit. But as your next Secretary of State — the person tasked with overseeing elections in Oregon — I want to hear from you: As Oregon’s Secretary of State,I will fight to defend the voting rights of every single person in Oregon, whether they voted for me or not. That’s what my job is, and that’s what democracy means. Your support is crucial in strengthening our collective voice against those who seek to restrict democracy. Thanks for your support, Tobias Read = | | = | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

* * *
**** Ahead of the Trump-Vance nightmare, corporate-owned media and the few remaining anti-Trump Republicans are bending the knee. The _Washington Post_ and _Los Angeles Times_ editorial boards refused to endorse against Trump. The hosts of MSNBC’s Morning Joe even made a pilgrimage to kiss the ring at Mar-A-Lago, surrendering to what’s to come. **Friend, we need your help to RESIST, hold Trump and Vance accountable, and TAKE BACK Congress.** At Cedar Key Progress, we plan to counter MAGA propaganda with ad campaigns and billboards exposing their lies. We’ve already identified key target districts we need to win in 2026. _But we can’t fund our Democratic billboards and ads without your help._ We must stand up _for ourselves_ and elect Democrats who will resist Trump and Vance. [**Tell Donald Trump and JD Vance that we Democrats REFUSE to surrender. clean_body: | | | As Trumpism looms, many are surrendering -but not us. Ahead of the Trump-Vance nightmare, corporate-owned media and the few remaining anti-Trump Republicans are bending the knee. The Washington Post and Los Angeles Times editorial boards refused to endorse against Trump. The hosts of MSNBC’s Morning Joe even made a pilgrimage to kiss the ring at Mar-A-Lago, surrendering to what’s to come. Friend, we need your help to RESIST, hold Trump and Vance accountable, and TAKE BACK Congress. At Cedar Key Progress, we plan to counter MAGA propaganda with ad campaigns and billboards exposing their lies. We’ve already identified key target districts we need to win in 2026. But we can’t fund our Democratic billboards and ads without your help. We must stand up for ourselves and elect Democrats who will resist Trump and Vance. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Let's build a brighter, more inclusive future. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: AOC, Ayanna, Ilhan, & Rashida
subject: Far from over
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241211-1147-foote&t=1001&akid=1147%2E342411%2EnGt83Z ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Our fight is far from over.

With Donald Trump returning to the White House, we know these next four
years will be filled with challenges.

But we also know this: together, we’ve moved mountains to fight for
working people, our communities and our planet — and together we will
blaze a path forward to protect our progressive values.

We are all a part of a powerful grassroots movement for
change, Peter. In
all of our pain and passion, there is an unwavering dedication to
protecting our rights, our communities, and our planet from the far right
agenda.

These next few years will require us to stay united in the work to
organize, and fight for the progressive values we’ve built our foundation
on — housing as a human right, utility justice, immigration reform,
climate action, reproductive justice and more.

Every conversation we have, every door we knock, every petition we sign
and share will fuel our movement. Together, we’ll keep working to create a
world that is sustainable, just, and full of opportunity for all. But we
can’t do it alone.

Real change is driven by the grassroots — and each day is an opportunity
to strengthen our movement, and build the world we know is possible.
Today, we’re asking you to help us.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241211-movement.P1upqs&refcode=em20241211-1147&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1147%2E342411%2EnGt83Z ]NO donation is too small,
Peter. Can we count on you to
chip in to strengthen our collective Squad’s power?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241211-movement.P1upqs&refcode=em20241211-1147&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1147%2E342411%2EnGt83Z ]Contribute ››

The work continues. Thank you for standing with us.

In solidarity,

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1147%2E342411%2EnGt83Z

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: we want to hear from YOU! 🫵 [December Priorities]
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=2LL6R9o%2FISW0JyqAoia3sTEPuYaXKqRdMdRrvDvyMafGg4ZzbHRELvV72qVZEM4XPNNbSgPfjTo3YBeSTzEGSjA9jwr1wPOP45hDjn8%2FbGWJdG%2B3ptz7OHqy%2BnosAG3tFqtS3Li9rf1X%2FyhhZBf5QsAJTTYs2iqtr4HPwLa9seyhgYwFzcLZj6JHRByKy7Bkkm%2Fx6Ehix04k1DsNKvSqijzwXedZ%2BqV%2F04XmR1WR6IolVpj1rU0AB2Kgj8%2BEOE1lTunyRPmGjCZwabMEenJvOOs5EisYsPxocFvB2QUp18MAj6a20oLvWu9ep6tnCTcbADRlJRQyof512FwpwA7gyhx2xCm%2BjutifZMVvBFlTwFlF9jX0wgdG%2FW9nFvfDvU89RdxmXQuUXgaVVMMMFf1pGqkZW4TOXvIOzm2GmrfYWI%3D]

# [#]
Peter, as we wrap up 2024, we want to hear from YOU! 🫵

Here at TOP PAC, we’re reflecting, recharging, and building a plan for the road ahead. We’re laser-focused on our mission to push our state toward a progressive future where ALL TEXANS have the opportunity to thrive — no matter our age, race, faith, or gender.

But before we finalize our plan, we want to hear from you on where your priorities lie in the final month of 2024. That’s why we’re circulating this December Priorities Survey to our top supporters to assess public opinion.

Can you take our December Priorities survey before midnight tonight? It should only take a minute to complete, and we need a 99.3% response rate to fill our dataset. [https://secure.everyaction.com/Xh_f3LkpjEWjX3VUE8AZpA2]

CLICK HERE TO BEGIN SURVEY » [https://secure.everyaction.com/Xh_f3LkpjEWjX3VUE8AZpA2]

Thank you for your participation!

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Peter, as we wrap up 2024, we want to hear from YOU! 🫵 Here at TOP PAC, we’re reflecting, recharging, and building a plan for the road ahead. We’re laser-focused on our mission to push our state toward a progressive future where ALL TEXANS have the opportunity to thrive — no matter our age, race, faith, or gender. But before we finalize our plan, we want to hear from you on where your priorities lie in the final month of 2024. That’s why we’re circulating this December Priorities Survey to our top supporters to assess public opinion. Can you take our December Priorities survey before midnight tonight? It should only take a minute to complete, and we need a 99.3% response rate to fill our dataset. [] CLICK HERE TO BEGIN SURVEY » [] Thank you for your participation! Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. This year, we’ve made tremendous progress in protecting and strengthening our democracy:
* **Automatic Voter Registration:** In just a few months, Minnesota has registered tens of thousands of eligible new voters, ensuring our elections remain accessible and fair.
* **Combating Disinformation:** We held social media platforms accountable, forcing X (formerly Twitter) to correct its AI chatbot’s false election claims.
* **Expanding Access to Voting:** From passing the Minnesota Voting Rights Act to restoring the freedom to vote for over 55,000 Minnesotans who left prison behind, we’ve led the way in creating a more inclusive democracy.

**But here’s the truth, folks: our work isn’t done.**
We’re heading into a critical period, and the threats to our democracy are intensifying.
[**That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $25,000 by December 31st—our only public fundraising deadline of the year. Everything we raise will go public, and it will set the tone for 2025-2026 as I’m up for reelection. Can I count on your support? clean_body: = | As the year winds down, I want to reflect on everything we’ve accomplished together—and how critical your support has been in making it all happen. = | | = This year, we’ve made tremendous progress in protecting and strengthening our democracy: Automatic Voter Registration: In just a few months, Minnesota has registered tens of thousands of eligible new voters, ensuring our elections remain accessible and fair. Combating Disinformation: We held social media platforms accountable, forcing X (formerly Twitter) to correct its AI chatbot’s false election claims. Expanding Access to Voting: From passing the Minnesota Voting Rights Act to restoring the freedom to vote for over 55,000 Minnesotans who left prison behind, we’ve led the way in creating a more inclusive democracy. But here’s the truth, folks: our work isn’t done. We’re heading into a critical period, and the threats to our democracy are intensifying. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | ******=****** | ******=****** | ******=****** | ******=****** | ******=****** | ******=****** Your support empowers us to fight back against disinformation, protect election workers, and ensure every eligible voter has access to the ballot box. Thank you for being part of this movement. Let’s finish the year strong. Gratefully, Steve | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. = ** Prepared and paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee Simon for Secretary of State Committee P.O. Box 4217 Hopkins, MN 55343 United States **

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: Is this the tipping point?
body:
Do you agree that the next few weeks and years will determine the fate of the republic?

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=e362f8643ef542059db8377eec40d63f&_t=Js2mSuKn9JxAqbKUhlNJFkmcXvUmuLuzBioGR6UgaeMcuSXbsvt8FTNrbFT__un1U80J6l_LbIM7x4z4S9gqWzeJpUUcBGOHmfbzXWPG3FpTBsCqwsR3nhTdSJoMN1vY)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=e362f8643ef542059db8377eec40d63f&_e=AE_nYm2-JnE7Dw6gcgdQK8AKpoRJlfK2E2EJFJbOUBUGFbI0w51V7coBIErQsqP3dem9OC69SG4QgjXDvUfsoY_m1ZCm4BCbg2s8BLn0GdHGzy4Uzurpo6-z392qsO7mNH8CWRzXoMH-YpDBDCBuVugLNTMJAaA9RT_GlLmjTJS5HSmT1LezACXKOPUeoPRVbvratkbQEK_7PkseyEB3YYMJKgPUn1xTH-QhUubbf7ZZDyzwY4zqliR7JupZzqe8g9DQJ9_tyCQkzvHjjBt_Th8UW756c6rQDSnz5Gylu3L_fI4BXil2Ik6EwVt7TApnhV_Nw6I5ToRyH3Zz3G6-j3RVRcneLK5-_ynMXq9MLK0%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Do you agree that the next few weeks and years will determine the fate of the republic?

Even with President Trump's recent electoral victory, the radical Left still maintains its stranglehold over America's key institutions like classrooms, boardrooms, and of course...the administrative state.

It's no longer enough to simply enact policy reforms.

We must reform America's institutions themselves and, in some cases, abandon and remake them if we want to save our republic.

That's why I need your help today.

In the next few weeks and coming year, we have a unique opportunity to save the American republic. **[And your activated membership today is the key to making it happen.](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=e362f8643ef542059db8377eec40d63f&_e=AE_nYm2-JnE7Dw6gcgdQK8AKpoRJlfK2E2EJFJbOUBUGFbI0w51V7coBIErQsqP3dem9OC69SG4QgjXDvUfsoY_m1ZCm4BCbg2s8BLn0GdHGzy4Uzurpo6-z392qsO7mNH8CWRzXoMH-YpDBDCBuVugLNTMJAaA9RT_GlLmjTJS5HSmT1LezACXKOPUeoPRVbvratkbQEK_7PkseyEB3YTYaL2VBkksG5hKTvrxj3DACIq0pmJhHg9KI2oNDqKEEkT8p0zXeNPL6S-Tsoiz0ZkZl70R8mzIk6U-nm2BYUzgUWlVBsrTVsoybZYt3Xr3QolSwF5AC9_u9Ay1UNjvsZyaeIjj2-h8SgHPTKM5FKno%3D)**

**Your year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation will help:**
* Dismantle the administrative state - the illegitimate fourth branch of government that would have our Founding Fathers rolling in their graves.
* Defeat the radical Left's destructive agenda, whether it appears in big government, big business, or big education.
* Advance policies that will rescue the American Dream.

**Please make your year-end gift and activate your Heritage Foundation membership today using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=e362f8643ef542059db8377eec40d63f&_e=AE_nYm2-JnE7Dw6gcgdQK8AKpoRJlfK2E2EJFJbOUBUGFbI0w51V7coBIErQsqP3dem9OC69SG4QgjXDvUfsoY_m1ZCm4BCbg2s8BLn0GdHGzy4Uzurpo6-z392qsO7mNH8CWRzXoMH-YpDBDCBuVugLNTMJAaA9RT_GlLmjTJS5HSmT1LezACXKOPUeoPRVbvratkbQEK_7PkseyEB3YfGBV3VrXwl615CSNDdk6BSFKiij7QhNr6ySUXFjcDyUn9GS8CNkDjllgSMANzCCjGP1mNq_3ht0bjAwcYKt5lVuydjHS2aApAQFDzCUf6EUmz8e3emKleI6m1hnACGV0CE6kAPHWUTn8AU-D6BzbO0%3D)

This could be the turning point for our country.

You can be the one who helps restore America to a secure, strong, and independent nation where families can prosper and value the true, the good and the beautiful.

Act today to help save our great nation.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. If you agree that now is a unique opportunity to save our republic from the radical Left, then please activate your Heritage Foundation membership with your year-end gift:[https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=e362f8643ef542059db8377eec40d63f&_e=AE_nYm2-JnE7Dw6gcgdQK8AKpoRJlfK2E2EJFJbOUBUGFbI0w51V7coBIErQsqP3dem9OC69SG4QgjXDvUfsoY_m1ZCm4BCbg2s8BLn0GdHGzy4Uzurpo6-z392qsO7mNH8CWRzXoMH-YpDBDCBuVugLNTMJAaA9RT_GlLmjTJS5HSmT1LezACXKOPUeoPRVbvratkbQEK_7PkseyEB3YU1PUxaW3p8eW_vzpaPDr0M8FFzn1Tze5uxXGdVfCLhKQYPeNf0_Zdi6fDihffiT0lyUZ1QOzEZ7_XO16-ujZ7t26AQvLj2m68i-o13ZKgGRT28NmFiaSCLs3hkjLdRWrBQuN_DoQE_pYibHpfmSBV4%3D)**

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by The Heritage Foundation.](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=e362f8643ef542059db8377eec40d63f&_t=Js2mSuKn9JxAqbKUhlNJFkmcXvUmuLuzBioGR6UgaeMcuSXbsvt8FTNrbFT__un1U80J6l_LbIM7x4z4S9gqW2g3npS1LFITDFK6EV1yIpg1tnw2MmUOPIolfoD9jILv5ynBY4-cV4gKAvRZYzHS1cNGZPRnwTbVrxGCYTM5ySQ%3D)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Times have certainly changed
body:
Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c020759c74cb425ab3458e9bac9c56c6&_e=rnkzhO0K86SGC0LNLv-Hz85h2q3dzCBcmmTSJL4RJIxEcs7fyZ-FSDic0wRbYzxZ5Fz73KKYvWNi7-GfnQKMLkECeIwF8tSdOHWrhWwU5ggtMebCTcBSQ9ZVEbMAXb-Hhrx3I7j_JpYd7UFVggSSQHIhieuZXWj39xdnsOpLBSLSrivkGaArHkLN1W0n1GY1IBuBfaUegx_dYOogR7C7NWXID8lv0nCS6mkCfC1KYqkxCE12W9Q9aQGEKtmL1Jp3Adwebhcmnhq953YRRTy9p__vSTJQKmQ_QAC-zzdOCXGAoJCnsrCaKF5YgMYC2x2zSbGJZ4YWCtK7Soq722p7gxotJjcjR1oWjcgKODBZrhU1xvwfbfBESPFzsbZjAXRDP35udE-METsOxzJIp29duQ%3D%3D)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c020759c74cb425ab3458e9bac9c56c6&_e=rnkzhO0K86SGC0LNLv-Hz85h2q3dzCBcmmTSJL4RJIxEcs7fyZ-FSDic0wRbYzxZ5Fz73KKYvWNi7-GfnQKMLkECeIwF8tSdOHWrhWwU5ggtMebCTcBSQ9ZVEbMAXb-Hhrx3I7j_JpYd7UFVggSSQHIhieuZXWj39xdnsOpLBSLSrivkGaArHkLN1W0n1GY1IBuBfaUegx_dYOogR7C7NWXID8lv0nCS6mkCfC1KYqkxCE12W9Q9aQGEKtmL1Jp3wNKOqVpZUF7B4-CDPQlLEHdnosk4-KM1lMJ5u8Kjkd-auEZk98XcjDX7PhDHrh33QDk2t09l1XFuJmWN8fBufWe-EWOPN2f8zpaOSEPDr9yhmx0o8uPpngPfv3rnHTH4dXjSD1OQ65FMvrn_LoRI4w%3D%3D)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c020759c74cb425ab3458e9bac9c56c6&_e=rnkzhO0K86SGC0LNLv-Hz85h2q3dzCBcmmTSJL4RJIxEcs7fyZ-FSDic0wRbYzxZ5Fz73KKYvWNi7-GfnQKMLkECeIwF8tSdOHWrhWwU5ggtMebCTcBSQ9ZVEbMAXb-Hhrx3I7j_JpYd7UFVggSSQHIhieuZXWj39xdnsOpLBSLSrivkGaArHkLN1W0n1GY1IBuBfaUegx_dYOogR7C7NWXID8lv0nCS6mkCfC1KYqkxCE12W9Q9aQGEKtmL1Jp3jyLkW-uyDSSAdbP8dQZWGKLlKCtCAOqdKp51fFQrPQEaOEdacguzCOhWEB71HNHqfrYBKiffUbcYzbl3Mkl7i4RTEi5jePv5Mt4sSnUTFFICfd7_XTv9GNQ8xuH28OScEnNzNubqx0KCqvYsx1GqEQ%3D%3D) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c020759c74cb425ab3458e9bac9c56c6&_e=rnkzhO0K86SGC0LNLv-Hz85h2q3dzCBcmmTSJL4RJIxEcs7fyZ-FSDic0wRbYzxZ5Fz73KKYvWNi7-GfnQKMLkECeIwF8tSdOHWrhWwU5ggtMebCTcBSQ9ZVEbMAXb-Hhrx3I7j_JpYd7UFVggSSQHIhieuZXWj39xdnsOpLBSLSrivkGaArHkLN1W0n1GY1IBuBfaUegx_dYOogR7C7NWXID8lv0nCS6mkCfC1KYqkxCE12W9Q9aQGEKtmL1Jp3eV2bQrVR5rja5OdUxNr_aA4TKsRvFW5LNIWI2Z2ayZo9KekfLy4gNlttE4sYAit3gXBCiQDHb9psei6_4I-4r3rIue-Tc-0YjcHC0vopFMD2_W3kslp7MQcyHo22SWTIIxmarKSiHW0XbpuPQgFE5Q%3D%3D)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
