clean_body: Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.| | | Well... Times have certainly changed. | | | | Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children. | | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like Woke Baby , A is for Activist , and The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies. | | | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values. That's why we need your help to My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created As You Grow , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values. To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. A gift of $175 sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

name: Robert J. Antonellis
subject: Why Solving the Mystery of Chappaquiddick and Mary Jo Kopechne Matters Today
body:
Please take a minute to share your thoughts. | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobforma/why-solving-the-mystery-of-chappaquiddick-and-mary-jo-kopechne-matters-today?e=eb86c99a95)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
# Do You Know the Truth
# Behind Chappaquiddick?
---
| Your Voice Matters: Take the Survey
Dear ,
For decades, the tragedy of Chappaquiddick has been shrouded in mystery and conflicting narratives. Hidden truths and unanswered questions remain, and the nation remains divided—not just about the events of that fateful night, but about the broader implications for justice, accountability, and the hidden forces shaping our history.
We’ve created a quick, engaging survey to hear your thoughts and uncover what the mainstream has ignored for too long.
Your participation will not only help bring attention to these critical issues but also provide insights into the hidden connections behind events like Chappaquiddick, the Apollo Moon Launch, RFK Jr., and much more.
It only takes 2 minutes.
---
[Take the Survey](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=56344ba59a&e=eb86c99a95)
| After completing the survey, take the next step in uncovering the hidden connections that mainstream narratives have buried for decades. Explore the compelling evidence for yourself in my two groundbreaking books:
* [The Camelot Murders](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=ec2f7313ea&e=eb86c99a95) – Uncover the shocking truth behind the deaths of Camelot — and the hidden forces still at work today.
* [The Hidden 9/11 Blood Trail](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=67e651393f&e=eb86c99a95) – Expose the secret connections behind 9/11 and the shadow network that continues to operate in plain sight.

Both are available now on Amazon.
Thank you for helping expose the stories that must be told.
Together, we will unearth the truth.
Warm regards,
Robert J. Antonellis
---
[Take the Survey](https://bobforma.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ef7e78505326a532308516fd&id=75798ee6a0&e=eb86c99a95)

name: Patty Murray
subject: Let me start by saying thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Peter,

First, I want to start by saying thank you. Thank you for stepping up time and again to support Democratic candidates in Washington state and across the country these past two years. Not every race turned out how we hoped – far from it – but the progress we did make was because of YOU.

Like I imagine so many of you were, I was deeply disappointed our country did not elect Kamala Harris and Tim Walz to the White House. It was a hard-fought campaign, but we came up short. In the months ahead, we will need to reflect carefully not just on how we hold the incoming Trump administration accountable but also on how we win 2026 and 2028 with a hopeful vision for the future.

I don’t have to tell you all the threat a Donald Trump presidency is to our economy, reproductive rights, workers' rights, health care, and so much more. But know that I will fight every day in the Senate for the policies and values the people of Washington state care about – and so will the slate of strong progressive champions you worked hard to elect in our state.

The work you all did to make sure we have leaders in Washington state who will be a safeguard against the incoming Trump administration will be more important than ever in the next four years. That includes sending my colleague Maria Cantwell back to join me in the U.S. Senate, electing Bob Ferguson as the next governor, Nick Brown as our next attorney general, and sending Emily Randall to D.C. to represent Washington’s 6th Congressional District. Reps. Kim Schrier and Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez both won tough reelection campaigns, and Democrats grew our majority in the House and Senate in Olympia.

I’m excited to have Tammy Baldwin, Jacky Rosen, and so many more of my colleagues back with me in the Senate – and to welcome new Democrats from across the country like Michigan’s Elissa Slotkin, Arizona’s Ruben Gallego, Maryland’s Angela Alsobrooks, and a handful of other incredible new leaders who I’m excited to work with in the new Congress. We knew that this past election would be an uphill battle for Democrats nationwide. It can be hard to feel like the contributions or time spent volunteering makes a difference. But we did the work, and Democrats won tough Senate races in states Trump won. That’s thanks to you!

So as this year comes to a close, take time to reflect and rest – and know I value your input at this critical time. Then let’s get to work holding the incoming Trump administration accountable and protecting women, families, and the future of our country – together.

Thank you for your continued support,

Patty Murray

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=rQWkc6dpflMSLPS65e6xm6TUFNCc16qpVKtP9acR6fUbwdTeF%2FNa3z4Jv277tQj89dLJeZUwLYxQSggvXOMBIPEtVs%2FQQXKIgl8me9gepir%2BSgSAf42a%2BCiHTssJzAbs9liiPg8OmHQqrvMzx%2BSgY4%2BNq43ch51ctdrPWIHoif%2Fjc47yM2ObTRVmqbqGf9ZGbFeu8Iht91Y3XMGceFvcAuP6mMzvDYXitxrJF66k32smw53bajCrC6nmEyPxOUrI14IKUw1ZHTkCVbhpoM56E8XU7eyRx1Vye0cZkNM35O8bPEPGD6BgRKSKkYiakPRk6gcTSqEXWpsAl%2Bn5bDjfXxo61n5SsIzRPdOm7uQ%2Fl6CHzH2EY19S0MgmubxRON0IFlj0ixDnydCtXxoiM9ze5WbCahf7duwZsy7a2bywHM4RXojhDL4h9dwQmB6tKo%2FV]

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Kash Patel is coming after you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Donald Trump campaigned on the promise of a revenge and retribution presidency — and his latest cabinet picks prove just as much. In yet another deeply disturbing nomination, Donald Trump has chosen QAnon supporter and die-hard Trump loyalist Kash Patel to be the new director of the FBI and to fulfill his promise of using a nonpartisan, apolitical institution to go after his political enemies. Kash Patel is unqualified, unhinged, and has made it abundantly clear that he is out for retribution on behalf of Donald Trump. **And he has a list of enemies he will go after, including me.** Last year, after I questioned so-called FBI whistleblowers about their connection to Patel, he referred me to the House Ethics Committee and the Department of Justice. **If he takes the helm of the FBI, he would be able to act on his own referral.** By going after me and other defenders of democracy, Patel will also be going after all supporters of the rule of law. **And that includes you.** Make no mistake: Kash Patel is not qualified to be FBI director, but that is not a criteria for Trump’s nomination of him. Instead, Trump nominated Patel to weaponize the federal government against Donald Trump’s enemies and his adversaries. **It is essential for our democracy and the rule of law that Senate Republicans thoroughly vet Trump’s nominees and ensure they will serve the American people — not Donald Trump.** **[Please contribute any amount to my work holding Republicans accountable. A second Trump administration will take office in just over one month, and we need to be prepared to fight every challenge that comes our way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98548230/517015042/1749184225?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmI5NTRlMC0wN2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JsHJV8LxzkpCJMQqONYUWJz54YnWkXnjyJeHSSaAP3g=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98548231/517015043/1749184225?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmI5NTRlMC0wN2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JsHJV8LxzkpCJMQqONYUWJz54YnWkXnjyJeHSSaAP3g=)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Justice for All? Or just some?
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9CNP/?__vbtrk=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for **bold leadership** and **fearless action**.
But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore.
**The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices.**
These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution.
**__[That’s why I’m demanding immediate action: a full pardon for every American wrongfully prosecuted for standing up for what they believed in.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9CNP/?__vbtrk=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9CNP/?__vbtrk=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
These aren’t criminals—they’re **citizens**. **Fathers**. **Mothers**. **Veterans**. **Neighbors**. _**The very fabric of our great nation.**_
They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, **_and now they need us to exercise ours_**.
This is more than a petition— _**_[it’s a fight for our freedom](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9CNP/?__vbtrk=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_. A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you.

What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing:
The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... **They want to erase you**. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it.
I won’t be silenced, and I will _**never**_ stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... _**you feel the same**_.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9CNP/?__vbtrk=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0OTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_For Freedom_

clean_body: | | | | Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for bold leadership and fearless action. But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore. The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices. These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution. These aren’t criminals—they’re citizens. Fathers. Mothers. Veterans. Neighbors. The very fabric of our great nation. They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, and now they need us to exercise ours. This is more than a petition— . A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you. What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing: The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... They want to erase you. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it. I won’t be silenced, and I will never stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... you feel the same. For Freedom Marjorie Taylor Greene | | If you do not wish to receive future emails from me, please

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: I won’t let the GOP strip away marriage equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, Take a look at this headline: | | **“Michigan GOP lawmaker says gay marriage should be 'illegal again'”**
_— The Detroit News_
---
Let me be clear on this. **Any attempt to strip away marriage equality is wrong.**
Here in Michigan, I’m proud to have worked across the aisle to protect fundamental rights when I signed legislation expanding the _Elliott-Larsen Civil Rights Act_ into law last year.
No one should be fired from a job, evicted from their home, or unable to marry because of who they love. Full stop.
Michigan is a place for all to live and work with dignity, but it’s clear we’re going to need to fight like hell to keep it that way.

clean_body: | Team, Take a look at this headline: | | “Michigan GOP lawmaker says gay marriage should be 'illegal again'” — The Detroit News Let me be clear on this. Any attempt to strip away marriage equality is wrong. Here in Michigan, I’m proud to have worked across the aisle to protect fundamental rights when I signed legislation expanding the Elliott-Larsen Civil Rights Act into law last year. No one should be fired from a job, evicted from their home, or unable to marry because of who they love. Full stop. Michigan is a place for all to live and work with dignity, but it’s clear we’re going to need to fight like hell to keep it that way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Everyone belongs in Michigan. Let’s work together to protect the rights we’ve fought so hard to win. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

Friend, it’s Aruna Miller. The Maryland legislature will gavel in for the 447th legislative session in less than a month. In exactly 28 days, we must stop all fundraising efforts until the spring. That puts us at a significant disadvantage when we can’t fundraise for 1⁄4 of the year, so we need to raise the resources we need today. Wes and I are excited to roll up our sleeves and get work done – but this also means we have less than a month to fundraise the resources we’ll need through April. I won’t lie – it’s a tight deadline to raise the funds we need to hold us over for the freeze, but time and time again, I’ve seen this team deliver. Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more before our fundraising freeze? **→ Developing: Governor Brian Kemp Under Fire for Disbanding State Maternal Mortality Review Board ←** Peter: Georgia has one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the country. _And earlier this fall, the state’s Maternal Mortality Review Committee determined that two Georgia women, Amber Thurman and Candi Miller, died as a direct result of the state’s six-week abortion ban._ But instead of using this information to take accountability and address the maternal mortality crisis, Gov. Brian Kemp disbanded the entire committee. Without the Committee’s oversight and recommendations, critical gaps in maternal healthcare could go unaddressed, potentially leaving lives at risk. That’s why we’re launching an urgent campaign to pressure Gov. Kemp into reinstating the Maternal Mortality Review Committee **as soon as possible.** **But we need to secure 1,000 signatures on our petition to prove overwhelming public support.[ So will you sign your name right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98548676/517016932/-805290569?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_121124_1_1_Maternal-Mortality_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTFmNDY4MC0wYWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCR6Gdxk0gk8PO5ML743CxFJI9EepsNonU2bBsjvS-w=&emci=891f4680-0ab8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=951f4680-0ab8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=43566853)** | | **[REINSTATE THE MATERNAL MORTALITY REVIEW COMMITTEE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98548677/517016933/-805290569?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_121124_1_1_Maternal-Mortality_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTFmNDY4MC0wYWI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCR6Gdxk0gk8PO5ML743CxFJI9EepsNonU2bBsjvS-w=&emci=891f4680-0ab8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=951f4680-0ab8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=43566853)**

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = → Developing: Governor Brian Kemp Under Fire for Disbanding State Maternal Mortality Review Board ← Peter: Georgia has one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the country. And earlier this fall, the state’s Maternal Mortality Review Committee determined that two Georgia women, Amber Thurman and Candi Miller, died as a direct result of the state’s six-week abortion ban. But instead of using this information to take accountability and address the maternal mortality crisis, Gov. Brian Kemp disbanded the entire committee. Without the Committee’s oversight and recommendations, critical gaps in maternal healthcare could go unaddressed, potentially leaving lives at risk. That’s why we’re launching an urgent campaign to pressure Gov. Kemp into reinstating the Maternal Mortality Review Committee as soon as possible. body:
Democrats have a clear plan: Keep the government open, provide disaster relief, and reject harmful partisan measures. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98549064/517018114/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWQ4NmE1NS0wYmI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upBUFq72G_NMFCFSDvsu6qapUu3F4ZJK0XslaDVwpg0=&emci=680cc65f-e7b7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=59d86a55-0bb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

The next government shutdown deadline is right around the corner, and once again, **House Republicans are playing political games instead of delivering real solutions for the American people.**

Now, they’re hoping Democrats will help pass a funding bill to avoid disaster – but if they want bipartisan support, they need to prioritize the needs of the people they were elected to represent, _not an extreme partisan agenda._

Peter, Democrats have a clear plan: Keep the government open, provide disaster relief, and reject harmful partisan measures. It’s common sense. But House Republicans seem content stalling progress and risking disaster just to score political points.

With the risk of our government shutting down – p _utting countless Americans out of work during the holiday season_ – this moment is too important to leave anything to chance. That’s why Kim is standing up to demand that Congress do what’s right: Fund the government responsibly, without harmful cuts or political stunts. But she needs your voice, too.

The federal government is addicted to war and destruction. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW08sTkzERfjgtgc0JpjZsMH0I0P8ySBihq0QQnqOoHmMi_kQf84AxX_StmiajijdHf9scRgrgF_e3fEL5nx9jcD53jzG-nWapCo7h0hj-pGK_4QbJjLT41SpEcMMArxeFUd40hYBCDHPonA-4eQAMGJvhjDWrekbSpJ4n-1gFLpMkHhcqMai_5O29Sbcx435zz429jS6H_C-IJarivXcWN48HSQrhvJxnSyGVXNftqhhAGG3--ncWSpEwxsxltyGAPr6-WZ7A97-NoMS6nxCqK8pWSCpSNQ-u-Qjr7KMh9_JyYadfOxmJ7ilaKNyQYUGBNdY69i5gHRhOp2mnaZOVyw/4c7/m2mqRVy1TAKISV8ACGcReA/h0/h001.TFKoCROywCWbn2-QCD721q1IzYj8143XLq9-X6_BUYo)
---
Friend, This week Congress is voting on 2025’s military budget. As I do every year, I’m voting against the military budget and demanding investments in our communities instead. **Each year most of my colleagues in Congress vote to spend nearly $1 trillion U.S. taxpayer dollars on the U.S. Department of Defense, which has failed to pass an audit for seven years in a row.** Half of this massive budget lines the pockets of for-profit corporations in the weapons and military industry, which then go on to spend millions of dollars lobbying and re-electing members of Congress who determine military funding. To address this endless cycle, I introduced legislation to prohibit members of Congress from having any financial interests in corporations that do business with the U.S. Department of Defense—including banning members from trading weapons stocks. **Ahead of this week’s vote, I’m calling on my colleagues to stop profiting from war and to oppose the military budget.** Today, I also introduced Amnesty International’s new report into the congressional record, which concludes “that Israel has committed and is continuing to commit genocide against Palestinians in the occupied Gaza Strip.”1 My colleagues can no longer deny that this is genocide. Together, we’re urging them to join our calls for the U.S. to stop arming and funding these war crimes. [**Can you add your name to join me this week in calling to invest in life rather than war and death? Call on members of Congress to oppose the military budget, stop profiting from war, and stop supporting Israel’s genocide of Palestinians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396AYWXV0Q5lnWR3mn3CB2IwXlwqQlQig0C5hOVfFS-BYTRepEJQAjXDvzlb_qNOFmadPOWG4q2qjFYMBaXoc_wydhi9sqdUiAF-w83c9eIjn-P8z0q3RVVbp0ir8sEJjfoOlunHNl5jqTdQsLJIweboiq99NdXy-mxlvk22231i7XpqdNetbXgzPQFfDwVWZLoAeNHN7cAmOdSQ7cy46xOtlK_qOH5uY-T5lqW8KPUYRlgDbrpDV6Ys1VTSKOMG3UNxTLqmNDJCE8xzTntWR57EvpOFauYDbxxdXLddvS2lcu6kDhVNP-ETcfEyP60XaFCOtDijmeQocdYgzmFW6RJp5_5JtVUglhdGp40XCegtf5M9MILxycG3O3NubOf5w85JEfGq3yneAPpFpQKZhZzhMGuLzHkZH-srUVhGubrLtHdwrdwVIA19n9MV4uHmI8tpQuZv453Hgo_r3FAVpMm_zC6mWO3-Hddo4RaS5VUwRcGFhqLfhpb5V7wn7DiD68XNOHc5le0NeLmRm7_OtfRRNJNXpEUcckq6uX-LY5vi85TIeKSSKXv2MF2KIKp4CP35E-dMp92RsynxNEo6tEP/4c7/m2mqRVy1TAKISV8ACGcReA/h1/h001.c_IigPuqJL3timlSbBRB0Gg-VNEXt7sn4_Vobo-BNw8) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396AYWXV0Q5lnWR3mn3CB2IwXlwqQlQig0C5hOVfFS-BYTRepEJQAjXDvzlb_qNOFmadPOWG4q2qjFYMBaXoc_wydhi9sqdUiAF-w83c9eIjn-P8z0q3RVVbp0ir8sEJjfoOlunHNl5jqTdQsLJIweboiq99NdXy-mxlvk22231izoB6nMpn8JRMJETptMnt7crJbXoKE1yMHeQawxLDp_kv9MIycqdwUKSALvqV7yo8c6Bhv1WntgvicvyL8nR66LQnub7M-pfQfX7efbnvdoKwO7XQTiRB_inmYa3IdSwdnXjGuUou89KTDamIZPveEwtJx9HKLtpnEklTfMA1KzpZxkTAQRjLWTi504tzDdSqAlvPt4NnbnHZXJsu5cksTlK6LHtvQyMFQQLJDk1S7vtlpSaNcpVCImOMvYBEB37suWYsFuce4IpvNUDoanXSAQAlGLpv5zcAKd8I2XQYX1NAroNDddaCHAAVbjuZ0YyvVhIzCNorV1t88ZBkZzDEHqv8fxBROGD9X_7C5FI4m3HVDS3d8QrGbUP9Z_uZW8Tbb43A0ZR_A_fL_vYZdtJtdHA76mhMtUT43VF8eKHA1Qw/4c7/m2mqRVy1TAKISV8ACGcReA/h2/h001.bUGJ2wv7yAGZOD_0ila_kXAl6JsDrDLwFfLHRvQ1l_w)

Between 2019 and 2021, 97 members of Congress or their family members financially invested in companies that make military equipment, and 25 of them sat on committees directly responsible for shaping military policy and funding. These are unacceptable conflicts of interest, which is why I introduced the _Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act_ to ban members of Congress from investing in weapons contractors.
In 2022, the weapons industry hired 858 lobbyists, “more than one for every member of Congress.”2 Most Secretaries of Defense come directly from this industry, which spent $250 million on lobbying and $56 million in direct campaign donations over the past few years.
Our government representatives must prioritize people’s needs over corporate profits—and over their own personal profits. **Members of Congress shouldn’t be able to use their positions of power to get rich while voting to pass more funding to bomb innocent civilians.**
As the Secretary General of Amnesty International said last week:
> _“Israel has treated Palestinians in Gaza as a subhuman group unworthy of human rights and dignity, demonstrating its intent to physically destroy them. ..._**_Our damning findings must serve as a wake-up call to the international community: this is genocide. It must stop now._**_States that continue to transfer arms to Israel at this time must know they are violating their obligation to prevent genocide...”_
Let’s send a wake-up call to Congress this week.
[**Please add your name to join me in calling on members of Congress** **to oppose the military budget, stop profiting from war, and stop supporting Israel’s genocide of Palestinians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396AYWXV0Q5lnWR3mn3CB2IwXlwqQlQig0C5hOVfFS-BYTRepEJQAjXDvzlb_qNOFmadPOWG4q2qjFYMBaXoc_wydhi9sqdUiAF-w83c9eIjn-P8z0q3RVVbp0ir8sEJjfoOlunHNl5jqTdQsLJIweboiq99NdXy-mxlvk22231iwfGmDdvQZZBC-SMKGm_SucvLLLaefDBiEjYwlVbjawyltj0z2KNZriypvmBCQCscQSpi7QfZkNH7lRZpKBAzgmOjWW7amO2A-oJsAO5sIEmPTFbosYkWqZDDwZcMCKLUXh14nvFraAE65N_rwjR2YyX952RXwsLPDStfkt-trubHJDlwTDtubEJ2HHDHhAe06SFrYjzu6pdddSfhKVfu5o8l32Vh8JJoFrABDchWzIs1Xe0qfrr-AzFVSh_1oyz3ZOJk2_cWbKIlBwRR9XUQYuTPrwvwO2h2vI3d-5HvXm74Ww_Ey-Q4iTS-DvDtYtVQsMCyn0pQ6VVByIQ-FW5xqujIbXQ0EjxTMSbYqpkWWxT59zTCddyCwjSRpvd5cW-j-yIbfJZgv7KeuiEbrFvH62u3S7fkWkWK8KDgVXptFxi/4c7/m2mqRVy1TAKISV8ACGcReA/h3/h001.F2l0byO1sC7rAiwvdPdKmBc6sGrAl-IW7bgGfT-uVGA)
Thank you for continuing to stand for life and dignity for all. Alongside you, I will continue the push to rein in military spending and corporate greed, and to instead invest in everyday workers and families.
In service and solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: The federal government is addicted to war and destruction. | | | Friend, This week Congress is voting on 2025’s military budget. As I do every year, I’m voting against the military budget and demanding investments in our communities instead. Each year most of my colleagues in Congress vote to spend nearly $1 trillion U.S. taxpayer dollars on the U.S. Department of Defense, which has failed to pass an audit for seven years in a row. Half of this massive budget lines the pockets of for-profit corporations in the weapons and military industry, which then go on to spend millions of dollars lobbying and re-electing members of Congress who determine military funding. To address this endless cycle, I introduced legislation to prohibit members of Congress from having any financial interests in corporations that do business with the U.S. Department of Defense—including banning members from trading weapons stocks. Ahead of this week’s vote, I’m calling on my colleagues to stop profiting from war and to oppose the military budget. Today, I also introduced Amnesty International’s new report into the congressional record, which concludes “that Israel has committed and is continuing to commit genocide against Palestinians in the occupied Gaza Strip.”1 My colleagues can no longer deny that this is genocide. Together, we’re urging them to join our calls for the U.S. to stop arming and funding these war crimes. | Between 2019 and 2021, 97 members of Congress or their family members financially invested in companies that make military equipment, and 25 of them sat on committees directly responsible for shaping military policy and funding. These are unacceptable conflicts of interest, which is why I introduced the Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act to ban members of Congress from investing in weapons contractors. In 2022, the weapons industry hired 858 lobbyists, “more than one for every member of Congress.”2 Most Secretaries of Defense come directly from this industry, which spent $250 million on lobbying and $56 million in direct campaign donations over the past few years. Our government representatives must prioritize people’s needs over corporate profits—and over their own personal profits. Members of Congress shouldn’t be able to use their positions of power to get rich while voting to pass more funding to bomb innocent civilians. As the Secretary General of Amnesty International said last week: “Israel has treated Palestinians in Gaza as a subhuman group unworthy of human rights and dignity, demonstrating its intent to physically destroy them. ...Our damning findings must serve as a wake-up call to the international community: this is genocide. It must stop now.States that continue to transfer arms to Israel at this time must know they are violating their obligation to prevent genocide...” Let’s send a wake-up call to Congress this week. Thank you for continuing to stand for life and dignity for all. Alongside you, I will continue the push to rein in military spending and corporate greed, and to instead invest in everyday workers and families. In service and solidarity, Rashida 1\. 2\. Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: Ending Parade Season Right!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e000ef347d33/on-the-road-again-17994082?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
# Two More Parades!
---
| Last weekend the team and I had the opportunity to start our day in the wonderful city of Delphi for their annual Christmas parade! I loved getting out there and also having the opportunity to show the jet to the kids in the parade!
---
|
---
| We also stopped by the Toys for Tots drive in Monticello to hear about their amazing work and have a chance to talk to some great Marine veterans!
---
|
---
|
---
| Finally to end a great (and cold) night, the team and I made it to the Monticello Christmas Parade in White County where we got to light the jet up and blast Danger Zone one last time before the New Year! Thank you again to the White County Republican Party for inviting us and allowing us to walk with you this year. I can’t wait to be back up there soon!
---
|
---
| Weekly reminder to follow me on social media and check out our website as we roll out more pictures and announcements in the next few months!
---

name: John Fetterman
subject: We can’t write anyone off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Every voter matters, Derek, whether they’re in red counties or blue counties.
#
Every voter matters, Derek, whether they’re in red counties or blue counties — and no matter what social media platform they use.
**That’s why I’ve officially joined Bluesky and Truth Social. It’s my job to reach as many of yinz + youse as I can. 😎**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50112?t=1&akid=9676%2E434096%2E7OR_Um)
**[Follow on Bluesky »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50112?t=2&akid=9676%2E434096%2E7OR_Um)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50113?t=3&akid=9676%2E434096%2E7OR_Um)
**[Follow on Truth Social »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50113?t=4&akid=9676%2E434096%2E7OR_Um)**
The tides can turn ANYWHERE if enough people show up to vote, and that’s why we can’t write anyone off if we want to turn PA 🔵 in 2026 + 2028.
I’m determined to meet folks where they are, and I’m grateful for your support while we work to win back working class voters everywhere.
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241211-9676-footer&t=5&refcode2=9676_434096_7OR_Um&akid=9676%2E434096%2E7OR_Um)**

[**FLIPPED**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98549789/517020494/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241211_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmE1MGI2Yy0wZGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rElzihxy32u3arpmrtV_kNWJ9wjxikUy107HydN5KNI=) eight Republican-held seats. [**GAINED**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98549790/517020495/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241211_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmE1MGI2Yy0wZGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rElzihxy32u3arpmrtV_kNWJ9wjxikUy107HydN5KNI=) seats in the House – winning against the tide of this election. [**Together, House Democrats may have kept Republicans’ Majority too tiny to pass Trump’s extremist agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98549791/517020496/1694124557?amount=15&refcode=20241211_em_fr_b2_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmE1MGI2Yy0wZGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rElzihxy32u3arpmrtV_kNWJ9wjxikUy107HydN5KNI=) [**_But we can’t let up now. Not when our health care, Social Security, and Medicare are all under attack. Democrats are already planning ahead to ensure we RECLAIM the Majority in the next election and make Hakeem the Speaker of the House. But that takes resources – and some Democrats spent down nearly ALL of their funds in this election to keep Republicans’ Majority historically tiny. name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: There's a battle brewing in the Senate (Bernie vs. Oz)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1011?refcode=email-20241211_v&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, there’s a
battle brewing in the Senate.

Dr. Oz is Trump’s handpicked choice to privatize, and destroy, Medicare.
But Dr. Oz has to be confirmed by the Senate in order to become head of
the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS). And Bernie’s in the
Senate.

Bernie, the strongest advocate we have for Medicare and Social Security,
won’t just let Trump and his cronies destroy the health care so many
seniors rely on. Oz’s investments in big health corporations like CVS and
UnitedHealth and financial ties to Big Pharma companies like Novo Nordisk
are completely disqualifying.

His role at CMS would allow him to make decisions profitable for these
companies and devastating for the American people. Our grassroots movement
is organizing a massive opposition to Dr. Oz, but we can only do it if you
chip in and help us see this battle through.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241211nd&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]Can you chip in to help us stop Dr. Oz? We’re mounting a strategic
campaign to stop Trump's extremist agenda and protect Medicare from a
corporate takeover.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241211nd&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241211nd&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241211nd&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241211nd&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241211nd&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241211nd&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20699?t=1060&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ][IMG]

Why do Dr. Oz and Trump want to privatize Medicare? Because their
corporate friends stand to profit in a BIG way.

Dr. Oz has been hauled in front of Congress to explain why he promoted
diet scams on TV. He’s boosted fringe conspiracy theories. He promoted
Novo Nordisk drugs on his TV show. He ran his 2022 Senate campaign pushing
Medicare privatization. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20625?t=1061&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]We’re in this fight to stop all of Oz’s plans —
can you join us with a donation right now?

On the other side, Bernie has spent his career fighting to protect and
expand Medicare and Social Security. He’s fought for lower drug prices, to
hold health care executives accountable, and for Medicare for All.

One of our greatest organizing goals under Trump must be protecting Social
Security and Medicare. Without these long-running and extremely popular
social programs, tens of millions of people would lose health coverage and
the benefits they need to live.

Republicans have spent decades trying to slash these programs, and now,
they have the best chance they’ve ever had. And Medicare has already been
partially privatized through Medicare Advantage — a boon for the companies
Dr. Oz owns stock in.

We must wage this fight now — with a massive media push to expose Dr. Oz —
and show Congress and the Trump admin that we won’t let the GOP destroy
Medicare. But we can only execute our campaign plans with grassroots
donations from people like you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20613?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241211nd&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]Can you donate now to make sure we have the funds to take on Oz and
Trump's extreme agenda? Medicare is on the line. We’re 100% funded by
grassroots donations from the people — that’s why we’re ready to defeat
corporate-backed hacks like Dr. Oz.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7379%2E5885482%2EoO4yaT ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

name: Team Bennet
subject: 2024 Wrapped!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121124_2024wrapped_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121124_2024wrapped_act]
Hi team,
This year isn’t ending on the note that we all wanted and worked for. But that doesn’t mean that the work we fought for in 2024 didn’t make a difference.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121124_2024wrapped_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121124_2024wrapped_act]
With the year coming to a close, we wanted to highlight some of the progress Michael made this year. With your support, he:
1. Protected Colorado's gold-standard election system and defeated special interests by helping beat Proposition 131.

2. Supported our key partner, Ukraine, in its war against Russian imperialism by fighting to send much-needed economic and military assistance.

3. Alongside Senator John Hickenlooper, Michael introduced the most ambitious Colorado public lands bill in decades to protect 730,000 acres in the Gunnison River Basin.

4. Campaigned in nine battleground states — including Wisconsin, Arizona and Nevada — where Democrats won key swing seats in the Senate.

5. Traveled thousands of miles across Colorado to help Democrats win up and down the ticket.
Looking back at 2024, we have a lot to be proud of. However, with Donald Trump headed back to the White House and Republicans in control of Congress, we also know we’ve got to fight to protect our progress.
Michael will always fight for what is best for Colorado -- from standing strong against unqualified, unserious Cabinet nominees to negotiating in good faith with Republicans to expand the Child Tax Credit. Michael will continue to bring Colorado voices to Washington.
We know we’ll need you by our side for what’s ahead. If you are with us, can you support Michael’s work now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121124_2024wrapped_act]

clean_body: [] Hi team, This year isn’t ending on the note that we all wanted and worked for. But that doesn’t mean that the work we fought for in 2024 didn’t make a difference. [] With the year coming to a close, we wanted to highlight some of the progress Michael made this year. With your support, he: 1. Protected Colorado's gold-standard election system and defeated special interests by helping beat Proposition 131. 2. Supported our key partner, Ukraine, in its war against Russian imperialism by fighting to send much-needed economic and military assistance. 3. Alongside Senator John Hickenlooper, Michael introduced the most ambitious Colorado public lands bill in decades to protect 730,000 acres in the Gunnison River Basin. 4. Campaigned in nine battleground states — including Wisconsin, Arizona and Nevada — where Democrats won key swing seats in the Senate. 5. Traveled thousands of miles across Colorado to help Democrats win up and down the ticket. Looking back at 2024, we have a lot to be proud of. However, with Donald Trump headed back to the White House and Republicans in control of Congress, we also know we’ve got to fight to protect our progress. Michael will always fight for what is best for Colorado -- from standing strong against unqualified, unserious Cabinet nominees to negotiating in good faith with Republicans to expand the Child Tax Credit. Michael will continue to bring Colorado voices to Washington. We know we’ll need you by our side for what’s ahead. If you are with us, can you support Michael’s work now? [] DONATE [] DONATE MONTHLY [] Thanks, Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: JanePAC
subject: Disaster relief should never be partisan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Make your voice heard.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98549894/517020886/1328794144?refcode=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmM2UzNjI1LTBlYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hrq3ZUwbAcGmM77qkkRzVSconbg3EMQvR27fNX3dccg=&emci=266d3a4c-00b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
Right now, firefighters are battling a fast-moving wildfire in Malibu, California. **As of yesterday, the Franklin fire consumed more than 3,900 acres, destroyed at least seven homes, and displaced thousands of residents.** This year has already been catastrophic for climate-fueled disasters across the U.S. From the deadly flooding in North Carolina after Hurricane Helene to the destructive South Fork Fire in New Mexico, communities from coast to coast have endured life-changing climate-related disasters. It’s heartbreaking to see yet another community bearing the brunt. **In 2018, Donald Trump refused to approve disaster aid for California wildfires until his advisors convinced him there were enough Trump voters in the affected areas.** He even directed special treatment for politically favorable regions while stalling critical aid for others. And with Donald Trump returning to the White House next month, there’s every reason to fear disaster relief will once again be treated as a political weapon. **[That’s why we’re demanding the incoming administration commit to distributing disaster relief fairly and swiftly. They must promise to never again play politics with people’s lives. Add your name to demand disaster relief without political games.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98549895/517020887/-1486380572?refcode=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmM2UzNjI1LTBlYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hrq3ZUwbAcGmM77qkkRzVSconbg3EMQvR27fNX3dccg=&emci=266d3a4c-00b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)** **Disasters don’t care about party affiliation. Homes are burning. Families are displaced. And every single person impacted deserves relief, no matter how they voted.** California has weathered fire after fire, and our communities know what it takes to rebuild. But whether Californians will receive federal help or not should NEVER be a concern in the midst of tragedy. Together, we can hold Washington accountable. We can demand leadership that puts people first, not partisan loyalty. **[Add your name today to send a clear message:_Disaster relief isn’t a bargaining chip._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98549896/517020888/-1486380572?refcode=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmM2UzNjI1LTBlYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hrq3ZUwbAcGmM77qkkRzVSconbg3EMQvR27fNX3dccg=&emci=266d3a4c-00b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98549897/517020889/-1486380572?refcode=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmM2UzNjI1LTBlYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hrq3ZUwbAcGmM77qkkRzVSconbg3EMQvR27fNX3dccg=&emci=266d3a4c-00b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
In solidarity,
Team JanePAC
P.S. If you’ve been impacted by the recent disasters and need a break from our emails, **[click here to pause them](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98549898/517020890/-708861327?refcode=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhmM2UzNjI1LTBlYjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hrq3ZUwbAcGmM77qkkRzVSconbg3EMQvR27fNX3dccg=&emci=266d3a4c-00b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8f3e3625-0eb8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)**. Take care of what matters most, and we'll be here when you're ready.

clean_body: Make your voice heard. | Right now, firefighters are battling a fast-moving wildfire in Malibu, California. As of yesterday, the Franklin fire consumed more than 3,900 acres, destroyed at least seven homes, and displaced thousands of residents. This year has already been catastrophic for climate-fueled disasters across the U.S. From the deadly flooding in North Carolina after Hurricane Helene to the destructive South Fork Fire in New Mexico, communities from coast to coast have endured life-changing climate-related disasters. It’s heartbreaking to see yet another community bearing the brunt. In 2018, Donald Trump refused to approve disaster aid for California wildfires until his advisors convinced him there were enough Trump voters in the affected areas. He even directed special treatment for politically favorable regions while stalling critical aid for others. And with Donald Trump returning to the White House next month, there’s every reason to fear disaster relief will once again be treated as a political weapon. Disasters don’t care about party affiliation. Homes are burning. Families are displaced. And every single person impacted deserves relief, no matter how they voted. California has weathered fire after fire, and our communities know what it takes to rebuild. But whether Californians will receive federal help or not should NEVER be a concern in the midst of tragedy. Together, we can hold Washington accountable. We can demand leadership that puts people first, not partisan loyalty. | In solidarity, Team JanePAC P.S. If you’ve been impacted by the recent disasters and need a break from our emails, . Take care of what matters most, and we'll be here when you're ready. | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Eve Schiff
subject: Proud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8214%2E5257348%2EqhDC8F)
Hi Derek, it’s Eve Schiff, Adam’s wife.
On Monday, Adam was officially sworn into office as a United States Senator.
I am so proud of him — his selflessness, dedication, kindness, and good sense of humor make him exactly the kind of Senator California needs.
Our family got together in Washington, D.C. for the swearing-in ceremony. I’ve been to a few of these ceremonies in the House of Representatives, but this one is extra special.
**This moment is the culmination of Adam’s hard work — and your support, too. He would not be in this position without your belief in him and all you did for him during this two-year campaign.**
For that, I am incredibly grateful and humbled.
For as long as I have known Adam — and next February we will have been married for 30 years — he has been guided by the belief that the people of this great country deserve the chance to get a good job, provide for themselves and their families, and enjoy a nice quality of life.
Now, from the U.S. Senate, Adam will keep up the fight to bring down costs, increase the availability of affordable housing and childcare, protect our planet, and pass gun safety legislation. He’ll work with any willing partner to deliver for the people of California. And he’s _so_ ready to get started.
Thank you for standing alongside Adam. I promise he’ll make you proud!
— Eve

Team -- The Senate will soon be losing three legislative giants.

Jon Tester, Sherrod Brown, and Bob Casey have spent decades working to make America freer, fairer, and filled with opportunity for all. **They deserve all of our gratitude -- and this is our chance to show it.**

We're organizing a card to thank them for their tireless work on behalf of Montanans, Ohioans, and Pennsylvanians, and top supporters like you are already lining up to express their appreciation.

But as of now, we still need 1,000 more signatures from Pennsylvania before we can get ready to pass the card along -- **so please, will you sign the card now?**

[**Thank Jon Tester, Sherrod Brown, and Bob Casey for their steadfast dedication to the American people >>**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20832?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241211-SignTheCard-TesterBrownCaseyThankYouCard-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241211-SignTheCard-TesterBrownCaseyThankYouCard-ETG-sl1&akid=19132%2E9716520%2E896azm)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: It's getting hard to hold back this evil
body:
And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c310fafa6aee4caa947bea59c5ae2981&_e=B0OZdqcgo6LlURaZOb3v6D8qUT-OTY-1nW6o6bkZ-rdEBuqMjKKlHVYdU0slfLc9zIoODeF6As1gYwiMyqJd7m8OwAV9tWTzbjorWNO6In_tqNtAjEwgAhm5MnH8JNZHdQO_y-QtiElqNw_74nDQ2KP5nAGqG4JBcH0o2nc7TexGV8QgFPHjuYJDY_yxLc208GWQh5HmOTjyhi3oLbUF_B6ovwtH_hNhZcR0k2mq5lCiByTOGed3S5CbPKfmkdfd9eblrf_gsA8dSoYpZE_6AedbfWJXf1h7gVrpVupJKWeGMDvieWMOW31LhBpGn0Taowex0nRhYDPuIrWQqcj1F_TeAzvj4L2XbXpsqzZTArY16bV0zACRXVxwV-LKGX77fRt978VPZSFr6t1flNWphA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c310fafa6aee4caa947bea59c5ae2981&_e=B0OZdqcgo6LlURaZOb3v6D8qUT-OTY-1nW6o6bkZ-rdEBuqMjKKlHVYdU0slfLc9zIoODeF6As1gYwiMyqJd7m8OwAV9tWTzbjorWNO6In_tqNtAjEwgAhm5MnH8JNZHdQO_y-QtiElqNw_74nDQ2KP5nAGqG4JBcH0o2nc7TexGV8QgFPHjuYJDY_yxLc208GWQh5HmOTjyhi3oLbUF_B6ovwtH_hNhZcR0k2mq5lCiByTOGed3S5CbPKfmkdfdVODWpLGKU6tI0AXm9vTV0sLdki7FNCr3wTCuORFKVtQ7Ff6xhrMKtzgHo2NsXbSBkKUzfjEbfhEUPp65WJrg77P02gFkprTGOjsOjpNkEC_tIbmVEQfL8bT3OhxyLVzagm2yyeKU2gpYWVKnfOObIA%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c310fafa6aee4caa947bea59c5ae2981&_e=B0OZdqcgo6LlURaZOb3v6D8qUT-OTY-1nW6o6bkZ-rdEBuqMjKKlHVYdU0slfLc9zIoODeF6As1gYwiMyqJd7m8OwAV9tWTzbjorWNO6In_tqNtAjEwgAhm5MnH8JNZHdQO_y-QtiElqNw_74nDQ2KP5nAGqG4JBcH0o2nc7TexGV8QgFPHjuYJDY_yxLc208GWQh5HmOTjyhi3oLbUF_B6ovwtH_hNhZcR0k2mq5lCiByTOGed3S5CbPKfmkdfdylfN7DQxjYfKP8NuALI3Gks2AkeZTwdFrLPV8aCEb_b24hsa_LXwF3Nx-NUs9dWOCZ8pWB1PwgOnAAnEQ_he77OxGQPaotIM1TS2FCGlmbdKNAclJL0aAmBvGX_9e08T55OmKLDgz7fNlaYA7glTXw%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c310fafa6aee4caa947bea59c5ae2981&_e=B0OZdqcgo6LlURaZOb3v6D8qUT-OTY-1nW6o6bkZ-rdEBuqMjKKlHVYdU0slfLc9zIoODeF6As1gYwiMyqJd7m8OwAV9tWTzbjorWNO6In_tqNtAjEwgAhm5MnH8JNZHdQO_y-QtiElqNw_74nDQ2KP5nAGqG4JBcH0o2nc7TexGV8QgFPHjuYJDY_yxLc208GWQh5HmOTjyhi3oLbUF_B6ovwtH_hNhZcR0k2mq5lCiByTOGed3S5CbPKfmkdfdA_Q84mEaOx0ZGpToU7UQQa3JnwXjmWOrqfKL5Rfw1vaAIBP2dyrhIvQFN04u0pE82c5uYsmXJDkIGfZAT3n1wP15cEQ4ooafaC_53whvdbuAf91j7kpTlUj1PxxC625LvA1L1nJBKdD2QMMgdbirZQ%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c310fafa6aee4caa947bea59c5ae2981&_e=B0OZdqcgo6LlURaZOb3v6D8qUT-OTY-1nW6o6bkZ-rdEBuqMjKKlHVYdU0slfLc9zIoODeF6As1gYwiMyqJd7m8OwAV9tWTzbjorWNO6In_tqNtAjEwgAhm5MnH8JNZHdQO_y-QtiElqNw_74nDQ2KP5nAGqG4JBcH0o2nc7TexGV8QgFPHjuYJDY_yxLc208GWQh5HmOTjyhi3oLbUF_B6ovwtH_hNhZcR0k2mq5lCiByTOGed3S5CbPKfmkdfdNoHgc755mf2IcMYbbcNSzyhW_v7NxxEiE0WHabbMduneHdc4KHhNjmFE85-K5TuTlz62vpaUN7z8DQLTUvwpwlBWfsLqfgT3KlFbhms7WvGDHEhbZfOSC1bhrhTzBhv-OzxV-VCE1ZVRsq69gbnhrQ%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c310fafa6aee4caa947bea59c5ae2981&_e=B0OZdqcgo6LlURaZOb3v6D8qUT-OTY-1nW6o6bkZ-rdEBuqMjKKlHVYdU0slfLc9zIoODeF6As1gYwiMyqJd7m8OwAV9tWTzbjorWNO6In_tqNtAjEwgAhm5MnH8JNZHdQO_y-QtiElqNw_74nDQ2KP5nAGqG4JBcH0o2nc7TexGV8QgFPHjuYJDY_yxLc208GWQh5HmOTjyhi3oLbUF_B6ovwtH_hNhZcR0k2mq5lCiByTOGed3S5CbPKfmkdfdd98GldPxeS5madbS22T4hc-HB1kU3X4TDa2TAJwUz5HrgEitN7OmApZ0dvvKcnOnL_EXAbD9HrvpKT3gtksNZ1rtC0icRN3QBQoRjBpt4W3ja37W1SEqK-6DPTBsA_yfsH5boyoHftny3EchNYuhRw%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. **#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**

Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c310fafa6aee4caa947bea59c5ae2981&_e=B0OZdqcgo6LlURaZOb3v6D8qUT-OTY-1nW6o6bkZ-rdEBuqMjKKlHVYdU0slfLc9zIoODeF6As1gYwiMyqJd7m8OwAV9tWTzbjorWNO6In_tqNtAjEwgAhm5MnH8JNZHdQO_y-QtiElqNw_74nDQ2KP5nAGqG4JBcH0o2nc7TexGV8QgFPHjuYJDY_yxLc208GWQh5HmOTjyhi3oLbUF_B6ovwtH_hNhZcR0k2mq5lCiByTOGed3S5CbPKfmkdfdSPbLYpMOaTC0r5ZBNb8Us3gbAWynwVL1oHPnXMd7Ca1w8eKrwCzzyW5VzYmXpqj7jEsEG7qhB5xAId6y6NX2OmxYcfABf5TiPbp9vl8p4-vhBseEsIS5YQsK1SSR-iGBIkxs4nuCjYRsetPOPHHfeg%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c310fafa6aee4caa947bea59c5ae2981&_e=B0OZdqcgo6LlURaZOb3v6D8qUT-OTY-1nW6o6bkZ-rdEBuqMjKKlHVYdU0slfLc9zIoODeF6As1gYwiMyqJd7m8OwAV9tWTzbjorWNO6In_tqNtAjEwgAhm5MnH8JNZHdQO_y-QtiElqNw_74nDQ2KP5nAGqG4JBcH0o2nc7TexGV8QgFPHjuYJDY_yxLc208GWQh5HmOTjyhi3oLbUF_B6ovwtH_hNhZcR0k2mq5lCiByTOGed3S5CbPKfmkdfdtg-VX8CdnCPEXDJbYUrBCjfbBdPA1aKGhophlIAonV4keBRTP8BrVJBH_V97HuNexmtXiQOWkzTsPEBtT9ic9NUjpqDIFtmVhM076idyBpGTp4LQx53WlmBBr4RGKVepLJgRyb9ZjUgUyrGnOUiuVg%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c310fafa6aee4caa947bea59c5ae2981&_e=B0OZdqcgo6LlURaZOb3v6D8qUT-OTY-1nW6o6bkZ-rdEBuqMjKKlHVYdU0slfLc9zIoODeF6As1gYwiMyqJd7m8OwAV9tWTzbjorWNO6In_tqNtAjEwgAhm5MnH8JNZHdQO_y-QtiElqNw_74nDQ2KP5nAGqG4JBcH0o2nc7TexGV8QgFPHjuYJDY_yxLc208GWQh5HmOTjyhi3oLbUF_B6ovwtH_hNhZcR0k2mq5lCiByTOGed3S5CbPKfmkdfdisaObUBcFPhKCk2W_A7z6t4fcDsZj8yU4YpNhMiYrFcQiBkfi7sNvTdhJ-isbePx1cBGVijdFlCBPS0fBPGGEU9GAtmUMVotPkVCRB9ka3lcT1MpP8ly2lnmRvxxT5gU06xfpBGpDHYlLp60ygIpVw%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

Sincerely,

clean_body: And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.| | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. name: Thank You Jack Smith! (via VPP)
subject: Your signature [not recorded]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Hurry before he steps down!!
| We’re running out of time to thank Special Counsel Jack Smith for his incredible work and defend him from Donald Trump’s wrath!

**When we reviewed our signature list this morning, we were STUNNED to see your name still MISSING!**

_As a top local Democrat, we don’t want you to miss this opportunity._ **You only have until MIDNIGHT:** [**Sign the letter to thank Jack Smith before he STEPS DOWN! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85384?t=6&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85384?t=7&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-)
---
Don’t delay,

_The Voter Protection Project_
**-BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE-**
**🚨 URGENT 🚨
Trump Has Sights Set on Prosecuting Political Rivals — Including Jack Smith **
Friend, despite Jack Smith announcing he’s stepping down, Donald Trump is STILL out for revenge.
**He’s not only plotting to DESTROY all evidence against him, but PROSECUTE Jack Smith!**
[**We need 99 more Democrats in your area to sign our letter thanking Jack Smith for his work and standing with him against these vile attacks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85384?t=8&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-)
[Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85384?t=9&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-)
---
To: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_I am FURIOUS that Trump is seeking to prosecute you!_**

Trump is running scared because he KNOWS you’re about to drop hundreds of pages of evidence detailing his treasonous crimes.

He’s even promising to be a _“dictator on day one,”_ hell-bent on avenging anyone who has held him accountable.

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your amazing work over the years to bring Donald Trump to justice! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85384?t=10&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85384?t=11&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-)
---
__X A grateful Democrat__
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18196%2E878179%2EpQcsq-)
