name: Diane Sare
subject: Force Congress to Exercise Its Power to Stop Nuclear War
body:
HR 10218 can stop Ukraine from striking Russia with American weapons

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241211_hr_10218_mobe&n=1)
---
| Friend – Did you know that Stratcom's Rear Admiral Thomas Buchanan said at a public event that the United States must plan to "win" a nuclear war? [**The details on his comments are available in a leaflet for mass distribution available here.**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNFwdJMrXR2G1R3l2fQ2L0oIHokKgZxT5kc4KQvMdTjAOepBZ9dqzhFalX2-OvTgndEvdmf2hl0Iv_vEY0NQQhu&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241211_hr_10218_mobe&n=2) This is insanity. Since President Biden is dysfunctional, but supposedly making dangerous decisions to allow Ukraine to deploy American-made and guided ATACMS to strike Russian territory, killing Russian citizens, and Russia claims to have killed American "military specialists" in Ukraine, the U.S. Congress must be forced to step up. Rep. Higgins of Louisiana has introduced a very blunt resolution, [HR 10218](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=QLBrH_au-_Km4FLk5287ZtBiFx6Wwvc4wBx7smYJRI_TF-nsAjseUX0kAJvDkF67yAQn-dAnk6IB2X7R9P2pBDojdMJEbRuqoRhTT09s_0k&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241211_hr_10218_mobe&n=3), demanding a ban on ATACMS missiles to Ukraine. This would be a step back from the brink of nuclear armageddon. We need you to call your representatives to co-sponsor this bill. Please print the leaflet and use it to make those calls and mobilize your friends. Also, please sign up for a recurring membership donation to the LaRouche Organization to support our work. | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241211_hr_10218_mobe&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241211_hr_10218_mobe&n=4)
---
* * *
Diane Sare
President, The LaRouche Organization
* * *
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=MeaOPDdKHeXHoXMo8SdPMf1VjA1KyRWnKuo9UWgoL0GB_Xr2W5EJMtLpVQGlb-k9&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241211_hr_10218_mobe&n=5) | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iBUqNN5QxZbZpy8oXl3a1f4SrO5ITeWevYBWApG_21U&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241211_hr_10218_mobe&n=6) | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=I0ROecgJMR22guD7PNioffU_dgRI7v0LrjR1AYsr3CY17x_6ALTqKUG0HXeQgjgR&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241211_hr_10218_mobe&n=7)
---|---|---

| The LaRouche Organization · 2 University Plaza Dr, Suite 100, Hackensack, NJ 07601, United States

| | Project 2025 is a serious threat to our rights and freedoms — including the right to vote. In its pages are plans to criminalize the voting process, allow the spreading of election disinformation, give the federal government access to state voter rolls, and weaken the Voting Rights Act (VRA) of 1965. Signed at the height of the civil rights movement, the VRA prohibited racial discrimination in voting. Its passage strengthened our nation’s democracy, and has helped combat voter suppression in the years since. Project 2025 would weaken its enforcement by stripping the Department of Justice’s Civil Rights Division, which defends Americans of color in civil rights cases. [**We refuse to stand by and let this happen. Help us fight right-wing efforts to challenge our freedoms and keep us from using our voices — make a donation of $25 or more today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98550583/517023238/-1136485954?amount=25&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241211_f_VRAThreats_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTVmNDEyNS0xM2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wyaI2xNQKIlAQHFwmsK72dYGRNT6eNu5KJZpDGNnAX0=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98550585/517023241/-1136485954?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241211_f_VRAThreats_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTVmNDEyNS0xM2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wyaI2xNQKIlAQHFwmsK72dYGRNT6eNu5KJZpDGNnAX0=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98550589/517023244/-1136485954?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241211_f_VRAThreats_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTVmNDEyNS0xM2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wyaI2xNQKIlAQHFwmsK72dYGRNT6eNu5KJZpDGNnAX0=)

Project 2025 could take us backwards and see voters denied their rights. Jim Crow-era laws like poll taxes and literacy tests were designed to keep Black Americans from going to the polls, and Republicans are building on that legacy with new voter suppression laws in states across the country.
Over the past decade, voting rights have continued to come under attack, and anti-democracy politicians at all levels of government have worked to dismantle the VRA’s protections. Eleven years ago, with the _Shelby County v. Holder_ ruling, the Supreme Court found important parts of the VRA unconstitutional — ushering in a flood of voter suppression laws and practices targeting Black and brown voters.
[**We need to be prepared for legislation that seeks to threaten the freedom to vote at the state and federal level. Your gift of $25 or more today will make a real difference in protecting the freedom to vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98550604/517023259/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241211_f_VRAThreats_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTVmNDEyNS0xM2I4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wyaI2xNQKIlAQHFwmsK72dYGRNT6eNu5KJZpDGNnAX0=)

clean_body: Free and fair elections can’t wait | | | Project 2025 is a serious threat to our rights and freedoms — including the right to vote. In its pages are plans to criminalize the voting process, allow the spreading of election disinformation, give the federal government access to state voter rolls, and weaken the Voting Rights Act (VRA) of 1965. Signed at the height of the civil rights movement, the VRA prohibited racial discrimination in voting. Its passage strengthened our nation’s democracy, and has helped combat voter suppression in the years since. Project 2025 would weaken its enforcement by stripping the Department of Justice’s Civil Rights Division, which defends Americans of color in civil rights cases. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Project 2025 could take us backwards and see voters denied their rights. Jim Crow-era laws like poll taxes and literacy tests were designed to keep Black Americans from going to the polls, and Republicans are building on that legacy with new voter suppression laws in states across the country. Over the past decade, voting rights have continued to come under attack, and anti-democracy politicians at all levels of government have worked to dismantle the VRA’s protections. Eleven years ago, with the Shelby County v. Holder ruling, the Supreme Court found important parts of the VRA unconstitutional — ushering in a flood of voter suppression laws and practices targeting Black and brown voters. = With your help, we’re preparing for threats to our rights — thank you. | | Dear Fellow American,

Are you fed up with leftist global elites?

I think they're a bunch of hypocritical self-avowed Marxists, private-jet environmentalists, and genocide-adjacent humanitarians.

November's election results proved that the American people are fed up with leftist elites who want to take away your liberty and destroy our nation's prosperity, security, and American way of life.

[**But you can help stop the leftist elites ' agenda today.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=789606a4deba411c88196670bec843c7&_e=kkhGaKOXChhxCslYv6zzEr5EJaPBN_dbz-YtOuqvq9N_U5ITwVwBhyDk5-FLuuCMiJGIkrgMO-OO1efoIKRG6LSVGKgGqTJUp66FxxBnRiCmI1GcDaNE1RfaeseLpEICkNITNFPG-6hSlfbiT_lGSnlml2kjTS2p9HUMs8NPnQ0ZwytI0T_4RU-AJD5KWgaoDkHNI6PoO1hMm8yr2BnSef1sJEk9zx2H6eJLQA982zIM23Yq_PY41xe_LKcVW_8Q5bI-WhVqlMsMyGscnLlni-0w29ivG40PqV70mT2TUh1SZb-PV8OYEkaL5K1Cj8N6kB7q6qDSv-hqAi-bDOKq5FPjI2Un0-9Tqy3OY_zVepA%3D)

I told the leftist elites at the World Economic Forum that the next administration should compile a list of everything that's ever been proposed at the World Economic Forum and object to all of them, wholesale.

With the new administration arriving in a few short weeks, you and I need to act right now to do just that.

Your year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation will help:
* Create and promote public policies that put America first and reject globalism.
* Dismantle the administrative state, whose leftist bureaucrats want to push globalism, not help the American people.
* Educate millions of Americans on the dangers of globalism.

**Please make your year-end gift and activate your Heritage Foundation membership to help stop leftist globalism using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=789606a4deba411c88196670bec843c7&_e=kkhGaKOXChhxCslYv6zzEr5EJaPBN_dbz-YtOuqvq9N_U5ITwVwBhyDk5-FLuuCMiJGIkrgMO-OO1efoIKRG6LSVGKgGqTJUp66FxxBnRiCmI1GcDaNE1RfaeseLpEICkNITNFPG-6hSlfbiT_lGSnlml2kjTS2p9HUMs8NPnQ0ZwytI0T_4RU-AJD5KWgaoDkHNI6PoO1hMm8yr2BnSeRupgjqChFWp95Qtea8l0x1qzifEDYxD2ttmv-KHTXrjL0WsIZw6LxAWAst2dbYjSN8CjNLdG92LCDrvASFrYQRjDpk83CKRkYF6Gh68IqhW4DAwGLT1T-9Yav2xGVRhpGEqYldHB345JUOKg9G7gHQ%3D)

Together we will restore our nation's sovereignty and ensure that our government serves the American people, not the interests of international elites.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. We need as many patriots as possible standing with us in this fight against globalism. If you agree this is a noble endeavor, please activate your Heritage Foundation membership with your year-end gift using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=789606a4deba411c88196670bec843c7&_e=kkhGaKOXChhxCslYv6zzEr5EJaPBN_dbz-YtOuqvq9N_U5ITwVwBhyDk5-FLuuCMiJGIkrgMO-OO1efoIKRG6LSVGKgGqTJUp66FxxBnRiCmI1GcDaNE1RfaeseLpEICkNITNFPG-6hSlfbiT_lGSnlml2kjTS2p9HUMs8NPnQ0ZwytI0T_4RU-AJD5KWgaoDkHNI6PoO1hMm8yr2BnSebQ0wXTS0JUjCMhqGuq3CF3jocq4IWGOvLai0bmYu6eYOuLgfX2qoclWwMS6DNtNEohZjNMd1RNAEsJMik72uaUpFsjMz98P87VvJ_5aG7bluWUMaHywMOqoFMB8nw5pkGrD7RFvGzO3PIHHOE92rIM%3D)**

The family is the center of American life.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=06044e59d08442328a0dcc1010acab4d&_t=N3aYQnoX1m1vifi0TdxoQ_b1u_5DUbcnqGYKsk2oLkjBtD74l8wpLiggWk2fTjkNUDtwFXzn8-PkSOntEjFTG8WDa5cToYOtQZS-VntrAlZiaqcOrZfg5KmWKSxbhphP)_

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=06044e59d08442328a0dcc1010acab4d&_e=GP7p0VlQT_a5WCCOrTjY63x4M1Gw9lQDpI6hVCYfR54hgj1bav-K280hAZkdfWEtzUjr4oStEiehrvt-N-swMOC5mTHh4VIuX8DV1HOuYlJxG3EQoCx1HDTQN1YeWSuTW2hsSAX3gW3NX_1muK907EYxrOWBb_WTNhxLpYr6yGTd1mKB6DGuepYUvGNOQNfyhQvx-2TGPY1tG5bRgONNFVf2YQuhVdMp6o-_AN8og-oOqqd79CEtbFiHLbDd0UTdqLV90RiWCvFUOsxCaH8qzGHI1H7uU0rBnVgaLMxe5dWy-cO_cGXqlTLXvZOpZlZOFYR7Q_X6ZCl8K8eEaAK3pdm-RcPO2dYYOl5tFjY0Y98%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American,

The family is the center of American life.

Strong families are needed for Americans' prosperity, freedom, and happiness.

Unfortunately, the American family is in crisis today. Forty percent of all children are born to unmarried mothers, leading to poverty, crime, mental illness, teen suicide, substance abuse, rejection of religion, and high school dropouts.

For decades leftists have tried and failed to replace fathers with government programs and handouts. But there is no government program that can replace the hole in a child's soul cut out by the absence of a father.

Even worse, the Left actively works against families because strong families threaten their radical social agenda.

That's why at The Heritage Foundation, we're pushing for key policy reforms that will strengthen the American family.

[**Will you help restore the American family today?**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=06044e59d08442328a0dcc1010acab4d&_e=GP7p0VlQT_a5WCCOrTjY63x4M1Gw9lQDpI6hVCYfR54hgj1bav-K280hAZkdfWEtzUjr4oStEiehrvt-N-swMOC5mTHh4VIuX8DV1HOuYlJxG3EQoCx1HDTQN1YeWSuTW2hsSAX3gW3NX_1muK907EYxrOWBb_WTNhxLpYr6yGTd1mKB6DGuepYUvGNOQNfyhQvx-2TGPY1tG5bRgONNFdPq1adWQXJ9qdLeC4zWnsfyh0CvPlpuWrW6h0IDL7rwgVWy6Kj_0jr-4Dlhx0IkVnbhRR7aK0L41OrKc2gLpXylcSfGhpyP--cZ4gVBaiYhDljWNtuSBVZ1pZK5pQ23toEACa0MhgH-cZRyvkGUgIY%3D)

Your year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation today will help promote policies like:
* Eliminating marriage penalties in federal welfare programs and the tax code and installing work requirements for food stamps.
* Promoting parents' rights and school choice in public education so American schools serve parents, not the other way around.
* Removing critical race theory and gender ideology curricula from every public school in the country.
* Enacting robust protections for the unborn and calling for the government to comply with existing laws that prevent federal funding of abortion.

**If you agree that our country needs these policies now, I encourage you to make your year-end gift and activate your Heritage Foundation membership today using the secure link below.
**
[**https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=06044e59d08442328a0dcc1010acab4d&_e=GP7p0VlQT_a5WCCOrTjY63x4M1Gw9lQDpI6hVCYfR54hgj1bav-K280hAZkdfWEtzUjr4oStEiehrvt-N-swMOC5mTHh4VIuX8DV1HOuYlJxG3EQoCx1HDTQN1YeWSuTW2hsSAX3gW3NX_1muK907EYxrOWBb_WTNhxLpYr6yGTd1mKB6DGuepYUvGNOQNfyhQvx-2TGPY1tG5bRgONNFVJPj9W0iAKZRGQIEFhCjRyXadYQI_K3up5RSQW5xbiOlLqc4TTy03p4wktOPcEWLegDrhqUt-XWylIbY0IdxT_X4fiQYaJfewrlzF1mtgATEjo4bWDiKMKFtn8NhJCT-vHFdoBx1X5NZ6r5rrm9nlk%3D)

Heritage has the right people and right policies needed for this crucial mission. We just need your support to make it succeed.

I hope you'll stand with us as we fight to save the American family.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. As a fellow patriot, I know you agree that the family is central to American life. I hope you 'll support our plan to restore the American family by activating your Heritage Foundation membership with your year-end gift today using this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=06044e59d08442328a0dcc1010acab4d&_e=GP7p0VlQT_a5WCCOrTjY63x4M1Gw9lQDpI6hVCYfR54hgj1bav-K280hAZkdfWEtzUjr4oStEiehrvt-N-swMOC5mTHh4VIuX8DV1HOuYlJxG3EQoCx1HDTQN1YeWSuTW2hsSAX3gW3NX_1muK907EYxrOWBb_WTNhxLpYr6yGTd1mKB6DGuepYUvGNOQNfyhQvx-2TGPY1tG5bRgONNFfLtN2_H-wKZXent9yl7RdHpuvAXkJOPQXGzJdmgXeEGMWmTPeLQQdCFIo2uYQ1DbGZRCisxzCgkKaLcGEcKhyORvGZlyu01YM0S7Vpl3fhrj058B7rtSWBYL3LJcZ9iE4UKiRgx4yudyO1Civ3RUcY%3D)**

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

name: K.T. Coleman (NDRC)
subject: Look at these razor-thin margins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
When we say every little bit of support matters, we mean it.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98551100/517024879/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYzMyMjAwLTE0YjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iJu9q4vkpqQUUvS_xxhcnR6FH-1Kb7Y6pWcwQQTKKEs=&emci=2d75f3c1-efb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0fc32200-14b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Hey Peter, In the run up to this year’s election, we talked a lot about how every little bit matters — every donation matters, every call to a voter matters, every time you share information with a friend matters — because some of the most critical races come down to the slimmest margins of votes. We weren’t exaggerating. This year, races at all levels and in every corner of the country were decided by razor-thin margins. It’s made national news that in California, not one but TWO races for U.S. Congress were decided by less than 1,000 votes — combined! Democrat Adam Gray won his race by 187 votes and flipped CA13. And Democrat Derek Tran won his race by 653 votes and flipped CA45. Races that typically fall under most people’s radar — races like the ones that supporters like _you_ helped support — _also_ came down to the wire: In North Carolina, Democracy Defender Justice Allison Riggs won her state supreme court race by just 734 votes — out of _more than 5.5 million votes. _ In Oregon, Democrat Lesly Munoz won State House District 22 by just 161 votes out of flipping the district. In Colorado, the race for state house district 16 was finally _just_ called last week. Republican challenger Rebecca Keltie won the seat by just 3 votes — with this flip, Democrats will lose their supermajority in the state house. And in Montana, Democrat Scott Rosenzweig won state house district 57 by just 17 votes. _Seventeen.Votes._ These results are all the proof you need that every vote _truly_ matters. And that means every effort to help educate and mobilize voters — big or small — also _truly_ matters. **So today, I’m asking you to forward this email to a friend. Ask them to take a look at some of these close outcomes and get ready for the work ahead.****** Then, when it’s time to marshal our networks to protect fair maps, combat gerrymandering and safeguard our democracy, they’ll understand exactly why we do this work. Thanks again for all that you do. Yours in service,
K.T. K.T. Coleman
Deputy Campaigns Director P.S. Did you receive this email as a forward from a friend? Welcome! **[Click here to join the fair maps movement.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98551101/517024880/-1253117781?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_Margins_email_20241211-NDRC-Tier1-Margins_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20241211-NDRC-Tier1-Margins_&utm_campaign=Margins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYzMyMjAwLTE0YjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iJu9q4vkpqQUUvS_xxhcnR6FH-1Kb7Y6pWcwQQTKKEs=&emci=2d75f3c1-efb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0fc32200-14b8-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045) We’re hard at work protecting and strengthening our democracy and need your help.** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98551102/517024881/1701676424?refcode=eng_ndrc_tier1_email_Margins_email_20241211-NDRC-Tier1-Margins_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20241211-NDRC-Tier1-Margins_&utm_campaign=Margins&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYzMyMjAwLTE0YjgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iJu9q4vkpqQUUvS_xxhcnR6FH-1Kb7Y6pWcwQQTKKEs=)

clean_body: When we say every little bit of support matters, we mean it. | Hey Peter, In the run up to this year’s election, we talked a lot about how every little bit matters — every donation matters, every call to a voter matters, every time you share information with a friend matters — because some of the most critical races come down to the slimmest margins of votes. We weren’t exaggerating. This year, races at all levels and in every corner of the country were decided by razor-thin margins. It’s made national news that in California, not one but TWO races for U.S. Congress were decided by less than 1,000 votes — combined! Democrat Adam Gray won his race by 187 votes and flipped CA13. And Democrat Derek Tran won his race by 653 votes and flipped CA45. Races that typically fall under most people’s radar — races like the ones that supporters like you helped support — also came down to the wire: In North Carolina, Democracy Defender Justice Allison Riggs won her state supreme court race by just 734 votes — out of more than 5.5 million votes. In Oregon, Democrat Lesly Munoz won State House District 22 by just 161 votes out of flipping the district. In Colorado, the race for state house district 16 was finally just called last week. Republican challenger Rebecca Keltie won the seat by just 3 votes — with this flip, Democrats will lose their supermajority in the state house. And in Montana, Democrat Scott Rosenzweig won state house district 57 by just 17 votes. Seventeen.Votes. These results are all the proof you need that every vote truly matters. And that means every effort to help educate and mobilize voters — big or small — also truly matters. So today, I’m asking you to forward this email to a friend. Ask them to take a look at some of these close outcomes and get ready for the work ahead.** Then, when it’s time to marshal our networks to protect fair maps, combat gerrymandering and safeguard our democracy, they’ll understand exactly why we do this work. Thanks again for all that you do. Yours in service, K.T. K.T. Coleman Deputy Campaigns Director P.S. Did you receive this email as a forward from a friend? Welcome! We’re hard at work protecting and strengthening our democracy and need your help. | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

CNN conservative commentator _**[Scott Jennings snapped](https://substack.com/redirect/0f29abf6-26d8-41b6-b2c2-e83151a40a59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ after his colleague said that seeing Jordan Neely as a victim was "a christian thing."
"Are you saying I'm not a christian," Jennings fired back, after having just asserted that Daniel Penny was actually the victim of the divisive case.
_**[Watch the very tense moment below:](https://substack.com/redirect/0f29abf6-26d8-41b6-b2c2-e83151a40a59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0f29abf6-26d8-41b6-b2c2-e83151a40a59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Penny was found innocent of all charges by a Manhattan jury, Monday, after he accidentally choked Neely to death when he had boarded the NYC subway and threatened passengers and acted erratically.
Black Lives Matter was energized by the case, as Neely was a black man killed by a white former marine. Protests broke out outside the courthouse following the innocent verdict.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0f29abf6-26d8-41b6-b2c2-e83151a40a59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Ted Cruz SCHOOLS woke Face the Nation host live on his own show
Ted Cruz put a CBS reporter in his place after he challenged Trump's likely firing of Christopher Wray from head of the FBI.
**Cruz:** "There has never been a point in our nation's history where the FBI has suffered a greater loss of respect!!"
_**[Watch him GO OFF below:](https://substack.com/redirect/e80ee92c-355e-4a17-a836-88891c294a73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e80ee92c-355e-4a17-a836-88891c294a73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**[Cruz insisted that the FBI has become a political weapon](https://substack.com/redirect/e80ee92c-355e-4a17-a836-88891c294a73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ of the Democrats used to target Trump and his supporters.
"And It's because James Comey and Chris Wray presided over, allowing the FBI to become a partisan cudgel to be used to target parents at school board meetings, to be used to target people who chose not to take the COVID vaccine," Cruz continued.
Cruz concluded by endorsing Pam Bondi and Kash Patel as "strong nominees" to restore the integrity of America's intelligence institutions.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e80ee92c-355e-4a17-a836-88891c294a73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Nurse caught with WHAT outside of work?!! What police found left everyone STUNNED!**
Police body cam footage shows _**[the arrest of a nurse](https://substack.com/redirect/bdc3ab60-c405-4b8d-8f44-5ac0c55369e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ on June 19, 2024 in Polk County, Iowa.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bdc3ab60-c405-4b8d-8f44-5ac0c55369e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The female suspect, while on the way to work, was initially pulled over for dark window tints on her vehicle.
Things escalated quickly however, as officers smelled the odor of marijuana and noticed the young nurse acting nervously during the stop. Due to this, officers asked the nurse to step out of the vehicle.
When the nurse finally cooperated with the officer's orders to step out of the vehicle, _**[she admitted to having cocaine in her pocket](https://substack.com/redirect/bdc3ab60-c405-4b8d-8f44-5ac0c55369e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , along with marijuana in her car.
The suspect was charged with Possession of Drug Paraphernalia, Possession of a Controlled Substance, and Interference with Official Acts.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bdc3ab60-c405-4b8d-8f44-5ac0c55369e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Would you pay $150,000 for soap dispensers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The newly created Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) will recommend where to cut wasteful government spending. It should start with the $850 billion defense budget for 2025, which accounts for over half of federal spending.

The U.S. spends nearly $1 trillion annually on defense, with half the budget going to defense contractors. Due to a lack of competition and the Pentagon’s ineffective price monitoring, major corporations are overcharging the Department of Defense and bleeding taxpayers dry in the process.

https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/ro-khanna-doge-spending-musk-ramaswamy-rcna182644 [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/ro-khanna-doge-spending-musk-ramaswamy-rcna182644]

The U.S. has the greatest military in the world. Period. But we need to make smart investments in national security, not just big investments. That’s why I’ve been the sole dissenting vote against the defense budget in the House Armed Services Committee. I know we can do better than this.

We have a responsibility to use Americans’ tax dollars wisely. I look forward to working with the Department of Government Efficiency to reduce waste and fraud at the Pentagon while defending programs like Social Security, Medicare, the Department of Veterans Affairs, and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

Please take a few minutes to read my op-ed on how the DOGE can effectively cut wasteful government spending by addressing the bloated defense budget. [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/ro-khanna-doge-spending-musk-ramaswamy-rcna182644] Text me at (650) 999-9610 to let me know your thoughts.

Thank you for your activism and for everything you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

Wait! One more thing–

Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. clean_body: [] Friend, The newly created Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) will recommend where to cut wasteful government spending. It should start with the $850 billion defense budget for 2025, which accounts for over half of federal spending. The U.S. spends nearly $1 trillion annually on defense, with half the budget going to defense contractors. Due to a lack of competition and the Pentagon’s ineffective price monitoring, major corporations are overcharging the Department of Defense and bleeding taxpayers dry in the process. [] The U.S. has the greatest military in the world. Period. But we need to make smart investments in national security, not just big investments. That’s why I’ve been the sole dissenting vote against the defense budget in the House Armed Services Committee. I know we can do better than this. We have a responsibility to use Americans’ tax dollars wisely. I look forward to working with the Department of Government Efficiency to reduce waste and fraud at the Pentagon while defending programs like Social Security, Medicare, the Department of Veterans Affairs, and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. Please take a few minutes to read my op-ed on how the DOGE can effectively cut wasteful government spending by addressing the bloated defense budget. [] Text me at (650) 999-9610 to let me know your thoughts. Thank you for your activism and for everything you do. In solidarity, Ro Wait! One more thing– Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future. subject: reaching every voter

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98551585/517026470/-491556796?refcode=241211&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzU5MzkwZC0xOGI4LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z0PrswXdPiBeyEXz2VhZ-9GlstdY3eOiRyNOnMwYE4g=)

Team, As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. [**That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and Serve America today as we build the strongest foundation possible. name: The Democratic Party
subject: We want to hear your thoughts →
body:
We’re gearing up to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but we need your input on which card to move forward with.
---
Derek, as a dedicated DNC supporter, we wanted to make sure you saw this: **We’re gearing up to release our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card, but first, we need your input on which design to use.** [**So we’re asking: Can you take a few seconds to tell us which member card design is your favorite? The sooner we hear from you, the sooner we’ll be able to get the winning design ready to print and ship.**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241211_2390_so&t=1&akid=2390%2E22930333%2EgvPN0w) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241211_2390_so&t=2&akid=2390%2E22930333%2EgvPN0w)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241211_2390_so&t=3&akid=2390%2E22930333%2EgvPN0w)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241211_2390_so&t=4&akid=2390%2E22930333%2EgvPN0w)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241211_2390_so&t=5&akid=2390%2E22930333%2EgvPN0w)
Democrats all over the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them into 2025 as a reminder of the work we can — and will — accomplish together.
We will not follow Donald Trump and J.D. Vance down a path of darkness, chaos, and hate. But here’s what we will do:
We will elect Democratic leaders who will stop Trump’s destructive agenda. From school board members to city council members, state legislators, governors, and members of Congress — every Democrat we elect is an additional check on Trump, his administration, and his allies in Congress.
We will organize and mobilize on the ground, learn lessons from this past election, and continue our investments in state parties to prevail in upcoming watershed elections in 2025, like Virginia and New Jersey.
And we will bolster our infrastructure and technology to reach voters, listen to voters, and learn from voters.
You’re a key part of this team, and your input is critical to our work. That’s why we want to hear from you today: [**Can you be one of the first supporters to select your favorite member card design?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241211_2390_so&t=6&akid=2390%2E22930333%2EgvPN0w)
Thanks for everything,
The Democrats
[**Don’t wait — after you cast your vote on your favorite member card design, make a $3 donation to reserve your card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20241211_2390_so&refcode2=2390_22930333_gvPN0w&akid=2390%2E22930333%2EgvPN0w)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241211_2390_so&amount=3&refcode2=2390_22930333_gvPN0w&akid=2390%2E22930333%2EgvPN0w)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

clean_body: I WAS PHYSICALLY ACCOSTED last night. A PRO-TRANS MAN chose violence and threats , costing me an injured wrist. Thankfully, I'm safe and the police have arrested him. The violence against me for trying to protect women only furthers my point. I need to HOLD THE LINE because women DESERVE to BE SAFE. This attack came right after I celebrated a MAJOR WIN: passing my bill to keep men out of women's bathrooms on Capitol Hill. As a victim of ab#se and r#pe, I know the risks women and girls face when they 're stripped of their privacy and safety. And these activists will stop at NOTHING to silence anyone who dares defend us. And after last night, it is clear I CANNOT STOP the fight! I 'm launching a NATIONAL fight to BAN biological men from entering women's spaces on ALL federal property. Peter, the stakes couldn't be higher. The mob is coming for me, but I need to know you're standing with me. 👉 Act NOW and SIGN YOUR NAME >> Paid for by Team Mace. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Team Kennedy
subject: We Changed the Debate—Now Let’s Clear the Path
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. inspired a new movement sweeping the nation.

|
---
| | | | [**Thanks to your support, Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s message reached far and wide.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=2)
---
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
We Changed the Course of an Election
[NOW LET’S CLEAR THE PATH](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. inspired a new movement sweeping the nation.
His campaign gave voice to millions of Americans ignored and ridiculed by mainstream media and politicians.
RFK Jr. elevated critical issues impacting your family’s health to the forefront of the national debate—issues like food safety, medical freedom, and natural health choices.
These efforts not only inspired millions but also shaped the outcome of the presidential election.
Take the “crunchy moms” featured in a recent _Wall Street Journal_ article. They rallied behind RFK Jr. because he boldly addressed their most pressing concerns, focusing on protecting their children’s well-being.
Key segments of our country, like the “crunchy moms,” not only rallied around RFK Jr.’s message but played a pivotal role in securing Donald Trump’s victory and advancing the Make America Healthy Again platform.
[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=6)
Thanks to your support, his message reached far and wide, reshaping the political landscape. Kennedy’s endorsement of Donald Trump brought these urgent issues into the national spotlight. .
But this effort came with a significant challenge.
To ensure RFK Jr.’s safety and message reached every corner of the country, we relied heavily on private security – costing millions.
[**Now, with RFK Jr. preparing to lead the charge to “Make America Healthy Again,” we must ensure he enters this next phase with a clean slate – free from any debt that could divert focus from this mission.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=7)
[Donate Now](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=8)
**We can’t afford delays.** This debt must be resolved quickly to ensure RFK Jr. can begin this next chapter, fully focused on tackling big pharma, FDA overreach, and restoring trust in health and nutrition for every American.
[**Please don’t wait – our opportunity to settle this debt is now >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=9)
Thank you for standing with us in this pivotal moment. **We’re just getting started!**
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=10)
[**Donate now to retire the debt >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=11)
[Help Now](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=12)
|

[](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=qVvjbYZFPGk-dgj1f2bqfL0-YRfFzv-GdJQeEtD6DqI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=14) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=PJjXLMlymU0n-OTqjg_TpbAIaCRYmvQY1HDziCNjhltpQB6ASK6MFbMK1Me4mgvz&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=15) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=zX--vN7d1lLnyyIYg1HIv9smma2c8QOVOnWMyLk4yyI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=16) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=8i_UFb6nr4zPXnY0WZkWD67i3lfoHfR3YIz42qE4mBAHRv1c-d1rtD-NbXVnJVMz&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=17) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=Z_o1v5uRNRxRYZz5aguEakB2YYT3YdTbArbpHdZXt1SqN_UvyW6It3Eikxl9299S&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=18) [](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=6EQ6sUlCj-zytkS_cwzfZ4t1sgt_WFGzO2WU_Wl6NSz5R7TkzLPnM4yy7PyWFvTa3IEquugMhTQkNDFbFnqxSg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=changed_12_11_24_nd1&n=19)

body:

Have you seen this headline?
Greg Abbott still has not fixed the Texas energy grid. He can’t keep the lights on in the energy capital of the world. Abbott prioritizes the profits of the energy CEOs who have given millions of dollars to his campaign.
We need leaders in Texas who will fight to improve the daily lives of Texans by lowering their energy bills.

---
Dear Friend,
---
According to media reports, a D.C. judge appointed by Barack Obama has ordered me to appear for a hearing in the Washington Swamp on Thursday to possibly **_“hold me in contempt.”_**
---
Left-wing judges are seeking revenge for President Trump’s victory, and would love nothing more than to see the President’s former lawyer – _yours truly_ – bankrupt and behind bars.
---
During a hearing last month, a federal judge said that next time, __I will not be permitted to speak.__
---
It wasn’t enough for the Left’s weaponized legal system to arrest me, take a mugshot of me, seize my home, take all of my money, and disbar me... They even want to take away my RIGHT to free speech.
---
But I will _never_ _surrender_ this battle, _because**freedom is ALWAYS worth fighting for.**_
---
They can take EVERYTHING from me – and they certainly have – but so long as I’m alive, I will keep fighting for my freedom!
---
**With my financial accounts now seized, my only hope of remaining in this battle depends on the generosity of patriots like you.**
---
_Of course, I humbly recognize that I’m not the only one still dealing with hardships in Biden’s America, so if you cannot give right now, please don’t think twice. I truly mean it._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can keep fighting for my rights and freedom against the Left’s vicious witch hunt.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kc2OmzAUhZ_G7ED4XmrCgkWnlG46nVGradpuoot_Ek_BEGMS8faVEc3286dzj45pmHpr1pqVTwzgYtXMABh-ZABLwJ_09vbs1_Tqf6V3BB0xg0-7eYOH6yTlf5ol5z--zWfh2_fb7-7GH3ZYJ_1w95OZHsj2kZZNouoCiBuZ6JqXiJXgRV4ml7owCnTBqwIrg0RYEuW5NIIEdUAHk9gacig4cA74QaDIRGUMcGMO5iCBU8mKfDuUGa91uFj3V3tFtl8zOQ5JX19CmOatWMugnbVcvM7u1nmtosGg9Yta07NdekvOpjFGjUNqFqfSsiIkZYhBK0irg-wKQdJ0CnjMw3YJwyloPzBsTFCcgYhE0jCRPTuGzd4-318GrewS7X2cDc7j4qVm2Hw_np7-R4wuaBcYNi9fn18ZiJPrrWLYvBbXRnwZ3PvnDW4_is3LeHw7Xrs-8bWa7rbv7SziNOdtmrjErYZ_AQAA__9DGqKx)
